name: Tyler Kalogeros-Treshuk
subject: update before tomorrow
body:
Hey Peter,

The deadline for our Inauguration Day 24hr flash match is tomorrow morning, and we're SO CLOSE to our goal. I want to share numbers from an internal update we just got:

_$21,352 raised of our $25,000 goal—just $3,648 left to go!_

Can you pitch in now and get us over the finish line? Use this link to have your gift matched 2X: [reprorights.org/24hrmatch](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100708631/523624434/1474386068?sourceid=1150311&utm_campaign=25emrge-0106aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjc4M2JjZC04YWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fmROlFd2eakMLN8BlSrUfYyelpSNmg9L8eBJHM14D4=&emci=2f3bf729-5ed4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3f783bcd-8ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237)

I know I don't need to tell you how important these next 100 days will be. We've already seen the devastating consequences of a Trump administration on reproductive freedom. They have abortion rights in their sights—but we're ready to fight back at every turn.

Fight with us and double the impact of your renewed Support now.

[reprorights.org/24hrmatch](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100708632/523624435/1474386068?sourceid=1150311&utm_campaign=25emrge-0106aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjc4M2JjZC04YWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fmROlFd2eakMLN8BlSrUfYyelpSNmg9L8eBJHM14D4=&emci=2f3bf729-5ed4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3f783bcd-8ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237)

Thx,
Tyler

Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk
Sr. Director, Individual Giving

New York, NY 10038
United States

body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=4565%2E35263%2EhJQegW ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter,

Today, I attended the inauguration of Donald Trump as President of the
United States.

While I know he was not our candidate of choice to serve in the White
House, I recognize the decisions of people in Wisconsin and across the
country who voted for Trump. Elections do not always go how we want them
to — that’s how our democracy works. But we must respect the outcome and
commit to bettering the country in any way we can.

Here is what matters today and always: I will always fight for Wisconsin.

That means working with President Trump to deliver for our state, and
standing up to him when he does not have our best interests at heart.
Because the reason why I got into public service is to get things done and
make life better for the people I represent.

It’s time we lower costs for working families, deliver more affordable
health care, continue our fight for a Made in Wisconsin economy, and
redouble our effort to pass my Women’s Health Protection Act so every
woman has the same rights and freedoms regardless of their state, county,
or zip code.

Kash Patel, Trump's nominee for FBI Director, **[just told-off every pro-DEI Democrat in the country](https://substack.com/redirect/a87a2733-50fb-4bc9-a0a5-972870f6d277?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during an address at Capital One Arena during the inauguration on Monday.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a87a2733-50fb-4bc9-a0a5-972870f6d277?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"My parents were born and raised in east-Africa," Patel explained to the crowd. "They moved here, they waited in line. They stood in line because the American dream was worth standing in line for."
**[He emphasized his personal success story,](https://substack.com/redirect/a87a2733-50fb-4bc9-a0a5-972870f6d277?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** stating, "I am living the American dream. I'm not here because of the color of my skin, I'm standing here because I have earned my right on this stage."
Patel also vowed to "remove the weaponization of the Intelligence Community for political purposes" and pledged to end what he described as a "two-tiered justice system."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a87a2733-50fb-4bc9-a0a5-972870f6d277?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Hello Friends Bill O 'Reilly Here,**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2c6e941a-a64c-4fc9-ac42-e1d7ed978f83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
• More than 2 million lost jobs
• Stocks plummeting over 20%
• IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling
**We can 't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it.**

# **Trump to sign pardon order for January 6 participants on Monday night: report**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6246931a-27f1-428f-8a60-a2b68ef90cd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Donald Trump plans to issue pardons for individuals convicted of nonviolent offenses related to the January 6, 2021, Capitol riot and commute the sentences of those with more serious charges, **[sources told CNN.](https://substack.com/redirect/ac4fa7ed-dd93-4767-9a64-ce591a85263e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
The executive action is expected to be signed Monday, focusing on over 730 people convicted of misdemeanors and about 300 with pending prosecutions.
Trump's move aims to dismiss ongoing cases and could end probation early for some. This action aligns with his campaign promise to offer "major pardons" for January 6 defendants, despite opposition from federal judges who argue it undermines justice.
The Justice Department, under Trump, is also expected to seek dismissals in court for cases yet to be tried.
* * *
# The transgender community is not going to like what Megyn Kelly just said...
Megyn Kelly **[did NOT hold back on the woke transgender left](https://substack.com/redirect/474202e6-54a2-4805-ad0f-510a2e30f5e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during her Trump rally speech at the Capital One Arena on Sunday evening,
"These battle are being won, piece by piece," Kelly said. "I'm, thinking of the 14-year-old girls in Wisconsin who had an 18-year-old guy come into their showers naked!!"
[](https://substack.com/redirect/474202e6-54a2-4805-ad0f-510a2e30f5e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"'How do we know about these stories,... girls spoke out! People were outraged!" Kelly continued, siting more recent examples where young girls were put at risk to serve the gender ideologies of biological men.
"This anti-DEI momentum has been built brick-by-brick, thanks to all of you!"

name: The Democrats
subject: Tonight.
body:
Not tomorrow, not next week.
---
We're writing to ask you to make a donation to the DNC tonight. Not tomorrow, not next week, but **tonight.** Here's why: Trump was sworn in just a few hours ago. He already has a Republican Congress at his disposal, and he’ll have a Cabinet stacked with billionaires ready to do anything they can to enact his Project 2025 agenda — no matter the harm they cause everyone else. Democrats are going to need a _huge_ sum of resources to organize and mobilize against any dangerous legislation Trump and his allies have planned. **But we’ll need to do more than that. This isn’t just about resisting Trump’s immediate plans. It’s about building the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power at the local level, in statewide office, in Congress, and beyond.** That’s why we’re asking for your help today. The truth is that the more contributions we receive now, while Trump’s term is just beginning, the more effective we can be in investing in state parties all over the country, in organizing against Trump’s worst policies, and ultimately in winning back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. name: No Dem Left Behind Executive Director, Hassan Martini
subject: A Gut-Wrenching Day
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w5c89-u441y9-kyd76rh7/)
---
# **A Gut-Wrenching Day**
---
| | | | Hello friend, First things first: I know you're scared, and I know you're anxious about everything happening today—I feel the same way. The most important thing we can do right now is connect. We want to hear from you. If you have feedback, want to get involved, or simply need to reach out, reply to this email. Not only will we read your message, but we’ll also respond to every serious one because we know our strength comes from being united. Today has been a gut-wrenching day. Watching Donald Trump sworn in as the 47th President of the United States was both surreal and deeply unsettling. The imagery—billionaires flaunting their wealth, the celebration of division, and the blatant lies—felt like a direct assault on the values we cherish. It feels as though our country is being hijacked, its soul trampled upon. Martin Luther King Jr. once said, _“The ultimate measure of a man is not where he stands in moments of comfort and convenience, but where he stands at times of challenge and controversy.”_ Those words resonate deeply right now. This isn’t just a political shift—it’s an existential threat to the very fabric of our society. Tomorrow, the nightmare will escalate. We’re already bracing for:

* **Barbaric ICE Raids** : Families will be torn apart, and communities will be terrorized.
* **Militarization of Our Streets** : Words like “invasion” are being deliberately used to create mass hysteria, justify military actions, and spread fear.
* **Erosion of Democracy** : The playbook is clear. Trump idolizes dictators like Kim Jong Un, Xi Jinping, Mohammed bin Salman, and Vladimir Putin. His actions today show he’s intent on emulating them.

I live in the suburbs of Chicago with my three young children, and here, it feels like we’re preparing for war. Notifications flood in every 30 seconds from friends and family. The language being used is chilling, calculated to frighten those who have already endured so much. It’s outrageous—and terrifying. Let’s not mince words: this is how democracies crumble.We will not stand idly by. We will not allow our voices to be silenced. We will not surrender our values. Here’s how we fight back: **Stay Informed** : Knowledge is power. Keep up-to-date and share credible information widely. **Speak Out** : Contact your elected officials. Demand they uphold their oaths to protect the Constitution and safeguard everyone’s rights. **Support Organizations** : Donate to and volunteer with groups fighting for justice, equality, and human rights.**Organize** : Join protests, rallies, and collective actions. Our voices are stronger together. **Never Lose Hope** : Remember, unity is our strength. Together, we can and will defend democracy. This is a pivotal moment in history. The choices we make today will define the nation we leave for future generations. We have faced immense challenges before, and we’ve emerged stronger. Let’s stand together now—unwavering, determined, and united in our commitment to justice and equality. In Solidarity, Hassan Martini
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w5c89-u441ya-kyd76rh7/)
---
| [Join No Dem Left Behind](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w5c89-u441yb-kyd76rh8/)
---
Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to modify your [preferences](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2w5c89--15aab-kyd76rh8&sl=4i6&t=1&ac=gpnv) or [unsubscribe](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2w5c89--15aab-kyd76rh8&sl=4i6&t=5&ac=gpnv).

name: Pete Aguilar
subject: Donald Trump wants to throw me in jail while pardoning violent insurrectionists.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ECU Non-federal
body:
I know that sounds crazy, but it’s the truth.
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s)
---
Hey, it’s Democratic Caucus Chairman Pete Aguilar.

Now that Donald Trump is officially in office, he’ll finally be able to make good on his threats to throw me in jail.

_I know that sounds crazy, but it’s the truth._

_He has repeatedly stated that he wants to jail me and the rest of the January 6th Committee for our work._

**But I won't be bullied by Donald Trump.** I’m very proud of my work on the January 6th Committee and I refuse to be bullied into neglecting my oath to protect the Constitution and our democracy.

His MAGA enforcers in the House have already conducted a partisan investigation into the January 6th Committee and said that Liz Cheney be prosecuted.

**They’ve shown that they intend to be a rubber stamp for Trump’s dangerous agenda and fascist schemes.**

Now more than ever, we need to build the resources to combat the GOP so that we can respond at a moment's notice to their disastrous plans. [**So please, split $10 between Fight for Reform to help elect state and local Democrats and me to help us hit our $50,000 fundraising goal to fund our work to protect our Democracy from the MAGA GOP »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58970?t=7&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s) | [DONATE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58970?t=8&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s)
---
Look, I won’t sugarcoat this, today is a tough day for our Democracy.

**The man who plotted to overturn the 2020 Election results and incited an armed insurrection on January 6th, 2021 is back in the Oval Office.**

_Just thinking those words makes my stomach turn._

As a member of the January 6th Committee and a member of Congress who was in the Capitol that day, I know firsthand how dangerous Trump can be and the lengths he'll go to maintain power.

He has already nominated extremists like Pete Hegseth, threatened to jail me and the rest of the January 6th Committee, and taken advice from billionaires like Elon Musk on gutting our social programs and government agencies.

He plans to send our country hurtling back to the past and roll back decades worth of progress we’ve given our blood, sweat, and tears to make.
[**Listen, with Trump’s most loyal followers in control of the House, we’re facing an uphill battle. But with your support, we can keep them in check. Please, split $10 between Fight for Reform to help elect state and local Democrats and me to support our work to protect our Democracy from the MAGA GOP »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58970?t=9&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Pete Aguilar will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58971?t=10&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58972?t=11&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58973?t=12&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58974?t=13&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58970?t=14&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s)
United we will prevail,

– Pete Aguilar
Pete Aguilar is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. Pete Aguilar is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources. Paid for by ECU Non-federal.
---
| | Paid political advertisement paid for by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035.
Authorized by Aguilar for Congress.
Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors.
Contributions to End Citizens United Non-federal will be used in End Citizens United Non-federal’s sole discretion and are not being earmarked for use in any particular state or election.
Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible.
fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s).**

[Click here](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails/?t=4&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=15&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Fight for Reform »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26914?t=5&akid=22778%2E4449941%2Er4Od0s)

name: Republican Governors Club
subject: Where should we ship these to?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Governors Association
body:
| | | Peter, we're offering only the top 5% of patriots a special opportunity to join the 2025 Republican Governors Club, and we couldn't think of a better fit than you.

As a way to thank you for all your hard work and commitment to the GOP, we want to invite you to our exclusive club, where members receive:
---
| |
* Special intel and memos from GOP Governors across the country.
* Front-row seats to breaking news and conservative victories.
* First access to Republican surveys, petitions, and polls that guide our conservative agenda in 2025.

---

subject: See ya in 4 years, Paris...I hope
body:
Trump pulls us out of the Paris Climate Agreement

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..9UEHqU9S4j81TURhigci6lz1KpG1ocVZ7EgCd8lTgsE?) for more
---
NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [See ya in 4 years, Paris...I hope](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=155299517&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1Mjk5NTE3LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc0MjE3NTAsImV4cCI6MTc0MDAxMzc1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wONt8-IOr4sia9JFfTspa5ZKI-qTE5u21HY12ONenx8)
### Trump pulls us out of the Paris Climate Agreement
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Jan 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=155299517&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1Mjk5NTE3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNzQyMTc1MCwiZXhwIjoxNzQwMDEzNzUwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.x3jlmcvLa4qkfCq8dIVBq08litUdnP6K7csmyzUYoNg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=155299517&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1Mjk5NTE3LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc0MjE3NTAsImV4cCI6MTc0MDAxMzc1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wONt8-IOr4sia9JFfTspa5ZKI-qTE5u21HY12ONenx8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=155299517&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1Mjk5NTE3LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc0MjE3NTAsImV4cCI6MTc0MDAxMzc1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wONt8-IOr4sia9JFfTspa5ZKI-qTE5u21HY12ONenx8)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcGF1bGFueTIxL3Avc2VlLXlhLWluLTQteWVhcnMtcGFyaXNpLWhvcGU_.WcqhlC_10YmLQcRTpu5eydAia0b0uEOaOaIEAiK7f8w?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/see-ya-in-4-years-parisi-hope?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e4cadd7c-1c71-4c40-8090-8ac61a6871db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Among the awful things that happened on this Inauguration Day - and there were many awful things - the _**most**_ awful was that Trump, once again, removed us from the [2015 Paris climate agreement.](https://substack.com/redirect/0359fc32-4c68-426b-a82b-0e7c79e663a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) In so doing, we join Iran, Libya, and Yemen as the only four nations on our deeply troubled planet that do not commit to certain policies and practices to keep [global warming below levels that could lead to widespread environmental catastrophe.](https://substack.com/redirect/fe2eec02-3693-4083-98f9-cd19f97e5ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Recall that Trump pulled us out of the Paris accords in his prior administration. Biden restored our membership immediately when he returned to office. And Trump has now boomeranged once again.
No wonder other countries are worried about the consequences of a second Trump administration.
The withdrawal of the US from the Paris climate agreement is especially troubling given the gripping cold that is blowing across the country including in the Gulf of MEXICO (not the "Gulf of America"!) region, the historic fires in LA, and the storm damage in the Carolinas. Our planet seems to be convulsing.
Much of the acceleration of the impact of climate change is due to the fact that the average temperatures exceeded the 1.5°C increase that was needed to have us at least maintain our planet.
Others can express that idea far more artfully than I can. This is from the United Nations:
> **The first 12-month period to exceed 1.5 °C as an average** was February 2023 - January 2024, boosted by El Niño, when the average temperature worldwide was estimated to be 1.52°C higher than 1850-1900, according to one scientific dataset ([Copernicus Climate Change Service](https://substack.com/redirect/f7077fa3-73ef-401b-adc6-9943cd18d565?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). The likelihood of the annual average global temperature exceeding 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels for at least one year over the coming five years has increased significantly since 2015, when it was close to zero ([WMO](https://substack.com/redirect/be148030-043e-41ea-97ba-ff98d48a6152?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). Source: [United Nations: Climate Action](https://substack.com/redirect/24bf4fe2-2395-42d4-80db-9ac955a3b1a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Why 1.5°C? According to climate scientists that is simply a defense line.
This is from Jennifer Chu, with MIT News:
> The treaty was informed by a fact-finding report which concluded that, even global warming of 1.5 degrees Celsius above the preindustrial average, over an extended, decades-long period, would lead to high risks for "some regions and vulnerable ecosystems." The recommendation then, was to set the 1.5 degrees Celsius limit as a "defense line" -- if the world can keep below this line, it potentially could avoid the more extreme and irreversible climate effects that would occur with a 2 degrees Celsius increase, and for some places, an even smaller increase than that.
> But, as many regions are experiencing today, keeping below the 1.5 line is no guarantee of avoiding extreme, global warming effects.
> "There is nothing magical about the 1.5 number, other than that is an agreed aspirational target. Keeping at 1.4 is better than 1.5, and 1.3 is better than 1.4, and so on," says Sergey Paltsev, deputy director of MIT's Joint Program on the Science and Policy of Global Change. "The science does not tell us that if, for example, the temperature increase is 1.51 degrees Celsius, then it would definitely be the end of the world. Similarly, if the temperature would stay at 1.49 degrees increase, it does not mean that we will eliminate all impacts of climate change. What is known: The lower the target for an increase in temperature, the lower the risks of climate impacts." Source: [MIT News](https://substack.com/redirect/bc741990-485d-4ce3-9b80-5d9203d844a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
With NY-21's current Representative Elise Stefanik scheduled for her Senate confirmation hearing on January 21, 2025 to be our nation's UN Ambassador, I don't hold out much hope that we will have an advocate eagerly working on our planet's behalf behind-the-scenes.
Ahead of Stefanik's hearings, there is [much speculation](https://substack.com/redirect/bc741990-485d-4ce3-9b80-5d9203d844a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the line of questioning will focus on Trump's saber-rattling over the Panama Canal, Ukraine, Denmark, and Canada. In other words, there doesn't seem to be much concern for the significance of Trump's "drill baby drill" approach to the planet.
I'm worried about democracy. I'm horrified at Elon Musk's nazi-esque gesture. I'm of course attuned to the fine details of securing the nomination for the Special Election when Stefanik resigns.
Mostly, at this moment, I am deeply worried about our planet. Time is running out.

To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

name: Working Families Party
subject: MASS CALL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
This fight belongs to all of us, and it’s going to take all of us to win. | | | Peter, We’ve reached Donald Trump’s second Inauguration Day. It's a day that we've dreaded. But importantly, Peter, it's also a day that _we've prepared for._ We’ve built Working Families Party chapters in 13 states, elected WFP champions in 24 states, and recruited members in all 50 who are ready to fight for working families — and fight back against every cruel, selfish, and pro-billionaire policy this administration will try to throw at us. **It’s not going to be easy, but we’re going to win. Here’s why:** We fight from a place of hope, not hate. We ground ourselves in solidarity, not cynicism. We refuse to give up. We may feel sadness or fear, but we will not surrender to it. And we are never, ever fighting alone. **We’re inviting you to join the WFP community across the country for a mass call this Thursday, January 23 at 8 PM ET/5 PM PT.** On the call, WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell and special guests will help show our path to building power for the multiracial working class starting now and for the next four years — and blocking the plans of Trump, Vance, and their CEO friends. **[Will you join us? Click here to RSVP for the mass call now.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxwneR9YUH85oX6XyKoEwATL_hbR3LKU0fNB3u-IwAuIwAfuclmRq8aUOYl8ga2Kf9uQ7Wuq3TkC79HcCYPAL0t5RrVmSkvJ1efT7XRKu-s9ISAtdFLB4IcZ3xCXF2gdN0r8wiZ2qsBKgJfjZ0i7n4-so7Yz-jq7kKFeUui8E-x3z_7Dsj_cjt5V3khW65ghrilq0gWcYrx-DqnbQfbMZlbw/4dc/i3NyFWFqRO62L3JFb_yUoQ/h0/h001.KwEyM2yQut38fwXfHRGK9l9PMb5HwUGomJsjz-bMNyM)** **[Join the mass call](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxwneR9YUH85oX6XyKoEwATL_hbR3LKU0fNB3u-IwAuIwAfuclmRq8aUOYl8ga2Kf9nQQT-trWNOD4LEzwZmG8LKWnmDhgJW_yvufNxXnWOzK2zT6O9nbidylbRfr2C8NJo07jDMXQ6ooYUhX6X2wn0W32qTAJ7FlkH4EWCBFP7uxwPsqY1muGvo-vP0rYSRP63rI-UrRZIhNJrhbJmDC9ug/4dc/i3NyFWFqRO62L3JFb_yUoQ/h1/h001.KKhoV-eZxmWH4zpsPzntRyEdksREueaIKfiu4uPxs90)** This fight belongs to all of us, and it’s going to take all of us to win. Thank you for being a part of our movement. In solidarity, Working Families Party [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.v92pwawuJ-Tgw-w_8VW1ElMyH8C6LbUDEH0XQJy4D17uiDmBV9LEthw1OrnOMlez9H9_vmZXW_jI6R7i6KFgs-Z-v9QG5xSquX4xZKq0XbKNv5ForO-2kjtLvDfVD7A_bTgFINK0ynWKHnUg4d6N0DfzL1Xp_-iE9w_HJFTUCJDwINfDZBoKVQrVNrR2MIpbe2fq16WGgvOEIOeLErCa0TUcPrA-uz9sPAyffbKLD9E/4dc/i3NyFWFqRO62L3JFb_yUoQ/h2/h001.794PoaC4Q29TmR_csWpqXE9SvQVUFLDBVEBUJ_6fmkA) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.SEgofQhSb9pGg8bz5XQG3Qavg2v3du-P2-GHdERcbMNRq6NzmGzHx6lXMAu9obs-sCeEAKgLPw05n_C3rEUAzsAnI0KpXHyV2DTZJaKXqngt5ioa_seX07eaHJPPCQKPs8xoNdBAVIrMzfLllkfvDS6uU5FDbN4zJM3rA2d9nIGQ0k3EO2f570dzcQiXYAqx3OUi6ayVoEhoZWx8UDkkMPLaJKr9yDxots_Y9p7Pbfw/4dc/i3NyFWFqRO62L3JFb_yUoQ/h3/h001.b2l9qRTmZo-l-DCS6jguF3Hc4OsSaH63BGRdCcx1jDY) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg44Y70vF8LFR5ql1INGTAXhZp_zaxihZhNjSeO3wKbwLrmh06rEjal_EWsI-aQPIHEeWMuJiB0aQkNV_k436j5DhkmtsLEoA1QkOC-0rjKe-gxuUwy7hxMaFT_AtivAI-mU5FuZh2vQofiLyaIKkC776AQk51c9aW4yGBXpqo7e85aFFmJureRc-pWaKbXqGfb8/4dc/i3NyFWFqRO62L3JFb_yUoQ/h4/h001.IJ8Smt-dMuJ8k7aHceiQUWvR2RZfqWOTjqq_Jr9mdJU) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbIvvjDs0FRfdw8dGstpg8GRLmllBfnbhLYAC7-ewGB8yepP4vfDJf58yPjI5W-rCjl-p2rCHEh7NONbaCpgkYp1XI3YJ4sTNGk9-T1o_wENOzIIBSuHsdPWLV1e0Z7IC_T8iG4ryQEXX-7aHFCW4zfv57DCPzD3peCL6f5RBGU_DumNuuPnGZJoagxeVsgT6HB0AZhqVbsTrRPnUsDP-F2UTEr_kbbbMNN2zmiwJWCM/4dc/i3NyFWFqRO62L3JFb_yUoQ/h5/h001.vfoY9vcOeFI5K5QpmDq6op2AHohxmrnN_t5CVgJo8Wo) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMeQLxUWtV0SUVSHSIn96lDQ0v93uw0MUZzPt60ZgrItc3khA9BTosVFFxx8Xb7A7lrT89gd-U3nbyUN_EQwJ0hHTFGSjdaeevC3p57jfTX0O3dzIqBzjVre9UJ-thntpcvUIX2aJU-NVkLcKQuXy5qZ61frJCMFVb2KqUEUplXhXu-fciv1nPnzQcUGSkdyjH-OgWGx91_YLSZverrIT5_8/4dc/i3NyFWFqRO62L3JFb_yUoQ/h6/h001.Kq224BgtJmpKzJd2zmyqJlhjbA1nVnj8n-SzlWemIWc) Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, **[sign up here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYd6eLP33O2GRZpvuK-wGuT7xs23Z7NaivFRLcaa6z_OjEhJ86nVN_4ctiWAZrgdIR0tXG8GytUZoqBzrXEHg3sDielQQkOW_JHQfUKRDrlxl2V2IHsPVx82TsH1Iu_xF4VODpUxnyXwkt9ybs2s_8uT9ZpqAgrnmtR6RR8__uINo4Ubtvw9DBZgeMUEkAWJeSYN9PKO16F0DpA5hfChrK9Y5x1NR3wz3Kly9iFokEYo/4dc/i3NyFWFqRO62L3JFb_yUoQ/h7/h001.5M6kx19-JOmSpp_4sgBLoSEIBhrhyk7QMGEpymKB5tY)** The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? **[Click here to check out our website.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYd6eLP33O2GRZpvuK-wGuTgikm1o7fj2eYRGtAjcsE66CTYJHOwCWYC690-ZySGdwO4sYh3_JCoIkp-26E9CeuN2wsIDdiNgCCWidVQqswPCUhFMXbmEkRKlQIAJ0kJtBYcMtogTX8sFFcCarQXy4h1agsN5y7xAYnnuZqX8QWo3IBabBEGrarHC3VNulRoTJN-Yn3KLtOSoVn-KNplL3I/4dc/i3NyFWFqRO62L3JFb_yUoQ/h8/h001.KJrBUAADt35AukCrhnOUqIn-tzwC4mmTam4pXHfsDHM)** And if you need to update your contact information, **[you can do so here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJ4EB8r41sEQcJGw3JyLfIpJOT9SjNCmke0ZqmwsrJI-Z7kstQf1ARppuibdFC5FEmmyALknYa1X-hD2FGGCRR6SzxFZxnpSeqTLlKgKEVuQPHzYqaJjihtMtiCkA3eMo9uTF8FrV08PNAUmkpC5gXov8rg1XVrt88h6zKEgSG2yh7xgkMycMdcOMZSuOnV7iUCGNCY6nCgKi4FwB8VnWoKlkRER0KdrdURhJHcaaX-Mp46M2K_OQZK28BidTXpDRI/4dc/i3NyFWFqRO62L3JFb_yUoQ/h9/h001.6h9QyxRcTCRgw1el_zeO38KCB_bcNjSqlFeiWVa4GFE)** Other political groups have corporate donors. name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison for doing his job
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ce132a7fde9d4c72b993b8a1b1c45546&_e=xVfUeQbqzjkMs5Kco4r8UDSKooJmyWYDzr-sde0sKMXblUyk2JTeGuqjALubqUBGjwN0kzKwGZK0H7NAeRT2la2By4Ghir6wj7xSWVCLVkT5_3qCQzz2ul9UcpZdcoYZcq0x0t99kQhRlFV02JqMwJXh5nR_1EMw06r4UV8VAmqAUkRqztfVfkzqgQlAh4zVUPi7XilqfUbHorqy-n-nrD5SO5KWBfCbDKLByYiUls5sFgc_cX3BuBN9RxfNm8njP5EuHUad7gNwBDpEaccJXQaQ4Ian8eqALqmevXUQbVJIPtI2lswnfojjWQPRRd8cOespQM4XiGCr_29FsgBzTnINpb6cpreP56p8pD3Pp-49wmAVkYbokuyFHPFHZq3HBOzFTyWMJFO0dTUj3lAhuw%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ce132a7fde9d4c72b993b8a1b1c45546&_e=xVfUeQbqzjkMs5Kco4r8UDSKooJmyWYDzr-sde0sKMXblUyk2JTeGuqjALubqUBGjwN0kzKwGZK0H7NAeRT2la2By4Ghir6wj7xSWVCLVkT5_3qCQzz2ul9UcpZdcoYZcq0x0t99kQhRlFV02JqMwJXh5nR_1EMw06r4UV8VAmqAUkRqztfVfkzqgQlAh4zVUPi7XilqfUbHorqy-n-nrD5SO5KWBfCbDKLByYiUls4pJEPIWFSBQNm5egDMU9DhBA9cPS60iKfSt-ya7n0QLPv9k11EgCbA-zfW-9BnR0a5VhznmXJ1EUVnOya9mg6NkBj3KqmSEsjfTvXs1pYtoplxWpb7ClkGcCu2eHc1luHdDKJyqVT1Vg-VQF0Civ-dhD0S7hx0fMhNJO5lY7n5mg%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ce132a7fde9d4c72b993b8a1b1c45546&_e=xVfUeQbqzjkMs5Kco4r8UDSKooJmyWYDzr-sde0sKMXblUyk2JTeGuqjALubqUBGjwN0kzKwGZK0H7NAeRT2la2By4Ghir6wj7xSWVCLVkT5_3qCQzz2ul9UcpZdcoYZcq0x0t99kQhRlFV02JqMwJXh5nR_1EMw06r4UV8VAmqAUkRqztfVfkzqgQlAh4zVUPi7XilqfUbHorqy-n-nrD5SO5KWBfCbDKLByYiUls6kbPdKDbrjeDPDz8vrdnJ-pbIN3f_pdn_eY8vWYLKlWzrsQ4DU-laZv9jfqKoT6v7yo-MRZEKOqKOuztkClopMWn1xNf6JKq8RO2kHNTYCrDROokBzAuGIbzsMkLtngZABqbeacxMY_wYkHrHshldEE-CFAjQU330Ac5q_udSvDg%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ce132a7fde9d4c72b993b8a1b1c45546&_e=xVfUeQbqzjkMs5Kco4r8UDSKooJmyWYDzr-sde0sKMXblUyk2JTeGuqjALubqUBGjwN0kzKwGZK0H7NAeRT2la2By4Ghir6wj7xSWVCLVkT5_3qCQzz2ul9UcpZdcoYZcq0x0t99kQhRlFV02JqMwJXh5nR_1EMw06r4UV8VAmqAUkRqztfVfkzqgQlAh4zVUPi7XilqfUbHorqy-n-nrD5SO5KWBfCbDKLByYiUls4WngrYkLPlukHsklxxlhrsUlKO0irD37XWM8pWvKFER6fpHFB0O7Iavj7dydHaj1-ICJiRvF1-o8Pm5jvU1DxYSA_pPGCwZcBFKOmMlkphZdOMt-hceqZhpvCNfzk1cWC5jApwTZAfV2Pk3zSUm4lhFolR9r53WNBAY7dXr32eLg%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ce132a7fde9d4c72b993b8a1b1c45546&_e=xVfUeQbqzjkMs5Kco4r8UDSKooJmyWYDzr-sde0sKMXblUyk2JTeGuqjALubqUBGjwN0kzKwGZK0H7NAeRT2la2By4Ghir6wj7xSWVCLVkT5_3qCQzz2ul9UcpZdcoYZcq0x0t99kQhRlFV02JqMwJXh5nR_1EMw06r4UV8VAmqAUkRqztfVfkzqgQlAh4zVUPi7XilqfUbHorqy-n-nrD5SO5KWBfCbDKLByYiUls4Td9JDbAt42s6Fc0qm1Qc2oTApaOXeiwGHpeX0gnsrj9jlijVTZjiRb0iSVg3w5z-yqw69SfyrNbGwZp_I1FJZVwaT8nM9heybiMiw7pGT-tYpxgRUZq5-BWCwS0fqgxLMranU_GgN0E2fA9T1mtcEId-RbOj4NKBQnogZ1v-15A%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ce132a7fde9d4c72b993b8a1b1c45546&_e=xVfUeQbqzjkMs5Kco4r8UDSKooJmyWYDzr-sde0sKMXblUyk2JTeGuqjALubqUBGjwN0kzKwGZK0H7NAeRT2la2By4Ghir6wj7xSWVCLVkT5_3qCQzz2ul9UcpZdcoYZcq0x0t99kQhRlFV02JqMwJXh5nR_1EMw06r4UV8VAmqAUkRqztfVfkzqgQlAh4zVUPi7XilqfUbHorqy-n-nrD5SO5KWBfCbDKLByYiUls6ywfowou9X-3OqqKI_R-MqvHFJCEghMc4WafEoL49zY_g99z7m6mrcQVCnZniCS_mgIobcK4MfdkMpz-NsRA9Nnb_YgHbTNBM5RxVIZGWYSHGZKusLUDssMycy7b-lcpXyIa-XKfSic0Bo_0ryaEsV89biFaS2T-290AAEO92cfg%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. clean_body: My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. Dear Fellow American, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him. Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. – but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! Hi friends,
Donald Trump just took the oath of office to become our country’s 47th president.
I know many of us are feeling deep disappointment today and apprehension about the coming years. We worked tirelessly for a different result, but as a democratic republic, we respect and accept the will of the people — whether we end up on the winning or losing side.
My top priority has always been improving the lives of everyday Coloradans. I will work in good faith with anyone who wants to strengthen Colorado and uplift our working families.
Today, we also remember Martin Luther King Jr.’s legacy of fighting for civil rights, peace, and equality. As I reflect on MLK Jr.’s life, I also stand ready to fight against those who try to take away our hard-won rights and fundamental freedoms.
Over these next four years, we will continue to stand up for justice and equality together.
Through it all, I'll need your support. You can be part of this team by chipping in now, friend. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=X_012025_mlkandinaugurationday_act&nvep=&hmac=]
Be well,
Michael Bennet

Pete is going to get his hearing before the Senate Armed Services Committee, not a sham hearing before the American media. They can't go after President Trump and me. We already beat them in a landslide! That's why they've focused their efforts on attacking a proud veteran like Pete Hegseth. We need to know that every Democrat in your state stands with Jack Smith – if he doesn’t get enough support, his case against Trump could TOTALLY COLLAPSE.

| | Peter,

As you may have noticed, Donald Trump’s inauguration for his second term as President happened to fall on Martin Luther King Jr. Day. Someone who has undermined equal justice under the law was sworn into office as President of the United States on a day for celebrating someone who was resolutely committed to that principle.

The incongruity is striking. But it’s also good to be reminded today of the example set by Dr. King.

Martin Luther King Jr. didn’t just _support_ equal justice under the law. He took action.

And he helped change the course of American history.

With Donald Trump in office as President, we face real challenges. But we must remain engaged. We must continue standing up for our values. And we must keep working to make progress.

Thank you,

Josh

* * *
---

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl7ugq5j1dpa172jr84ruf8oau9sc22adnigd6m0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0o31cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn3vtfkelci5hb32loqhm2jlt367s2ak21rgtdn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0o31cph2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znl4ceu8pkkb1cpnc7obmeboi6947phm0661ihp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0o31cph2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvqghivu473fl1gbeu7jbnnigffvhu8u4nhj3av0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0o31cph2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdas7a4v3a37mv624iite02jantc9ae7t03vbkfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0o31cph2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4sn0fmoqjo70q4pnee4anbfjh53qoi6c4p4j8pg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0o31cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

subject: I’m not easily scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
But there’s one thing that keeps me up at night

| | | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zkkrlu4up96h9aknubc0ik2j3jsmib788jvbp9k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0o36cph2bs)

|
---
This is President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House, Byron Donalds.
I grew up in Brooklyn, New York, raised by a single mother who sacrificed everything for me and my siblings.
I’ve had _**thick skin**_ from a young age - so if it’s a radical-left news anchor trying to gaslight me for being an unapologetic Black MAGA Patriot, or House Democrats going low with pathetic slurs, I’ll never take my foot off the gas until the fight is won.
I take that to heart even today as I continue the fight for the MAGA Movement, _**and I do it ALL for you**_.
Look, I’m not easily frightened, **but Democrats retaking the House Majority keeps me up at night.**
They’ve already begun building a war chest to sweep-up vulnerable Seats that they lost by a fraction of a percent, and MAGA Congressmembers are the **FIRST** on their target list.
They know if we lose our Majority - President Trump’s America First Agenda WILL come to a screeching halt.
I’m fighting for the _MAGA House Majority_ every single day, but the only way I can continue my efforts is through the support of folks just like you.
With the attacks from the radical-left, Fake News, and Democrats ratcheting up, I’ve never needed your support more.
_**[So I’m humbly asking, can you chip in today to help me keep Congress Red?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zlsj5gm780gr5uvhnnip2dnurhqe08icehb7c0p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0o36cph2bs)**_ _****__****_

Byron Donalds

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuaf7ds3bklpj0m7pibfqkfqfuuihgfu1jdlisc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0p72cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc9l8q111hmse763bsol2mllqqp5lgq7mbd08s60_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0p72cjh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl45bmuei6t7von4q3r9vu4po3fhdm6jgatf5af8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0p72cjh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpagr1sr1p30icsa3q4e5e0c4n06nnugkepvd5cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0p72cjh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp15k8o9ogqm7om01499s545re0mb4jo75b38h4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0p72cjh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zinkmvvc34o2op7fsd5mrjbc4mggfk6slpq708jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5im0p72cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

clean_body: Today we celebrate President Trump’s Historic Return to the White House. | | | | | | Friend, today is a historic day for our nation. President Donald J. Trump has officially been inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States, marking the beginning of a new chapter filled with hope, strength, and opportunity for the American people. | | | | This isn’t just a moment of victory for President Trump – it’s a victory for every grassroots supporter who stood up, spoke out, and fought to protect the values that make our country great. Today is the start of turning the tide and building a brighter future for generations to come. As we look toward the future. We are dedicated to ensuring that this momentum reaches every corner of our state – strengthening our movement and creating lasting change in Oregon. Every dollar we raise helps us to stand strong for conservative values and fight for a better Oregon and America. | | | | | | | | Thank you for your dedication to this movement, Oregon GOP | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We are dedicated to promoting conservative values, protecting individual freedoms, and building a prosperous future for all Oregonians. From state and local governments to the federal level, we are fighting for a better Oregon – defending parental rights, reducing taxes, ensuring safe communities, and standing against government overreach. Join us in our mission to uphold the principles that make our state and nation strong. >>> | | | | | | | | | | | Stay up to date with the latest campaign updates and Oregon news by following us on social media! | | | | | | | | | | The fight for Oregon isn’t over – together, we can make 2025 a year of progress and renewal for our state! ---
Dear Patriot,
Are you ready to make a bold statement and celebrate a monumental moment in American history? We've got just the thing to help you do exactly that!
Introducing the [**American Flag Leatherette Patch Hat**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19930/6374453/3c8cb6ce8271e4a8fd2de8230a838f64605f69d5/76d06ff441ed1d92c96ec0c8a8555608afe393d3), a stunning tribute to President Trump's extraordinary return to the White House. This isn't just any hat—it's a symbol of pride and victory, commemorating Trump as the 45th and 47th President of the United States.
**Features of the American Flag Leatherette Patch Hat:**
* **Elegant Embroidery:** The numbers 45 & 47 are beautifully stitched, marking the historic presidency and re-election of a true American leader.
* **Stylish and Patriotic Design:** The sleek leatherette patch pairs perfectly with the American flag, making it not just a hat, but a piece of history.
* **Proudly Made in the USA:** Wear it with pride, knowing it's crafted on American soil, supporting American jobs.

This hat is more than just headwear—it's a keepsake for anyone who cherishes freedom and leadership. It's perfect for wearing at rallies, displaying in your home, or giving as a gift to fellow supporters.
Don't miss out on owning a piece of this historic inauguration. Stock is limited, and they’re flying off the shelves!
**P.S.** Act fast—these exclusive hats are a hit and won’t last long. Secure yours today and be part of the celebration!

# **[How a Texas court ruling could crush the left's ESG agenda](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9NDY3MjcifQ/wBciTEs-f70XBA9q7cYdeQ)**
---

# **[President Trump's New Golden Age](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
He has won a famous victory, but a note of humility is in order.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)

Portugal, Spain, the Netherlands, France, Britainâeach dominated the global financial system for about 80 to 100 years before crumbling into economic irrelevance.

The U.S. dollar has now reached the end of that cycle, and BRICSâthe powerful alliance of Brazil, Russia, India, China, and South Africaâis ready to pull the trigger on the dollarâs downfall.

The BRICS Digital Currency: The Silent Assassin

BRICS is actively pushing for a new digital currency designed to bypass the U.S. dollar entirely.

Central banks around the world are piling up gold and other currencies at a record pace, while the U.S. dollarâs share of global reserves has plunged to a 30-year low.

Imagine waking up one day to find that the dollar isnât the worldâs dominant currency anymore.

Without its reserve status, the value of the dollar could collapse, leading to skyrocketing inflation, wiped-out savings, and a stock market crash of unprecedented proportions.

A Perfect Storm for Economic Disaster

Even former President Donald Trump has floated the idea of devaluing the dollar to boost U.S. exports.

But devaluation means one thing: the dollar in your pocket, your retirement savings, and your investments will all be worth less. Combine that with the BRICS nations abandoning the dollar, and we have a recipe for total economic collapse.

When the dollar loses its status as the worldâs reserve currency, demand for U.S. assets will plummet.

The Federal Reserve will be powerless to stop the ensuing chaos. Your stocks, your retirement accounts, your carefully saved nest eggâall could be obliterated in the fallout.

Warning: BRICS Digital Currency Could Obliterate Your SavingsâDownload Your Free Guide (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueaidIteknop5I3ITm66hubqp&s=KJLIBHHDCKCIFLFM&req=l%3DD0I2xueai5Iteknop5I3ITm66hubqp%26s%3DLLNGEPIIPEPMAAOF

Donât Be a VictimâProtect Your Wealth NOW

If you want to protect your savings, your investments, and your future, you need to act NOW. Gold and silver have stood the test of time for over 5,000 years. They are immune to currency devaluation, immune to the whims of governments, and immune to geopolitical chaos.

When currencies fail, gold and silver soar.

In every financial crisis, precious metals have been the ultimate safe haven.

While the dollar collapses, the value of gold and silver will rise, preserving your wealth and ensuring that you can live out your retirement with dignity.

The U.S. Dollarâs Final Days: Secure Your Wealth with This Free Guide (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueaidIteknop5I4ITm66hubqp&s=KJLIBHHDCKCIFLFM&req=l%3DD0I2xueai5Iteknop5I4ITm66hubqp%26s%3DLLNGEPIIPEPMAAOF

Donât Wait Until Itâs Too Late

This isnât fearmongeringâthis is history repeating itself. Reserve currencies fall. Economies collapse. But those who hold gold and silver endure.

Protect your savings today beforze BRICS pulls the final trigger on the U.S. dollar.

Remember: If you donât prepare, you become a victim. Act now to safeguard your retirement and secure your future.

# **Trump Boosts Gold! Don’t Miss YOUR Chance...**

| | |
---
|
---
| | The recent election has created massive uncertainty in the financial markets. Historically, during times like these, **gold prices have surged** , protecting investors from market crashes and economic instability.
During President Trump’s last term, gold skyrocketed from **$1,200 to over $2,000 per ounce**. With similar policies and conditions emerging, we could be on the brink of another gold rush — but only for those who act fast.

#### **🚨 The Risks of Waiting:**
* Economic shifts could **erode the value of your retirement savings**.
* Stock market volatility could leave your assets exposed to massive losses.
* Inflation may continue to soar, reducing the purchasing power of your hard-earned money.

**Can you afford to leave your financial future to chance?** **
**
#### **Why Gold Is Your Safe Haven:**
* **Proven Stability:** Gold has been the ultimate store of value for centuries.
* **Crisis-Proof:** While markets crash, gold retains and grows its worth.
* **Accessible Investment:** If you have $10,000 or more in a retirement account, converting to a Gold IRA is easier than you think.

#### **⚠️ Don’t Miss This Window of Opportunity**

Gold prices are already rising, and waiting could mean missing out on potential gains. Protect your wealth _before it’s too late_. **
**

**
**The sooner you start building your gold-backed retirement portfolio, the more secure your financial future will be. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be474acce932465dad07c695f2f0edff&_e=F-sAxKX6XE2s5GV5IB8YMmY9MfWMJBgNlM5F0O4UjKYtSENNVRXsfGMunAv28iqPYcJAnRN2tiPuMWMgirQULF5Y51XXmWqfx2Qq4R0ryNW433zMz0iQicSe5-foyGcbM1_4pzMXaIGX-AcjgmyuNXpJWWl_-UnCXdT-v7kDOj8nnZsAwdwGd2h5T8gIuoj7E0J2nu4dEloBDrW_rwB_ORXbVAmGs5mF9E9-miL6u81zI9cZ8xe6pNSaFPPm8GH6HKMF0P6DHlTgaIDIGG83OvHTNOBK-2kHIUz9ulDJvKfSzyKnUbIRiJFQj_wEIbFXQrDRPjHGY5Wuhj75P7AVp4xZC1SFlAQamngaCyMqX832BwFih5spNTaPjBi6ZW5vbIMDQcxKD_N25K6CM9D-qXyL-_UnvWyFpThMQxT6Q9mbwsqqUiwPKGUE22x1wsBg) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be474acce932465dad07c695f2f0edff&_e=F-sAxKX6XE2s5GV5IB8YMmY9MfWMJBgNlM5F0O4UjKYtSENNVRXsfGMunAv28iqPYcJAnRN2tiPuMWMgirQULF5Y51XXmWqfx2Qq4R0ryNW433zMz0iQicSe5-foyGcbM1_4pzMXaIGX-AcjgmyuNXpJWWl_-UnCXdT-v7kDOj8nnZsAwdwGd2h5T8gIuoj7E0J2nu4dEloBDrW_rwB_ORXbVAmGs5mF9E9-miL6u81zI9cZ8xe6pNSaFPPm8GH6HKMF0P6DHlTgaIDIGG83OvHTNOBK-2kHIUz9ulDJvKezzuPjiGNqs1i3bioFdwmHo0nVrJZl1popThLAWqYcXXDAs3QFqUYEoKq8p0hazYnXTIa8EPZrYQUGw5BV39R2DwkbK6h1EzgLJl_Eme4YooAx7p8OBCi4PHVvBSAxsqYgocd0AybM7J7ZWDQTfUx4)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be474acce932465dad07c695f2f0edff&_e=F-sAxKX6XE2s5GV5IB8YMmY9MfWMJBgNlM5F0O4UjKYtSENNVRXsfGMunAv28iqPYcJAnRN2tiPuMWMgirQULF5Y51XXmWqfx2Qq4R0ryNW433zMz0iQicSe5-foyGcbM1_4pzMXaIGX-AcjgmyuNXpJWWl_-UnCXdT-v7kDOj8nnZsAwdwGd2h5T8gIuoj7E0J2nu4dEloBDrW_rwB_ORXbVAmGs5mF9E9-miL6u81zI9cZ8xe6pNSaFPPm8GH6HKMF0P6DHlTgaIDIGG83OvHTNOBK-2kHIUz9ulDJvKd9y4iHmGQVwvAUh78VR8TVeHdPHNNXEto25F1GfqX1MWpwO_K8qZt_pJZnixfayx4CQ1WozsRf2YCjhTG9aZFa8zdgG4clKDT9oZD2DixeyKexY2vShzWnlqn0XGRTScLF51MVMuPVppeqwbbPgGL_),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be474acce932465dad07c695f2f0edff&_e=F-sAxKX6XE2s5GV5IB8YMmY9MfWMJBgNlM5F0O4UjKYtSENNVRXsfGMunAv28iqPYcJAnRN2tiPuMWMgirQULF5Y51XXmWqfx2Qq4R0ryNW433zMz0iQicSe5-foyGcbM1_4pzMXaIGX-AcjgmyuNXpJWWl_-UnCXdT-v7kDOj8nnZsAwdwGd2h5T8gIuoj7E0J2nu4dEloBDrW_rwB_ORXbVAmGs5mF9E9-miL6u81zI9cZ8xe6pNSaFPPm8GH6HKMF0P6DHlTgaIDIGG83OvHTNOBK-2kHIUz9ulDJvKe84lUvNAiqc8hkoxYR7m-pHWYFUA5gHLaKCy3_gcVDUZJVSAptV-5P2tupikqbHawIDzQ50Ne_jC54oECTLqUOssdZ4liRh3EOpFdTXP31zLXjL3-i4QzzMYNHoJ_8XVZwc25ilIPmoBcz0sky8ALO) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be474acce932465dad07c695f2f0edff&_e=F-sAxKX6XE2s5GV5IB8YMmY9MfWMJBgNlM5F0O4UjKYtSENNVRXsfGMunAv28iqPYcJAnRN2tiPuMWMgirQULF5Y51XXmWqfx2Qq4R0ryNW433zMz0iQicSe5-foyGcbM1_4pzMXaIGX-AcjgmyuNXpJWWl_-UnCXdT-v7kDOj8nnZsAwdwGd2h5T8gIuoj7E0J2nu4dEloBDrW_rwB_ORXbVAmGs5mF9E9-miL6u81zI9cZ8xe6pNSaFPPm8GH6HKMF0P6DHlTgaIDIGG83OvHTNOBK-2kHIUz9ulDJvKe5SRsXaMQfFz5N4co7BGvgCQm3lNmqL673MRr15iPtFyUFp5v9zXhVh9cIIiNP28IEkbNgUEi9XLrYU-pIY0CibCGj_T5AC-YJzfRABrDkUjfPTv3C7j-StTBweci0A_MHjCnDppAXXoSLCdUXJfu2)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be474acce932465dad07c695f2f0edff&_e=F-sAxKX6XE2s5GV5IB8YMmY9MfWMJBgNlM5F0O4UjKYtSENNVRXsfGMunAv28iqPYcJAnRN2tiPuMWMgirQULF5Y51XXmWqfx2Qq4R0ryNW433zMz0iQicSe5-foyGcbM1_4pzMXaIGX-AcjgmyuNXpJWWl_-UnCXdT-v7kDOj8nnZsAwdwGd2h5T8gIuoj7E0J2nu4dEloBDrW_rwB_ORXbVAmGs5mF9E9-miL6u81zI9cZ8xe6pNSaFPPm8GH6HKMF0P6DHlTgaIDIGG83OvHTNOBK-2kHIUz9ulDJvKcAgIkc9LYHx6SF0eGoAIUFMnmPxYBQuDSSiptzGGY_VPhjjh_Ts5men1CwBw4r7r_9T7tkgeTiONFbBLaIZkUFlvZv_0JHP7iXt_vJRNBs1JcOXPHby0MnMXKEAsDadvwAs1es0ivwHu3B2gAvO9I8) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
I’d be honored to have your support

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._Sd_63NNC09bA)
---
Peter, it's Troy Downing. I’ve spent my entire life fighting for America - from overseas in Afghanistan to at home as Montana State Auditor and now a Congressman.

I’ve always had a strong sense of public service, which led me to join the Air Force after 9/11 and inspired me to run for office. _**But being in Congress will be a new challenge I can’t take on alone. **_

[**Peter, will you take a moment to read my story and chip in to help me in my first months in Congress?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-ljROoLVjlcTT8wnWSIyw)

But there’s one thing that keeps me up at night

| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0abbcb5db9e94be299002d2a52c07557&_e=GjWs3NfMxlspm7HNe3C_OvX-1TcMj3SrnO5-G92BdezKo1hhqauX_-Xtj5E77ErPBsGJErwJayBZwWd0gus2L4vyKll7UHJRJ5bEuulER8Y_zvZuR2OhwzOXUtVr0r7Pn0mPia1Qxx7ckNyrcUt0X40C3vHpc7DhhbKJoCj7UZfkrUPEdE0L1oDzc5DvKgWAAXFqfloolfy6YbMSdhqT7mM8Oj6poeSm8mzyIYHw6P7VbqfUO3w9Vu4kUHulDKK0rvJZKS4gpKg7UrTB5OLuW9G1nWg3agFMoNaF8xpFbD0%3D)

|
---
This is President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House, Byron Donalds.
I grew up in Brooklyn, New York, raised by a single mother who sacrificed everything for me and my siblings.
I’ve had _**thick skin**_ from a young age - so if it’s a radical-left news anchor trying to gaslight me for being an unapologetic Black MAGA Patriot, or House Democrats going low with pathetic slurs, I’ll never take my foot off the gas until the fight is won.
I take that to heart even today as I continue the fight for the MAGA Movement, _**and I do it ALL for you**_.
Look, I’m not easily frightened, **but Democrats retaking the House Majority keeps me up at night.**
They’ve already begun building a war chest to sweep-up vulnerable Seats that they lost by a fraction of a percent, and MAGA Congressmembers are the **FIRST** on their target list.
They know if we lose our Majority - President Trump’s America First Agenda WILL come to a screeching halt.
I’m fighting for the _MAGA House Majority_ every single day, but the only way I can continue my efforts is through the support of folks just like you.
With the attacks from the radical-left, Fake News, and Democrats ratcheting up, I’ve never needed your support more.
_**[So I’m humbly asking, can you chip in today to help me keep Congress Red?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0abbcb5db9e94be299002d2a52c07557&_e=GjWs3NfMxlspm7HNe3C_OvX-1TcMj3SrnO5-G92BdezKo1hhqauX_-Xtj5E77ErPBsGJErwJayBZwWd0gus2L4vyKll7UHJRJ5bEuulER8Y_zvZuR2OhwzOXUtVr0r7PTNWW-QGPTw9hG3L80V8vJzMMwDtDCHUdN_hpgRPYj26_K0ibxJIbRteDJFKr4h-BzAC1OTPS5WdQojFcMAgPBnBHX3kyknOVeE2OtTwfDgVO9TogIVZRfj8ecq9GMKaW7PlPUUu2-BpjLwkkCao_7jSpAl6CMGmCeaQ9aB-3BAk%3D)**_ _****__****_

|

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q8a5xX5-frB0djNngzjFqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpchMgP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTIxVwNzcGNCCmeOynuPZ--5CHJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q8a5xX5-frB0djNngzjFqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpchMgP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTIxVwNzcGNCCmeOynuPZ--5CHJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q8a5xX5-frB0djNngzjFqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpchMgP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTIxVwNzcGNCCmeOynuPZ--5CHJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q8a5xX5-frB0djNngzjFqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpchMgP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTIxVwNzcGNCCmeOynuPZ--5CHJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q8a5xX5-frB0djNngzjFqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpchMgP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTIxVwNzcGNCCmeOynuPZ--5CHJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q8a5xX5-frB0djNngzjFqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpchMgP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTIxVwNzcGNCCmeOynuPZ--5CHJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
