This is President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House, Byron Donalds.
I grew up in Brooklyn, New York, raised by a single mother who sacrificed everything for me and my siblings.
I’ve had _**thick skin**_ from a young age - so if it’s a radical-left news anchor trying to gaslight me for being an unapologetic Black MAGA Patriot, or House Democrats going low with pathetic slurs, I’ll never take my foot off the gas until the fight is won.
I take that to heart even today as I continue the fight for the MAGA Movement, _**and I do it ALL for you**_.
Look, I’m not easily frightened, **but Democrats retaking the House Majority keeps me up at night.**
They’ve already begun building a war chest to sweep-up vulnerable Seats that they lost by a fraction of a percent, and MAGA Congressmembers are the **FIRST** on their target list.
They know if we lose our Majority - President Trump’s America First Agenda WILL come to a screeching halt.
I’m fighting for the _MAGA House Majority_ every single day, but the only way I can continue my efforts is through the support of folks just like you.
With the attacks from the radical-left, Fake News, and Democrats ratcheting up, I’ve never needed your support more.
_**[So I’m humbly asking, can you chip in today to help me keep Congress Red?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25d8898b039642c7bb94064732b5da38&_e=yjWPjw0UZp9nCfnfVUfHQCj7ITVLnKuzWbszDyzPaJifJmSINBxyOVrYEQeri72toCfxbsf4sHUNe0Ix90Yb6YGPN1su8mOFRy5L5fxGn9k6EPa5zaIV_rVZ6r3BknV4cZisva5K8k3KoQUuSm3CWVtCykOCheStW_GCxcGiTh7_zTvH0q0JmattP2kYriUSKrUTi1Uvk3-OskNQEeIDifROySTMm8j05dNDBdjQqnzvsKFW65lci7yTdHi1-SwbBwpHEXjwevQWjEpMfRyHE25ebMuRN73M4Qro37dpMzU%3D)**_ _****__****_

name: House GOP =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=94?= via Team Scalise
subject: IT’S OFFICIAL >> Donald J. Trump is now our 47th President of the United States!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Help us show our excitement – sign our congratulations card!

| |
---
| | | **CONFIRMED: The Oath of Office has just been taken and Donald J. Trump is now our 47th President of the United States!**

We can't think of a better way to celebrate this milestone than to send our President a congratulatory card from his top supporters! _**[Will you take a minute out of your day to sign it?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmtqi2t2qhcaf6teaep9qfcinm28i39tak8fklt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5jm6pj2c5h2bs "Will you take a minute out of your day to sign it?")**_ | | [SIGN OUR CARD](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2nh4tl461sgqe8ub5b3nksdl6871bm21iai0rs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5jm6pj2c5h2bs "SIGN OUR CARD")
---
TO: President Donald J. Trump
FROM: MAGA Patriots
SUBJECT: Congratulations, Mr. President!
* * *

The moment we have all been waiting for is here - you are OFFICIALLY our 47th President!

**We could not be more excited.**

Our nation's future is suddenly much brighter and my hope has been restored. I have had faith in you since day one and I trust that you will put the American people first in everything you do.

_You have my full support, President Trump! _

I am ready to fight alongside you and be there for you when you call on me for help.

It's truly an honor, Mr. President.

_MAGA!_

**[X____________](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ziql5d6ma0ig9vc4t2dfjhpodsg0hdfcldobbk98_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5jm6pj2c5h2bs "X____________")**
---
| | [SIGN OUR CARD](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zns2253n4ipn2bvdib1sgl8hprudu1vcmqt3htv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5jm6pj2c5h2bs "SIGN OUR CARD")
---

We need to have the card ready in the next few hours to send to him - so please sign within the next 60 minutes to ensure your spot.

Thank you.

House GOP
_via Team Scalise_

| |

---
* * *
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za9cs1v86mnkibrg2fn9dl62ej13l7ifr1svog78_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5jm6pj2c5h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfo5vt8emc8a9isi8tnjmd6r3ecs6vonot3o34h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5jm6pj2c5h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi440ui5s7q9c6mavtvuscgcho969hf3t3uhav80_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5jm6pj2c5h2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_
---

---

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: New Border Policies, Buc-ee's Sues Again, and 101-Year-Old Renews License
body:
During his inaugural address Monday, President Donald Trump promised a series of executive actions to secure the border and enforce federal immigration law, marking a distinct reversal from the policies of the previous administration.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z79qwzAYBPCnkbYYfZ9kyRo0FIo3p4QG2s3I-mML5DrYSpy8fXH3bgd3_OC-ur6zKaef8WznYMozLj0yrE8MTgi9tym_ekG9GZjXQIMBxZWoNdOaTgb0wHloGIpGSYcS5NBEJbCWwoFUkSZzYAwQAFALWaFzTeOCVwGjttERwYJPZVmrMoUSnnaL-bU8wlq5ZabZTKXcNsLfCLYE233fq_F-Cm6Zj55gi_xT1vVVHvHScX2-HEvebvcBCH-_frcfdDX-tqec0yYVEWycbcp_fPn378PgbwAAAP__rk9T4w) | |
# Tuesday, January 21, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1942, songwriter, singer, and actor [Mac Davis](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z79ugzAQgPGnsbcg3-HgePBQqWKja0fkP2c41QQEFknevkr3jt_yk77vYRw8F75PX34hV595HVHh9aLggjAmz-U1aplcUMmCJAemNfpqlbVydhpDzkbbNgQIBDdSgClYSNT5Dk0r2b0xBQgAaHXXYIy3W6RkCLP1OQqtKHFd96bOVOnpj1xe60l7E9dFFjfXuh2i_RDYC-zp3jz4hzdK7Jt1nwT27xbYDz6On_7kQ-4ubQ8uhY_OCK2mxXP5w-q_d6fD3wAAAP__eNdSOg) was born in Lubbock. He wrote several hit songs for Elvis Presley, including “In the Ghetto” and “Don’t Cry Daddy,” and he starred in the 1979 football film _North Dallas Forty_. President Trump issued a [series of executive orders](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAUBOBfY29Y8Ay2GRi6eEvXjhaBh_NUbCwgcfLvq3Tq0u2kTzqd7uuyXCxF2tdPu6Gpz5AW4KAYFwzE4i3F1yJbb67ca9GiEWM_SqW51u3NuEkqFcD3oh845-i0GgcJKigpxXXwLZl3GRcghAAthw6cmyaHfkQI2gbXSI6easpdvWHFpy0hvtIDc-fS1kZzq_UoTf_RwNzAfJ5nt1_djmd5ewPzkSJVcuVPZG9uYK75vh2MSrkjE5zhE9290gNZyh5zYbRttGZbKe2s2m_aV5ZCIIcsu92Kaeon1Wbjj5NipDKMjeTrZin-Tqv_fvUw8BMAAP__Hx5uRg) yesterday to crack down on illegal immigration and increase border security. As we discussed in [last Friday's edition](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1vwyAQxvFPA5sjOPALA0MXb-na0bpwdzEVjiObpvG3r9K53R_9Hv0_ztMZc8m36zsuHOtT1gkMtI2xDdiJMJdj8prixVCwmqPtXe_bYELQc5TW8cAt-86iXMCQOOc68ixBKBnQOb4wY8FaC8F3J0hpGBJTzyABJSlvmHJdt1OdufITdynH-uDtlNZFlzjXet-Ve1MwKhj_2CgYZcuER_OJty_cjsb2zetUwai3SPfvXEreu155c10wl1-4_lv6iPATAAD__9PxVmY), those issues were the top priority for Texans surveyed in a recent poll. Today's sponsor is [GetThin USA](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z79qwzAYBPCnkbYYfZ9kyRo0FIo3p4QG2s3I-mML5DrYSpy8fXH3bgd3_OC-ur6zKaef8WznYMozLj0yrE8MTgi9tym_ekG9GZjXQIMBxZWoNdOaTgb0wHloGIpGSYcS5NBEJbCWwoFUkSZzYAwQAFALWaFzTeOCVwGjttERwYJPZVmrMoUSnnaL-bU8wlq5ZabZTKXcNsLfCLYE233fq_F-Cm6Zj55gi_xT1vVVHvHScX2-HEvebvcBCH-_frcfdDX-tqec0yYVEWycbcp_fPn378PgbwAAAP__rk9T4w), the easiest way for you to get access to Semaglutide for weight loss.
* * *

## Winter Weather Shuts Down Houston Airports
Houston’s two largest airports are [closed today](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L1uwyAUxfGnsTcsuAZsBoYu3tK1o8XHJSCREAGJk7ev3L3zX_rp6Pxc9otJOd2v3-aGur9D2YGCIJQRYLs3KX92PnptqVdsRM2WeeFCUaXGqCXALGQQUlhLA7eCrbB6ySFQRCHZmPSJUQaMMVBcTuDcujr0C0JQJriBU_Splzr1iB3fpoX8KS-skyu3MevY-6MN89cA2wDbcRzTEYw54wCbqT25jGdA0yPWATb7bJHEYu2HxPJsvdyJSfVRam_E5dLQkyPdO1bSeqmnAqsgQiywSiuIkRIJpyslRkhHELi1Ts2zczBW7R9Hyjk1uQycXm8m5b-Z_d_fXhp-AwAA__9Jc26U) as Southeast Texas bears the brunt of a winter storm affecting much of the state. Forecasts call for 3-5 inches of snow by the end of the day for most of the area, though some places could see even more. ## Trump Issues Border Security, Immigration Orders
During his inaugural address Monday, President Donald Trump [promised a series of executive actions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAUBOBfY29Y8Ay2GRi6eEvXjhaBh_NUbCwgcfLvq3Tq0u2kTzqd7uuyXCxF2tdPu6Gpz5AW4KAYFwzE4i3F1yJbb67ca9GiEWM_SqW51u3NuEkqFcD3oh845-i0GgcJKigpxXXwLZl3GRcghAAthw6cmyaHfkQI2gbXSI6easpdvWHFpy0hvtIDc-fS1kZzq_UoTf_RwNzAfJ5nt1_djmd5ewPzkSJVcuVPZG9uYK75vh2MSrkjE5zhE9290gNZyh5zYbRttGZbKe2s2m_aV5ZCIIcsu92Kaeon1Wbjj5NipDKMjeTrZin-Tqv_fvUw8BMAAP__Hx5uRg) to secure the border and enforce federal immigration law, marking a distinct reversal from the policies of the previous administration. Trump authorized the U.S. military to [help secure the nation’s border](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8GOiy4xiEUFK9xl9duaWG4JEjYWEBi--9XTr_djDQaHZ2fx_SwMcX1-d8uaNoR8gQcBsYFAzF5G9M5SerNzL0WFI1QvZKD5lrTl4GZu6CsUzig7u83K_oB9az5ELAPqGk01xkXIIQALW8dOHe_O_QKIWgbHJEcfWy5dO2FDQ9bQzrzB0vn8kKTebW2VdL_IzASGPd970I-5Ip7vQYExisSGLeCNXpcG_N5tcmzVt7Lxmp8rszbkwmGB7p3ix9kuXgsrKJ7F2Tzt9Fi_LbHlGK9KSL5c7ExfRHan04-Bn4DAAD__x10Z1Q) with Mexico by declaring a national emergency, reinstated his “remain in Mexico” policy for asylum seekers, designated Mexican human trafficking cartels as terrorist organizations, and invoked the Alien Enemies Act of 1798 to facilitate the removal of violent international gang members. Trump also announced that he would end the practice of [granting U.S. citizenship](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OgzAQhJ_GdEb2QvgpXFxDl2uvRMZeYBXzI3sTyD39ifTXjTSjb0bzc-_vlgKt07dd0PA5bj0ouEmlJejeWwrvvsy8GZRvdYZG10Vd3lrVttlsRlvrWhe-LrQGBUNTaAdDVUHjbTHcICNzwZQGrTW0ZZWDc03j0NcIY2tHJ0qFnniLOc_IeNo0hvf2wpi7bcmCmZn3JIovAZ2A7jiO_DHweZkCuostoFP6owV0HJ_LLg8KQVJKT5QJI2GSeKJ7Mr1QbtFjTDLiYh8oaVloipZpW-W-BXKf8OrlQJHnSNPM0hHTL65ppl1Al0Xj96uAUlWLUk2LpfDZyv-e9zLwFwAA___UZnO2) to the children of illegal aliens, a move some critics have said would require amending the Constitution. "_As commander in Chief, I have no higher responsibility than to defend our country from threats and invasions, and that is exactly what I am going to do_ ,” Trump said.
## Historic Aircraft Carrier Headed to Brownsville
The USS John F. Kennedy (CV-67), a decommissioned U.S. Navy aircraft carrier, is [on its way to Brownsville](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtCAUhZ8GOwxccZSC4m_s5m-3NAiX8WYZMMjq-PabmX67k5ycky_f132-W4qUHv_tE019hTyDgJ4LyUHO3lK8ZtV4swivZYNGDt2gei20blaDboR-VFoH6yw6BCmWEDpY9KjHXviGzPtMSJBSgla3FpwbR4d-QAjaBseUQE81l7auWPFl9xCvfGBpXX420ay1bjvr_jGYGEznebZuLTm9WwZTwnNnMK35Z6858c-ewWRLJRfxnai4YkPlzpZCWPg3poT-4skeF19KPtN-UIzIQQilhOzabd2aYvx2Uoy03wamxONpKX6A6p-GDgO_AQAA__-onWsK), where it is scheduled to be dismantled upon arrival in about two weeks. Commissioned in 1968, the carrier was deployed 18 times before its retirement in 2005, often to the Mediterranean Sea and the Middle East. During Operation Desert Storm in 1991, it launched [114 air strikes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAYhJ8GbyD4g00YGLp4S9eOFoGfQIvtCJAdv33ldunS4XTSnXQ6fR-36WZTTsvj3c5o2iusE3DoKRcUxORtysckO2_u3GvRoRHqomSvudZdNMCdROUCSIXc68GLwC_3uw6oZN8PrkvmHOMChBCg5cDAuevVoVcIQdvgiOToU1sLaxEbvmwN-Vg3LMytc5dNbO1ZyeWNwEhg3PedxVTbWg622O1gc8oExoIVbXGRwPjbJqwExhrTk_4NvF3C6Z-n1rjQQL9wWdAf1G2WDorFNueuGP_cU86pDopI_phtyj932r98NgPfAQAA__-WuWoM) over a 42-day period against Saddam Hussein’s forces. The last conventionally powered aircraft carrier in existence, the John F. Kennedy has been [docked in Philadelphia](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGO4yAUgOHT4A4LXhxjCopt3GXbLa0XeNjsELCAceLbj5J-LvDr0__vttwwxJDWv_gg014-LyDgyoXkIBeHIZ7L0DlzF07LjoxUFzVctdC624yQBIOfRuHualRuouswKrQCUeOEE3TBvGNCgpQS9DD2YO00WXKKwGv0lg2CXGi59G2jRi-sPp75oNLb_Oii2VrbK7v8YTAzmBM9a_9dU-hzWRnM7ziDWUgGsxwZzBZLCVT4_7wl7vkXpUTu5JHwoMr3LUR0FPctIPe5cB8SRn7kE1fiLfMPgFdbcD-xuK4Ytz9DjKGOig1ifWCIH1j79dRh4CcAAP__qs9sog) since being removed from service. In 2021, International Shipbreaking Limited purchased it for $0.01. Rear Adm. Bill Greene said the ship “will always be remembered as a symbol of enduring freedom and a beacon of hope and peace during difficult times in our nation.” Meanwhile, a new USS John F. Kennedy (CVN-79) is expected to be delivered to the Navy this year.

On this day in 1942, songwriter, singer, and actor was born in Lubbock. He wrote several hit songs for Elvis Presley, including “In the Ghetto” and “Don’t Cry Daddy,” and he starred in the 1979 football film North Dallas Forty. President Trump issued a yesterday to crack down on illegal immigration and increase border security. As we discussed in , those issues were the top priority for Texans surveyed in a recent poll. Abilene ❄️ 36/18° | Amarillo ☀️ 35/4° | Austin ❄️ 38/23° | Brownsville ❄️ 45/31° | Corpus Christi ❄️ 41/29° | DFW ⛅ 36/22° | El Paso 🌤️ 40/23° | Houston ❄️ 35/25° | Laredo ❄️ 39/29° | Lubbock 🌤️ 36/8° | Midland ❄️ 35/15° | San Antonio ❄️ 39/25° | Tyler ⛅ 36/20° | Waco ❄️ 37/20° | Winter Weather Shuts Down Houston Airports Houston’s two largest airports are as Southeast Texas bears the brunt of a winter storm affecting much of the state. Forecasts call for 3-5 inches of snow by the end of the day for most of the area, though some places could see even more. In addition to Houston area school districts being closed, dozens of schools in and around and —where 1-3 inches of snow and sleet are expected—have canceled classes today. UT and are also closed. On Sunday, Houston Mayor John Whitmire said officials are “doing everything possible from the city to prepare for this winter storm,” but he to “use common sense and be smart.” Trump Issues Border Security, Immigration Orders During his inaugural address Monday, President Donald Trump to secure the border and enforce federal immigration law, marking a distinct reversal from the policies of the previous administration. Trump authorized the U.S. military to with Mexico by declaring a national emergency, reinstated his “remain in Mexico” policy for asylum seekers, designated Mexican human trafficking cartels as terrorist organizations, and invoked the Alien Enemies Act of 1798 to facilitate the removal of violent international gang members. Trump also announced that he would end the practice of to the children of illegal aliens, a move some critics have said would require amending the Constitution. "As commander in Chief, I have no higher responsibility than to defend our country from threats and invasions, and that is exactly what I am going to do ,” Trump said. Historic Aircraft Carrier Headed to Brownsville The USS John F. Kennedy (CV-67), a decommissioned U.S. Navy aircraft carrier, is , where it is scheduled to be dismantled upon arrival in about two weeks. Commissioned in 1968, the carrier was deployed 18 times before its retirement in 2005, often to the Mediterranean Sea and the Middle East. During Operation Desert Storm in 1991, it launched over a 42-day period against Saddam Hussein’s forces. The last conventionally powered aircraft carrier in existence, the John F. Kennedy has been since being removed from service. In 2021, International Shipbreaking Limited purchased it for $0.01. Rear Adm. Bill Greene said the ship “will always be remembered as a symbol of enduring freedom and a beacon of hope and peace during difficult times in our nation.” Meanwhile, a new USS John F. name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fb67784eb2449028600067d282dd5a6&_e=kMz79_8WyfwH6uCFoD56_PmjLKCTJqZ0jN0YX9yFrZ15DDf1JPBDrcI_3hF6ZkWzcMxt1hZrSf2T09zom2aWqZprhNaawZrzJT32SiSaBQz2qQzlWKfx6-UsEZrDNgl4YBhNP4_4e5H_t_SycuEjCGkgf1EjILXdo6PNHXJe7T6oepwI8XCCEul0PY9srWItsuJCPV1zjM1qoRwJSg2Yb1s1L20GVpozUJJLqpxNSEpk9rSwhDynXXCyWwjj98wpurP7PkSpl1PpBvF9MlwfLj-q2bqnOspV6iwRj2Mhv2a1jiT5OrJwXkSyHyDWkga3ZSG2ViPbOFa1nUz1dDtV_9N_7gYrjMYFRKDb7gyxGmCtMFNGdLNzpqTZMUOVdXklt1S7HGLD8xzPsnPCp44_JIaRqOf_Q4oTh78FvHV4zC8FFRhDf25JJ7rIhSh1xG5W) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fb67784eb2449028600067d282dd5a6&_e=kMz79_8WyfwH6uCFoD56_PmjLKCTJqZ0jN0YX9yFrZ15DDf1JPBDrcI_3hF6ZkWzcMxt1hZrSf2T09zom2aWqZprhNaawZrzJT32SiSaBQz2qQzlWKfx6-UsEZrDNgl4YBhNP4_4e5H_t_SycuEjCGkgf1EjILXdo6PNHXJe7T6oepwI8XCCEul0PY9srWItsuJCPV1zjM1qoRwJSg2Yb1s1L20GVpozUJJLqpxNSEpk9rSwhDynXXCyWwjj98wpurP7PkSpl1PpBvF9MlwfLj-q2bqnOspV6iwRj2Mhv2aFTehvfbUE6s7ZvnIMCtOWK2nSj9ezI5tAS-LbExgjW6XF2qDd-ilFNatx90vnr9uzquQSK9J_6H5nwCIEC6OUEUUGHmZapGzxyz1weyaN3y2kB0YcU_UUhnaQZPUpUrmHUVOByDTTGZPCenHeABvL)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fb67784eb2449028600067d282dd5a6&_e=kMz79_8WyfwH6uCFoD56_PmjLKCTJqZ0jN0YX9yFrZ15DDf1JPBDrcI_3hF6ZkWzcMxt1hZrSf2T09zom2aWqZprhNaawZrzJT32SiSaBQz2qQzlWKfx6-UsEZrDNgl4YBhNP4_4e5H_t_SycuEjCGkgf1EjILXdo6PNHXJe7T6oepwI8XCCEul0PY9srWItsuJCPV1zjM1qoRwJSg2Yb1s1L20GVpozUJJLqpxNSEpk9rSwhDynXXCyWwjj98wpurP7PkSpl1PpBvF9MlwfLj-q2bqnOspV6iwRj2Mhv2aRU6MA3hKtDbl-g7DRsHIvPj6AYsHXEyhsCjoWS-Jtli8Ch1pn7FOOf1Rj7LDDhDSOrooabNp5JNDPKRv8jpzMpZgJT1vwKEeyLgh07qlTBtNAcoF0so5BHpXZkv3-xMA-BfMSSDezGk02-zr0m-Sw),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fb67784eb2449028600067d282dd5a6&_e=kMz79_8WyfwH6uCFoD56_PmjLKCTJqZ0jN0YX9yFrZ15DDf1JPBDrcI_3hF6ZkWzcMxt1hZrSf2T09zom2aWqZprhNaawZrzJT32SiSaBQz2qQzlWKfx6-UsEZrDNgl4YBhNP4_4e5H_t_SycuEjCGkgf1EjILXdo6PNHXJe7T6oepwI8XCCEul0PY9srWItsuJCPV1zjM1qoRwJSg2Yb1s1L20GVpozUJJLqpxNSEpk9rSwhDynXXCyWwjj98wpurP7PkSpl1PpBvF9MlwfLj-q2bqnOspV6iwRj2Mhv2YGiLO9mdTpy4F9tl4wskdgqBhG4uqsWv2CgvgielUMzKgez4xt6rN9TODFqpL5xhbjvSrqHafi1BCLoTnEtttOMDkOKSpJUXyvr3rMCOTn5rOYcXoTd5o6yvLwa1vD_9jUDB-JzcvEasE7ILN7Mwk1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fb67784eb2449028600067d282dd5a6&_e=kMz79_8WyfwH6uCFoD56_PmjLKCTJqZ0jN0YX9yFrZ15DDf1JPBDrcI_3hF6ZkWzcMxt1hZrSf2T09zom2aWqZprhNaawZrzJT32SiSaBQz2qQzlWKfx6-UsEZrDNgl4YBhNP4_4e5H_t_SycuEjCGkgf1EjILXdo6PNHXJe7T6oepwI8XCCEul0PY9srWItsuJCPV1zjM1qoRwJSg2Yb1s1L20GVpozUJJLqpxNSEpk9rSwhDynXXCyWwjj98wpurP7PkSpl1PpBvF9MlwfLj-q2bqnOspV6iwRj2Mhv2aWu-QDJaVF1Gi38gUH2t8L3LU_NKGUyyw8EWc96HrVfVCHCtGD_HDjdemqhQG-3JapM9s6RFdiS9_HTttYI9zihppqPEMF1IzVWeV67RevNDsK9fzw8lPUJXfu0Lf2G4cVHNqmXVzg2O-zm8KL1I2i)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fb67784eb2449028600067d282dd5a6&_e=kMz79_8WyfwH6uCFoD56_PmjLKCTJqZ0jN0YX9yFrZ15DDf1JPBDrcI_3hF6ZkWzcMxt1hZrSf2T09zom2aWqZprhNaawZrzJT32SiSaBQz2qQzlWKfx6-UsEZrDNgl4YBhNP4_4e5H_t_SycuEjCGkgf1EjILXdo6PNHXJe7T6oepwI8XCCEul0PY9srWItsuJCPV1zjM1qoRwJSg2Yb1s1L20GVpozUJJLqpxNSEpk9rSwhDynXXCyWwjj98wpurP7PkSpl1PpBvF9MlwfLj-q2bqnOspV6iwRj2Mhv2aYzWYFPvkWbkzl__xJQuE9pIleGKA8wzcaJ52LHnsxw8PQc4L5Xypc2RvtGX3Ol7H5_hklj0xz1e5za2uHZUpfrT-5tRT9n-bScdhUqfEV0UR-oIHTDv4BOVKwcHzeyMQSphBIdQbkrOtc5GAYyqqY) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: The Flyover
subject: Trump Sworn In, Ohio State Wins, and Carrie Unplugged
body:
Donald Trump was sworn in as the 47th president of the United States on Monday, delivering a 30-minute inaugural address outlining his agenda and stating that "the golden age of America begins right now." # Tuesday, January 21, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1908, New York City enacted [the Sullivan Ordinance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71u7CAQxfGngW5XfBmWguI27va2KS1gxuuJMKxs4shvHzl9yqMj_aT_x3N6RipUX__jiqHPbVJCDTchb0pOEKmck-EQZkSFmmOQTjszeP0wfAnGRavBQYaUYAZAY_XgdILkjR5s5BQuTUglpdRW-PsQ40OI7JMHn61KzAgE6m27fzaqfcG5nO3A7Z7byktYen_vTP9jamRq3BFbgXrm6732Vyl0xHprG1CNNSNTI98CvL-pFNqtY0a81kjll-t_5R1B_QQAAP__xShSog), which made it illegal for women to smoke in public. This ordinance was proposed by Alderman Timothy "Little Tim" Sullivan, who had never actually witnessed a woman smoking in public. Yesterday was a historic day in America, and today's edition is filled with news of the inauguration ceremony itself, the first actions taken by the new Trump administration, and even a look at the [fashion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7tqwzAUxvGnkbaYo6ObNWjo4i1dOxrdnKjIVrCFRfr0xd27ffDBD_5f9_nucsnb49Otybalzggob8BuyObocnnPgka7pISJ02SZ5lpIw0dBn1aPAALiiOBVHE1UhnmBwS9aolKS02wvDRgyxrgCM0jnRoBgvIkmKPREQIq51X34rnlrz7SUdz3TPoS60mKfrb0Owj8ITgSn3vvgfbg-gtOW-kFwcnvLoaRrhh-djOldyrPS3cZXz6XkQ2ki4LG6XP7U9l_lafE3AAD__6aqUqI) and celebrities on display. Take our poll below and let us know if you were watching. _**The Arizona Flyover**_ , our newest state edition, launches today, covering all the news of the Grand Canyon State. If you want to ensure you receive it every weekday morning, [click here to automatically subscribe](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH8NbIngPYzNwBAp8tRkrdTFwoDt12IT2TRV_n1ltUOGdrzT991wr5fu4ijRMl7dHG0ZcgcCqoOQB5BdcJQeneLBDjFCRB6trLFWlcFG8clCowftlfKgGlOjNNKh6CvfOBfQ9wMnu68JCVJK1MIcK-caIbzpTTBeQ8-UiIFKXo_vmZYyxSE98j2uR59nnuxUym1jeGLQMmjn9AfFoP1NO-FG8omWD4ZtnB0lhudw-6KUaNM1g0qJca9_RL0VV2Lnc4gMz6c3BvqzzAzPL1e-2ifvyeLlv5PuFr4DAAD__xBOaPM). ## Trump Takes Oath, Starts Signing Orders
Donald Trump was sworn in as the 47th president of the United States on Monday, delivering a 30-minute inaugural address outlining his agenda and stating that _"the golden age of America begins right now."_ [Read the speech transcript here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSrCAURL8GMyy4oAwBwUvI5qUbWgg4soVi4XVc_37LyTc7QVd31_l6Dk-Xclpf_90SDU5lAAYdZZwCH4JL-RpkE8wUI0TRRMOVULLT4iGb2fggOyaVBsaD4L0eWWBOTqOeIHAlfJPM3cY4cM5Fz3TbOfdgzOtRB-17GIlkMSQstf0uacU5Tvkq71hbX5Ymmxlx24n4R8ASsOd5tsfusAR33QECdsdSLwJ2jedOwG4lJ0z-xnuYgGX8wwRsKKvLgWI9lo2m1R2vozpMZaX7FqOf6XTkTDH-IMXq1t3XtCEBq9RDaN4LxhQB21QTtjPlnPZeEclei0v58xb_svc28BsAAP__B01wEA). Late Monday, Trump began signing a number of sweeping executive orders, including [issuing 1,500 pardons to participants](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd0RwsYkpKF7jLq_d0sK-l4QIgwUkkf9-5fTbjTSao9H5uc03F2JI9_9uI9t8nkHAwIXkIGd0IR5z36H1RECqIyuv6toPRo1997B-lKvWHpQCswxiRDesOGgvUUuD0HfBnjQhQUqptDCXwblRiNUsBs2qYWG9IAwtl8szh9Qe5OOR31Qua966aB-t7ZWpfwwmBlM69lzbWTGYTjCDSchvZjC9Kk_0qQwmzMlF5K28tp2HWl9U-VKyQ767gjlV7nPhT5e45kieErrUzmFXLO6fEGOo-sp6cd9ciN8r7S81bwu_AQAA___xvmSd) in the Jan 6, 2021 mob scene at the Capitol. _“They’ve been treated very unfair,”_ he said. Trump was expected to sign immigration directives ordering the military to assist with border security, suspend refugee admissions, and end birthright citizenship. He was also set to declare a national emergency at the southern border. The president's list also included orders related to [gender issues](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAURb8GOwygI1BQbGM3225pEJ7O2yAYwHH8-81Mv-XNTU5Ozs99ulsMGNdvu4GpS5oEEzfKOBV88hbDNfWNNwuAgK4Bw2Un-5vuVN88zKzBLryfveqk9HJxIJWUetB64WxgQ4PmTWNccM67gen2Zq1izOlZe-0GMZOegceacvubMNYHLOFKT8itS1sTzKPWvZDui4iRiPE8zzbOLsJZ3j8RY5wdTUclYkxHpXsKWNEVaqP_DHcRMdZ8bDstuEYKL3BHxSfQlD3kQvecXLC4YVypzUBTDBetZ6IzppBWdDbQAi8oNLtouVKdUk02fj8xBCyDJD1bN4vh41v_6_c04i8AAP__Ou11uA). These orders will require federal policy to recognize only two sexes: male and female, rolling back a number of federal diversity programs. Included among the orders Trump signed Monday were ones halting nearly 80 Biden-era actions and withdrawing from the Paris climate agreement and the World Health Organization. [See the orders signed here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8Gb1hwsZ0wMHTxlq4dLX4uzq0wRJjE9dtX6d7tkz7pHOl83ZabpUR5_bQbmhbLAgJGLiQHuQRL6VyGLpiICKg6NPKiLsOo1XXo7gakHWXACVz0QljnrPLhqjAOylupoSPzpgkJUko1Cd2P1l6F8NrpoP0Ejg0CA7VS--9Cud0xprO8sPa-bF0y99YeO1MfDGYG83EcvXd7xmN__wzm92Qwt_rcHhwz1vXkuGFdMfuT4w_6Z6MX8lID1p1Tjsk2KpnB3FUTHgelRPt0YYNYN0vpT9v-y_Ay8BsAAP__Vyth1A)
## Biden Issues Last-Minute Family Pardons
In his final hours in office, former President [Joe Biden issued pardons](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uxCAQBOCngc4WLPivoEjj7tKmtPhZzhuBOdnoLL995OvTjTTSN5qfx_KwlGh7ftuMpsaygICuEbIBuQRL6Vo0DyYiAiqORg5q0N2kRs1XI-TQSe8G4V3ndVAxetfb0Y7Oj-DAczK3JiRIKVUvprazdhTCT24Kk-_BMS0wUC17-1toqyvGdJU37q0vmSez1vo6mPpiMDOYz_Ns_eb8XTKYb5rBLOQnM5gdBdyal91D2Y4m2kzpajJmh_vRrjUnvpvwOiklOvqBafHMltJnqv53_W3gLwAA__97DVo4) to his siblings, their spouses, Dr. Anthony Fauci, retired Gen. Mark Milley, and members of the Jan. 6 investigative committee. Biden cited concerns over [politically motivated retribution](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuq4zAURb_G7hT0fhQqpkmXaac0x9JRcoL8QFYS_PdDbn_LzYbFYv27TTegSuv9LywYe9kmyaVhXDAppgxUz0mPORZEiWrEKJxy2gTl9fiIWlhQWScJxjrvuQkiKW9L5iUYVDBS_NK4kEIIZXm4GADPeQpzyCFZOQ-aY6a-tctzo7U_sNRze2O7pG0Za3z0vh-D-jPI6yCvsK_4Ob7Xd7ROqeIgrzNlXFlvr2VnBV6J2EK14sl2aHlbD_aE9QXtZJapNIP0rvjAjTBClVn77AAd54BOu7HFvH-oVjqsGzS_L0D1x6X_1uYd5f8AAAD__8KyZKc) under Trump’s administration, saying the pardons don't imply wrongdoing but were necessary to protect people from “baseless” investigations. The move, [unprecedented in scale](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuuozAQhp_GdIN8IRAXLrahO9tuiQwzhInARmZClLdfkf50f_Hf9P37GX4ir5wef-NGQeY8WG1voA1YM2Dk9TM0FYaZyJKrKJjOdc3Nu3tTLcFiY2aNXTt22jg0Pvpx1s7f25Y673zF4WrTxhpjXKt9fYvxrvXkR49-au2oGk3Ikkv9zJxkoXn95JNKPeWtWsMish_K_VG2V7Y_qSBPUj9fh3C8LMr214CyvTZfrWw_MlI6YC9E2y58EuyxYE4HxEIQE7zSXmgipCSEcGYhyDOkDFNO8xWeCDiBLASJ3hBx48SHlCicU1UC7m9eVz7aTjX6sUVev2_lN3pnsP8DAAD__2H5cuY), drew criticism for its potential impact on future presidential clemency norms. While recipients expressed gratitude, legal experts noted the pardons might compel them to testify in future investigations, limiting their Fifth Amendment protections.
## Ohio State Wins National Championship
The Ohio State Buckeyes [won the college football national championship](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGupCAUQL8GOwxcUIeCYhu62XZLc4XreDcoRnlj_PuXef2rT3Jycv49xydy5u31F1fydS4jKOik0hL0mJDzPdom-ZkIyDTk9WAG2znzsM3iB7TUIRIOCqIzoE3Xq0lPUx_nSJAa9h-b0qC1Nr1ybYf4UCq6ySUXe5iEVZS4lqP9X3irC835Lm862ljWJvul1v0U5o-AICBc19XSuW8fKCDEkjO9SM6l1AlzFhDOWo5bQBgFBE4CgjXWub7rBYSycJFnxUpy_6qnxAtvuZV6kEy4kowZeZVx3mVccN25bOfCe3P4tF-cM5_9IKx6rcj5p67-duvt4TsAAP__IDNtLQ) Monday night, beating the Fighting Irish of Notre Dame 34-23 in the first-ever 12-team playoff format. Both teams [struggled to reach the final 12-team](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQBp_G7ohgAWMKimvS5dorrQXW8Z4wWDZKlLc_5fq__PRJo9H8eSwP5ML1-Rt3Cn1tC0iwQioBasnI5bOYMYeVCEiPFJTTzlivZzNuIWlQq1fSSTRxTtZ669UUwaMGigQjhy9NKlBK6Un6m0WcpUw--uzTBHEwkjL3dt7-Nq59o7V82ovOW2r7WMLW-3EN-tcA9wHueFR6X9_rO87OqdAA97QeomLnVrGItOF-cKvXxodoGzdxdewkausniYw7CaWcj8ZF66TV5BG0W_2c0E4Uyco8niEfby6Fr8kNRj535PJfqP8U6BXgXwAAAP__6y1mzA) playoff field, the 14-1 Irish surviving a week 3 loss to Northern Illinois, and OSU, 13-2, suffering a 13-10 loss to rival Michigan on Thanksgiving weekend, their fourth straight loss to the Wolverines. Monday's meeting marked [the ninth time](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0UL_O2yAQfxq8EcFhmzAwdGH7unaMMBz2tThEwBfLb185UsdOdzrd7--vr8eXp0zP9aff0fZUHiBg4kJykI_oKZ-PcYg2IQKqAa3USo-TUfdx2KwO0oygvEqzvEudlllMwSuTxDTPOviB7MUmJEgp1SzMbfL-LkQwi4kmzLCwUWCkXurtd6Fn3zDls7yx3kLZh2y33l-NqR8MHAN3HMftu_leoj-vBwau9VLPa75K7Y2BCyVnXJGBS6X0xefMwF0mGDghPzsDVzYqvHXfkT9Lr8ij35H_Q_CKodTIG1bCxjf6qPAdsdNzbXz5Dn_wxMYTrdt14lSpbQyc1rPRWighNAM3VBtfB-VMbdZsFOvuKX-S9f81_bbwNwAA__-E_4BO) these two schools faced each other, with their first game occurring in 1935, ending in an 18-13 victory for Notre Dame in Columbus.

On this day in 1908, New York City enacted , which made it illegal for women to smoke in public. This ordinance was proposed by Alderman Timothy "Little Tim" Sullivan, who had never actually witnessed a woman smoking in public. Yesterday was a historic day in America, and today's edition is filled with news of the inauguration ceremony itself, the first actions taken by the new Trump administration, and even a look at the and celebrities on display. Take our poll below and let us know if you were watching. The Arizona Flyover , our newest state edition, launches today, covering all the news of the Grand Canyon State. If you want to ensure you receive it every weekday morning, . Today's sponsor is , offering a free copy of their book Extreme Devotion. | Trump Takes Oath, Starts Signing Orders Donald Trump was sworn in as the 47th president of the United States on Monday, delivering a 30-minute inaugural address outlining his agenda and stating that "the golden age of America begins right now." . Late Monday, Trump began signing a number of sweeping executive orders, including in the Jan 6, 2021 mob scene at the Capitol. “They’ve been treated very unfair,” he said. Trump was expected to sign immigration directives ordering the military to assist with border security, suspend refugee admissions, and end birthright citizenship. He was also set to declare a national emergency at the southern border. The president's list also included orders related to . These orders will require federal policy to recognize only two sexes: male and female, rolling back a number of federal diversity programs. Included among the orders Trump signed Monday were ones halting nearly 80 Biden-era actions and withdrawing from the Paris climate agreement and the World Health Organization. Biden Issues Last-Minute Family Pardons In his final hours in office, former President to his siblings, their spouses, Dr. Anthony Fauci, retired Gen. Mark Milley, and members of the Jan. 6 investigative committee. Biden cited concerns over under Trump’s administration, saying the pardons don't imply wrongdoing but were necessary to protect people from “baseless” investigations. The move, , drew criticism for its potential impact on future presidential clemency norms. While recipients expressed gratitude, legal experts noted the pardons might compel them to testify in future investigations, limiting their Fifth Amendment protections. Ohio State Wins National Championship The Ohio State Buckeyes Monday night, beating the Fighting Irish of Notre Dame 34-23 in the first-ever 12-team playoff format. Both teams playoff field, the 14-1 Irish surviving a week 3 loss to Northern Illinois, and OSU, 13-2, suffering a 13-10 loss to rival Michigan on Thanksgiving weekend, their fourth straight loss to the Wolverines. Monday's meeting marked these two schools faced each other, with their first game occurring in 1935, ending in an 18-13 victory for Notre Dame in Columbus. | ➤The Senate on Monday confirmed Marco Rubio as secretary of state, making him the first of President Trump's Cabinet nominees to win the approval of the upper chamber. The vote was 99-0. () ➤ The White House named Brian Driscoll as acting FBI director Monday, following Deputy Director Paul Abbate's unexpected retirement, declining to temporarily replace Director Christopher Wray. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Settlement Reached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Thanks to your support, I’ve saved my home.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/4869c02cfa9e0967/?utm_campaign=20240116&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend,

From the bottom of my heart... _THANK YOU_.

Thanks to the generosity of Americans like you who contributed to my
Legal Defense Trust, I have great news to share with you.

I have reached a resolution of the litigation with the Plaintiffs that
will result in a satisfaction of the Plaintiffs’ judgment.

_This resolution does not involve an admission of liability or
wrongdoing by any of the Parties. I am satisfied with and have no
grievances relating to the result we have reached. _

I HAVE BEEN ABLE TO RETAIN MY NEW YORK CO-OP AND FLORIDA CONDOMINIUM
AND ALL OF MY PERSONAL BELONGINGS. NO ONE DESERVES TO BE SUBJECTED TO
THREATS, HARASSMENT, OR INTIMIDATION.

This litigation has taken its toll on all parties. This whole episode
was unfortunate.

I and the Plaintiffs have agreed not to ever talk about each other in
any defamatory manner, and I urge others to do the same.

Make no mistake: I could not have done this without the contributions
you made to my Legal Defense Trust. Your support served as a reminder
that America is home to the most generous souls on the planet.

While this case has been settled, I still have outstanding legal
expenses and one remaining case in Arizona set to go to trial in 2026.

But with you by my side, I am confident we will win.

PLEASE CONSIDER MAKING A CONTRIBUTION TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST –
THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND – TO WIN THE ONE REMAINING CASE

name: History Facts
subject: "OMG" is much older than you think
body:
Winston Churchill’s remarkable life was filled with genuine “OMG” moments, from withstanding the disastrous Gallipoli campaign during the First World War to leading Britain through World War II as prime minister. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cgsrw4cg4ub0onmm46dueg7u3m7qqcgc1imc6k2fx90474b591ya2m004hmmbzomaxbt36fc8sz7e69miagonttpt8n6f6xqecfrtjy5p3r6v0humov3x6nluhvkwldhicz5h6jis2squ5d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqfts3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The first known use of “OMG” was in a letter to Winston Churchill.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqfts3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqfts3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqfts3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W inston Churchill’s remarkable life was filled with genuine “OMG” moments, from withstanding the disastrous Gallipoli campaign during the First World War to leading Britain through World War II as prime minister. Churchill held a front-row seat to many history-defining moments, even including [the little-known origin of the term “OMG” itself](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqfts3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
---
The expression “OMG,” an acronym for “oh my god,” became popular as early internet lingo during the 1990s. But the first known use of the acronym actually dates back to a letter written to Churchill in 1917, while he was serving as first lord of the admiralty in the British navy. The letter was written by John Arbuthnot Fisher, who, as first sea lord (the navy’s highest ranking officer), often quarreled with Churchill. In the 1917 missive, [Fisher wrote](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqfts3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), “I hear that a new order of Knighthood is on the tapis [table] — O.M.G. (Oh! My God!) — Shower it on the Admiralty!!” Sadly for the linguistically hip Fisher, neither Churchill, the navy, nor the British people adopted his clever quip. It wasn’t until the arrival of the internet age some 70 years later that the “OMG” acronym exploded in popularity.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqfts3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqfts3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## “LOL” originally meant “little old lady.”
Language evolves over time, and the same can be said of time-saving acronyms, including the ubiquitous “LOL” (most commonly understood to mean “laugh out loud”). The acronym is now a go-to response when a joke, meme, or photo elicits some measure of mirth (though many keep “ROFL” in their back pocket for those truly hilarious moments). But the oldest use of “LOL” actually dates back to the 1960s and had a very different meaning: Pulitzer Prize-winning columnist Herb Caen used [the acronym in his book](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqfts3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) _Only in San Francisco_ to mean “little old lady.” In the book, Caen wrote, “A traffic officer bellowed at an LOL who didn’t seem to know which way to turn her car.” Caen, who spent most of his career at the _San Francisco Chronicle,_ also coined the term “beatnik,” referring to the counterculture inspired by Beat Generation writers such as Jack Kerouac and Allen Ginsberg.

name: Lesley Davis
subject: Reclaiming our Institutions
body:
Cultural declines are not born; they are made. They are made top-down, through institutions. | | | |
---
| | | Dear friends, We may be inspired by President Trump's victory and his inauguration speech yesterday. I know I am. But we are up against a large force in this country that is our cultural decline. It was not a natural process that started in the home. Cultural declines are not born; they are made. They are made top-down, through institutions. For decades, post-modern liberals leveraged their institutional advantages to undermine our values. Post-modern liberals didn’t corrupt our culture by teaching their kids to be leftists. They did it by teaching your kids to be leftists. This philosophy corrupted our graduate and professional schools with “deconstruction” and “critical theory.” From there it spread to our schools of education, journalism, business management, and human resources programs. The disciples of the new creed then spread to the classroom, the courts, the media, the HR departments, and the financial sector. This top-down attack decapitated the command-and-control centers of our culture. Almost every cultural and governmental aspect of our nation has been fully captured. To save our culture, we must reclaim the institutions where culture is made. The best way to defeat a bad idea is with a better idea. But it is folly to believe this will happen purely through free exchange of ideas at the individual level. Only by reversing the tide in the institutions can we reverse the tide in the culture. We must courageously, without wavering, call our institutions back to their original purpose: preserving and perpetuating the enduring values of our civilization. Do this and we can redeem our culture. Are you with me? If so, [forward this to a friend!](https://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=38e7573a4604819e3af8c7b86&id=0ffab6eb77&e=6f9b7d8fd0)
---

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 1/21/2025
body:
‘America’s decline is over,’ Trump boasts as he opens 47th presidency
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/sfve0260c97)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/sekfec80119)**
| | Hi friends,
It's a NEW WEEK in America! The energy in D.C. all weekend has been palpable. It is clear we are entering a new GOLDEN era of our beautiful country and I can't wait to continue watching it all unfold from back in Colorado. It's time for us to come together in UNITY, especially in our state. I'll talk all about it with Jeff Hunt [this morning](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s3j8f916de4) (7am MT) LIVE FROM D.C. before I head back home.

Enjoy this special "inaugural-edition" of the Mountain Minute with all RMV originals! Here is a summary:
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Coloradans from across the plains to the Western Slope gathered in Washington, D.C., to celebrate President Trump’s inauguration, showcasing a [robust presence from the state](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s2tcdbece6b). Meanwhile, [Chris Wright](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/sem3efa2e79), a nominee for a top federal position, represents the growing influence of Western citizens in national policymaking.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** President Trump’s inaugural address signaled a new direction, emphasizing national renewal and declaring, [“America’s decline is over.”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s9s8e6318b2) His [administration’s priorities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s4j6f0fb78c) include bolstering national security, reducing bureaucratic overreach, and fostering energy independence. You can read his full inauguration speech [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s3h203d3504).
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** In an article by C. J. Garbo, he discusses the controversial decision to issue ["midnight pardons"](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s8g1231696d) for high-profile individuals, arguing that such actions undermine justice and accountability while eroding public trust in political institutions.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, January 21, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[‘America’s decline is over,’ Trump boasts as he opens 47th presidency](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s8pc3a0a70b)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s4od71d79e5)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s0j9fdbc86a)
President Donald J. Trump set the tone Monday for the next four years with eight words: “The Golden Age of America begins right now.”

The 47th President of the United States focused on restoring American greatness during an inaugural address moved indoors for the first time since the beginning of President Ronald Reagan’s second term in 1985.

“From this day forward, our country will flourish and be respected again all over the world,” Mr. Trump said. “During every day of the Trump Administration, I will very simply put America first.”

He drew differences between the outgoing administration of President Joe Biden, seated to his left, and the restorative policies he will implement to bring a once proud nation back to one which is “prosperous and free”.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/sama2ef5344)**
|
---

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s6t6d4d2614)
|
---
**[Coloradans from the plains to the Western Slope celebrated President Trump’s inauguration in D.C.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/sdm6aa98d24)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s0h185e18db)
* Coloradans from across the state, from the plains to the Western Slope, traveled to Washington, D.C., to celebrate President Trump’s inauguration, emphasizing the state’s diverse support for his administration.
* Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District on the Western Slope found a unique gathering spot during the inauguration, as U.S. Rep. Jeff Hurd’s legislative offices opened their doors to welcome approximately 50 Coloradans.
* Participants highlighted their hope for renewed focus on rural America, economic revitalization, and preserving Western values under Trump’s leadership.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s4t9ca9bde0)**
|
---
**[Read the full inaugural address by President Donald J. Trump](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s2g3b5daf57)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s5k1435e2d8)
* President Donald J. Trump’s inaugural address emphasized restoring American greatness, pledging to return power to the people and prioritize the interests of American citizens above all else.
* Trump outlined plans to focus on rebuilding the nation’s infrastructure, protecting borders, and bringing jobs back to the United States while ending "American carnage."
* His speech underscored themes of unity and patriotism, calling for a renewed spirit of national pride and collaboration to overcome challenges.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s3me6277158)**
|
---
**[Wright among five Western state citizens nominated to top admin spots in order Monday](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s5kdc424821)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s4g54aa3122)
* Five Western state citizens, including Chris Wright from Colorado, were nominated for prominent federal administrative positions, reflecting the administration's emphasis on representing Western priorities.
* Wright, a leader in energy innovation, is poised to influence national policies on energy independence and technological advancements in his new role.
* The nominations highlight the growing recognition of Western states' contributions to the nation's economic and environmental strategies.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/sake50b9aee)**
|
---
**[What are President Trump’s priorities? Here’s the list from the White House](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s1t1f0013a6)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s2p19b9f9a0)
* President Trump’s administration outlined its priorities, including securing the southern border, revitalizing manufacturing jobs, and achieving energy independence through deregulation.
* Additional goals include overhauling the education system to promote school choice, supporting law enforcement, and strengthening national defense capabilities.
* The White House emphasized a commitment to returning power to the American people by reducing bureaucratic overreach and promoting economic growth.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s2m04405a42)**
|
---
**[Garbo: Midnight pardons are a calculated betrayal of justice and accountability](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/sfu2e6080f9)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s6vae6278bc)
_In an act of brazen political maneuvering, Dr. Anthony Fauci and the members of the January 6th Committee were granted presidential pardons under the cover of darkness, effectively shielding them from accountability and raising profound questions about the state of justice in our nation._
_This clandestine move — deliberately timed and executed to escape the scrutiny of the press and the American people — demonstrates a calculated effort to subvert full consideration and attention. It’s a stark reminder of the lengths those in power will go to protect their own, even at the expense of the public trust._
_Presidential pardons are, by nature, tools of extraordinary power, meant to temper justice with mercy in rare and deserving cases. But when used in this manner — sneaked through in the dead of night without explanation or justification — they cease to be acts of grace and become acts of complicity._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s7h892105e4)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Flags to be lifted to full-staff today in Colorado by order of Gov. Jared Polis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/sfs1f3a030d)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s2p1489c9fc)****BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE | JANUARY 20** _Gov. Jared Polis, a Democrat and chair of the National Governors Association, on Friday proclaimed that flags should be raised to full-staff on Monday._
**[Rep. Scott Bottoms declares to church, ‘I am going to run for governor’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/sfr860e0015)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/sbs07334ea7)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | JANUARY 20** _Rep. Scott Bottoms, rated as the second-most conservative member of the Colorado General Assembly, has indicated he will seek the Republican Party’s nomination for governor._ __
**[In clandestine operation, 20 wolves have been released in Pitkin and Eagle County](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s7vc22fe308)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-XKw/s6o93107f69)****BY LINDY BROWNING****| LOCAL | JANUARY 20** _Residents in Pitkin and Eagle counties have some new international neighbors, a press release from Colorado Parks and Wildlife reads._

**🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW?** Donald Trump is the 47th U.S. president but only the **40th to give an inaugural address**. Vice presidents who assumed the presidency without being elected, such as Gerald Ford, never delivered inaugural speeches, and Trump, like Grover Cleveland, is counted twice due to nonconsecutive terms.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “Many people thought it was impossible for me to stage such a historic political comeback. But as you see today, here I am. The American people have spoken. I stand before you now as proof that you should never believe that something is impossible to do. In America, the impossible is what we do best.” — President Donald J. Trump, second inaugural address, January 20th, 2025

subject: President Trump: "Steve Scalise is our hero... here he is, the picture of strength"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m honored to have stood next to him on the day he was sworn in as our 47th President.

| |
---
| | | **President Trump: "Steve Scalise is our hero... here he is, the picture of strength"**
Hi, this is Steve Scalise. I'm humbled by President Trump's words. And I'm honored to have stood next to him on the day he was sworn in as our 47th President.

_We share a vision for the future of our country. Together, we 'll help usher in the Golden Age for America. I will work alongside the leader of our Party to: _
- Secure our border and build The Wall
- Mandate voter ID requirements in all 50 states
- End woke propaganda in our schools and military
- Unleash American energy
- Restore law and order in America
- Eliminate government waste with Elon Musk and DOGE
- End the political weaponization of our government
_**[And I'd like you to be a partner - from the very first day - in Making America Great Again. Join us right here and right now:](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4ac6rn1a40dfah5ppvgluus6nntj1g2tbo325f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge8pb6c3h2bs "And I’d like you to be a partner – from the very first day – in Making America Great Again. Join us right here and right now: ")**_
| | [PARTNER WITH TRUMP + SCALISE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvgh8teg1jhqmb646i8e908fsgvjo71tnric03g0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge8pb6c3h2bs "PARTNER WITH TRUMP + SCALISE")
---

I'll be the first to admit - the next four years won't be easy.

The Radical Left is ALREADY plowing ahead with their plot to undermine President Trump's second term. _Heck, they sued DOGE within seconds of Trump 's Oath of Office, and they're charging ahead to stall, block, and derail the quick approval of Trump's Cabinet._

**But with you by our side, we can do anything we put our minds to.** President Trump and I will always hold the line when the future of America hangs in the balance.

I look forward to working with the President to save this great country of ours. _**[And I want you by our side through it all. Will you join our efforts to bring forth the Golden Age for America?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsbjma7h1l39kvp8tm0gc0mpg10ihg4cohvmpbbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge8pb6c3h2bs "But I want you by our side through it all. Will you join our efforts to bring forth the Golden Age for America?")**_
| [PARTNER WITH TRUMP + SCALISE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zssb6cvv9ro3sl06nds4ovh6ng9vunb29cm3mlv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge8pb6c3h2bs "PARTNER WITH TRUMP + SCALISE")
---

_Together - you, me, and President Trump - will make history!_

For America,
Steve Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3uqvjc724rb5k107irps2pmvq2q8p3rsfm88eco_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge8pb6c3h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z07am99017ttdbp6kqqfigd6hr97c6tjpmiopfag_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge8pb6c3h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_

Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: American Briefing
subject: What Democrats, Corporate Media Said About Potential Preemptive Pardons From Trump Four Years Ago
body:
And ‘Disastrously Bad’: Ex-CNN Analyst Goes Scorched Earth On Biden
Pardons

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfk9soo692jb3f35f72ho7bvesetkgptp4mr2928_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge4ob2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7k9r7b9jhe9qb0t9jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuj72sjkm1qjf8jl64qb4t9m65rucdjnqkqr8d5hmngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpicdjnqpon4t5gekqb2df4c9imcpr1ccj3ctunmcpjct9heng669hmevajcs3lsmq39cdn6lpr49fg

name: David McIntosh
subject: Progressives are out for revenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth Action and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The fight for 2026 has already started. The Left isn’t waiting, and neither can we.

| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8in2q9d491k8s2i6644o7l9cro7lb0b1ubeb8o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge4ob2cth2bs)
---
Friend, Conservatives won big in 2024, flipping seats and securing a pro-growth majority in the House and Senate. **But progressives are out for revenge, and they’re coming after us with everything they’ve got in 2026.****_[**_FIGHT BACK NOW >>_**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zlrditkm784bms1kevsjn5l0kbt4u7uj55u5aq1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge4ob2cth2bs)_** The stakes couldn’t be higher. If we let progressives take back control, they’ll ram through their radical agenda—trillions in new spending, higher taxes, and bigger government. _We can’t let that happen._ That’s why Club for Growth Action is building the largest war chest we’ve ever assembled to defend our majority.**__[But we need YOU to make it possible.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zjt4c1o7n09hcgn8uikd9usvpar80857fqpt0tk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge4ob2cth2bs)**

President Donald J. Trump is officially back behind the ivory walls of the White House, and his pen is READY!
Hi Friend,

The wait is finally over, and the 47th President of the United States is ready to work for the people of our great nation and SAVE America from the Radical Left. That is why we're reaching out to you today to ensure he tackles the issues that matter most to his top supporters like YOU!

**So please, take our one-question survey and tell us: What's the FIRST thing you want President Trump to sign into law? Is it border security? Is it tax reform? Is it something else entirely?**

name: Majority Leader Scalise
subject: President Trump: "Steve Scalise is our hero... here he is, the picture of strength"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m honored to have stood next to him on the day he was sworn in as our 47th President.

| |
---
| | | **President Trump: "Steve Scalise is our hero... here he is, the picture of strength"**
Hi, this is Steve Scalise. I'm humbled by President Trump's words. And I'm honored to have stood next to him on the day he was sworn in as our 47th President.

_We share a vision for the future of our country. Together, we 'll help usher in the Golden Age for America. I will work alongside the leader of our Party to: _
- Secure our border and build The Wall
- Mandate voter ID requirements in all 50 states
- End woke propaganda in our schools and military
- Unleash American energy
- Restore law and order in America
- Eliminate government waste with Elon Musk and DOGE
- End the political weaponization of our government
_**[And I'd like you to be a partner - from the very first day - in Making America Great Again. Join us right here and right now:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1q2qvdp9omm4ehcpl970iq50gbdn1phg7hhvp50_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge4ob2cph2bs "And I’d like you to be a partner – from the very first day – in Making America Great Again. Join us right here and right now: ")**_
| | [PARTNER WITH TRUMP + SCALISE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z12lcbggl8tipvjrqjunkven8p9jjhekb18ajui0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge4ob2cph2bs "PARTNER WITH TRUMP + SCALISE")
---

I'll be the first to admit - the next four years won't be easy.

The Radical Left is ALREADY plowing ahead with their plot to undermine President Trump's second term. _Heck, they sued DOGE within seconds of Trump 's Oath of Office, and they're charging ahead to stall, block, and derail the quick approval of Trump's Cabinet._

**But with you by our side, we can do anything we put our minds to.** President Trump and I will always hold the line when the future of America hangs in the balance.

I look forward to working with the President to save this great country of ours. _**[And I want you by our side through it all. Will you join our efforts to bring forth the Golden Age for America?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zekcmpoj6r70s47ppe9ifshtp8th4c2845hqg6ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge4ob2cph2bs "But I want you by our side through it all. Will you join our efforts to bring forth the Golden Age for America?")**_
| [PARTNER WITH TRUMP + SCALISE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztun5re2i3d5n1hol694ogm8n50cbb9qkghfltl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge4ob2cph2bs "PARTNER WITH TRUMP + SCALISE")
---

_Together - you, me, and President Trump - will make history!_

For America,
Steve Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlg2avqcg0qpiak2fpus9bk9qgebrud23i50b1sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge4ob2cph2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Trump’s nominees need your help immediately
body:
The left is throwing every nasty attack they have, hoping to peel off squishy GOP senators.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** Donald Trump is officially back in the White House conducting business and he needs his Cabinet to help get work done. Two of the most urgent confirmation hearings coming up are Pete Hegseth for Secretary of Defense and Russell Vought for Director of the Office of Management and Budget (OMB). The left has launched a campaign named "Nix the Noms" where they flood Senator's offices with calls telling them not to confirm President Trump's nominees.
We knew it wouldn't take long for the left to try and derail the president's plans, which is why he needs your help. It's time to get involved and call your senators, regardless of party affiliation, and tell them to confirm Pete Hegseth and Russell Vought, because that's what America voted for. Soon, the Senate will also vote to confirm Kristi Noem, Director of DNI, and John Ratcliffe, Director of the CIA, but right now the left is coming out hard against Hegseth and Vought.
**Pete Hegseth
** Pete Hegseth's hearings have wrapped up, and the Senate is likely to vote on his nomination soon, but they are pulling out their Brett Kavanaugh play against Hegseth. They're using a far-left ex-sister-in-law to make crazy accusations and will try to use the accusations to convince the wobbly GOP senators to vote against him. That's why it is REALLY important to email and call in support of Hegseth as soon as possible, even if you've already emailed and called. **To support Pete Hegseth, go to our **[**Confirm Pete Hegseth action page**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9531b84/1edb9794a9527ca5)** right away.****
****Russell Vought
** Russell Vought served as the Director of OMB in Trump's last administration. He is scheduled for a hearing with the Senate Budget Committee tomorrow (January 22nd) and the left is determined to block him. Vought served as deputy director of OMB starting in 2018 before appointed as acting director to his confirmation as director in July 2020. Democrat Senator Chuck Schumer has made it clear that he will do whatever he can to stop Vought. **To support Russell Vought, go to our **[**Confirm Russell Vought action pag e**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9531b84/1edb9794a9527ca7)** right away.****
****To Support All of Them
** All of President Trump's nominees will need your support. That's why we have you covered with our [**Confirm Trump 's Nominees action page**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9531b84/1edb9794a9527ca9 "https://www.patriotproject.com/petition/trump-nominees"). Filling out this form will send a single email to your Senator telling them that you support all of President Trump's nominees.
However, there is a need for an extra hard push for the nominees who the left vehemently opposes, which is why we also have the [**Support Trump 's Nominees hub**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9531b84/1edb9794a9527cab "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/nominees") where you can find all of the other nominees who need your support as we work to Make American Great Again!

Two of the most urgent confirmation hearings coming up are Pete Hegseth for Secretary of Defense and Russell Vought for Director of the Office of Management and Budget (OMB). The left has launched a campaign named "Nix the Noms" where they flood Senator's offices with calls telling them not to confirm President Trump's nominees. We knew it wouldn't take long for the left to try and derail the president's plans, which is why he needs your help. It's time to get involved and call your senators, regardless of party affiliation, and tell them to confirm Pete Hegseth and Russell Vought, because that's what America voted for. subject: Progressives are out for revenge

body:
The fight for 2026 has already started. The Left isn’t waiting, and neither can we.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt30t36156jrmbjpq8ag0aibo728qsgfn4e3pp1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge2oj6c5h2bs)
---
Friend, Conservatives won big in 2024, flipping seats and securing a pro-growth majority in the House and Senate. **But progressives are out for revenge, and they’re coming after us with everything they’ve got in 2026.****_[**_FIGHT BACK NOW_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf7fhg3lpo7bbd3s77maoeuaifohg6n35qsdnidg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge2oj6c5h2bs)_** The stakes couldn’t be higher. If we let progressives take back control, they’ll ram through their radical agenda—trillions in new spending, higher taxes, and bigger government. _We can’t let that happen._ That’s why Club for Growth Action is building the largest war chest we’ve ever assembled to defend our majority.**__[But we need YOU to make it possible.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0n5mumtohc14q96ctbse2tkd1b6ll49sdo43ci8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge2oj6c5h2bs)**

body:
Cloture - The suppression of the Majority's Voice | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7622ce6948ee/n41kepo7ku-12727792?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4f371d4426&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

_"And he gives grace generously, As the Scriptures say, 'God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble'."

"Remember, it is sin to know what you ought to do and then not do it."_
**\-- James 4:6 & 17**

The Book of James is filled with encouragement and wise counsel to those who are in opposition, quarreling, or losing sight of what the Good News really mean. He writes to the "twelve tribes" seeking to connect each unique set of believers BACK to the original message that brings stability from the TRUTH of the Word. He knows that the church is scattered and growing, however reaching a point of losing spiritual definition because each tribe is claiming to be followers of Christ to their OWN understanding. A person could surmise that one tribe called themselves Conservative Believers, another Moderate Believers, another Traditional Believers.

James earnestly seeks to reestablish the truth of the Scriptures and the teachings of Jesus because he knows that without a stabilizing Truth, chaos and evil rise up. He calls them "wandering believers" that have simply lost sight of how to reason, how to discern, how to communicate, and how to disciple THROUGH the teachings of Jesus versus what the WORLD tells us.

I think we struggle as politically inclined citizens BELIEVING that "Politics" has a different lens with which we reason, discern, communicate, and counsel each other. We give credibility to "Politicos", those who have years of campaign and consultation under their belt, as the SOURCE of what is good law-making or proper governance. This is fundamentally and logically the WRONG approach to be humble elected representatives and servants to the people, State, and Nation. In fact, discerning WHO has wisdom, vision, conceptualization, and human experience will always be a pivot point to efficient and productive law-making.

James says "If you need wisdom, ask our generous God, and he will give it to you."
* * *
**WE HAVE A MATH PROBLEM!** **Cloture:** Cloture is the procedural step of ending debate on a proposal and holding a vote to determine if it will pass. In the U.S. Senate, a **three-fifths MAJORITY** is usually required to invoke cloture.
KEYWORD: MAJORITY

**Filibuster:** The use of EXTREME dilatory (procrastination) tactics (as by making long speeches) in an attempt to delay or PREVENT action especially in a legislative assembly
KEYWORDs - TACTICS, PREVENT

**The first and most important conversation that must be addressed by the Senators is the Rules. I have repeated this message weekly as it is the pivot point to which all opportunity for a productive legislative session hinges on.**

_If our Cloture threshold, the amount of votes it takes to end a filibuster, is not lowered to match the Governor's veto we will have a very frustrating session._
10 other states have differing Governor Veto and Filibuster thresholds but none with as HIGH of a threshold to the cloture AND as a Unicameral, we don't have an offsetting House or Senate to provide a differing governing body to move legislation forward.

See...our Unicameral is held hostage from effective law-making by those who repeat subjective truths to what a MAJORITY is...AND it is held hostage by those who ABUSE the rules.

We are fighting against a narrative that believes that within our THREE vote process for laws, if a law doesn't reach 2/3's or 33 votes of the 49 Senators it must NOT be what the people of Nebraska want. You see...Invoking Cloture is NOT a reference to whether a bill is good or bad, right or wrong, constitutional, fiscally sound, or a VISION for the FUTURE...no, invoking cloture is ONLY a reference to IF a MAJORITY has determined enough DEBATE has occurred in the process.

Think about this... it take 25 Senators to PASS ANY LAW, but we've determined **the validity or the merit of the law** to be passed is BASED upon the ability to say we've exhausted all debate (or in fairness, given an opportunity for ALL voices to be heard).

In other words, EVEN IF 25 Senators are ready to represent their constituents and vote immediately, and would vote to pass a bill, 33 Senators determine the fate of the bill, IF AND ONLY IF THEY BELIEVE ENOUGH OXYGEN HAS BEEN USED UP DISCUSSING IT.

And the interesting thing...is we've given a HIGHER level of importance to the debate that occurs ON THE FLOOR, than ANY other discussions that occur over say...the last year, month, week, day, in offices, over the phone, emails from constituents, meetings with special interests, etc. Senators talk on the floor and no one is listening!

The only discussion that is considered the HIGHEST form of discourse is that which falls within the windows of floor debate at 8, 4, and 2 hour intervals. This seemingly means that the dissenting VOICE has the GREATER of IMPORTANCE to the bill's merit because the dissenting voice uses (or abuses) the floor debate time. The integrity of the Unicameral was eroded last year as we watched 4-5 Senators monopolize and subvert the will of even their own colleagues to pass good legislation.

Were they elected to be law-inhibitors, law-destroyers, law-impeders OR...to be law-makers? Not a single Senator runs a campaign on the laws they will stop, but indicates the laws they will MAKE!

_**Now...here is where math comes in and the people of Nebraska need to determine what a MAJORITY really means and if this is a constitutional and representative republic.**_

We've taken the number 49 as a representation of Nebraska's voters, or potential voters, or all of Nebraska. BUT if the amount of votes it takes to become 1 of the 49 VARIES dramatically, then we actually don't operate by majority rule. We operate by an inverse, imbalanced WEIGHTED approach to the 49 Senators who pass laws.

REMEMBER: For context, EACH Legislative District is approximately 40,000 Nebraskans and has an approximate equivalent amount of **POTENTIAL (18yr or older)** VOTERS. Not all districts have equal amounts of REGISTERED voters.

Did you know that **11 out of 16 Democrats** are voted in by 8,000 voters or LESS; AND
**27 out of 33 Republicans** are voted in by 8,000 voters or MORE?!?

**20 out of 33 R's - 9,000 voters or more
9 out of 33 R's - 10,000 voters or more**

The number of voters who voted FOR our **33 Republican Senators is 308,894** (This is from General Election results of 2022 & 2024). Only Senator Kauth has had two elections since the last census redistricting and I used ONLY her most recent win for calculations, but you can see the differences between federal cycles that were Presidential (2024) and Gubernatorial (2022). Several races did not have a challenger therefore you have the same number for "Winner" and "Total".

Combined, the number of voters who VOTED FOR all 49 Senators is 429,428. Meaning our [**33** **Republican Senators represent 71.93%**](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=422301c7b8&e=25844e23a8) of the voters voting in 2022 and 2024. THIS IS WELL ABOVE a MAJORITY threshold of 50%, 3/5's, or 2/3's. In context, when the Democrats excessively filibuster, 28.07% of Nebraskans have a voice with greater importance than 71.93% Furthermore, If you were to take the 25 Republican Senators with highest voter totals over the last 2 elections cycles, **THEY represent 59.12% of the voters.** The truth of our current "Rules" means that almost 60% of voting Nebraskans, who are represented by 25 Republican Senators, are not seemingly a MAJORITY because they are inversely imbalanced by needing 8 more Senators to move a bill forward.

And, YES, if we moved the Cloture threshold down to 3/5's or 30 it IS an improvement, but it implies that 67.86% of voting Nebraskans, represented by 30 Republican Senators, is necessary to AGAIN...just END DISCUSSION...to end the filibuster.

Look at the **[amount of voters in TOTAL](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=906eef21fe&e=25844e23a8)** from each election and it becomes clear where our current Rules establish an inverse, imbalanced weighted MAJORITY

25 Highest Voting LD's - 421,974 - 60.55% 19R's/6D's
33 Highest Voting LD's - 528,277 - 75.80% 24R's/9D's
Total Voters in LD's 2022 & 2024 - 696,868
30 Highest Voting LD's - 488,759 - 70.13% 22R's/8D's

The Bottom FIVE Total turnout has two Senators who did not have challengers (Senator Ibach & McKinney).

The bottom THREE Senators are elected by almost a 1/4 of what the Top Three Senators are elected by.

Lastly, there is another narrative about Rural versus Urban or Congressional Districts and the level of conservatism. First off, a REPUBLICAN President nominee - Donald Trump, **[won 91 out of 93 Counties](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=9e152acaf4&e=25844e23a8)** in Nebraska. Click the link to see the numerical order, but it took ALL 93 counties to get a total vote.

As for Legislative Districts, we have several that cross between Congressional Districts so it's really divisive to say one CD is more representative over another. In fact, the voters of Washington county have been in ALL THREE Congressional Districts over the last 30 years as the lines get redrawn. Imagine that in the context of who your Congressman is, one year CD3, another decade CD2, another decade it was CD1.

CD1 - 10R Sen - 100,170
CD2 - 12R Sen. - 106,413
CD3 - 18R Sen. - 169,568

This is an approximation of representation for Republicans in each CD, but by overlapping Legislative Districts. As we can see, there is definitely more Republicans in CD3, but that's not ALL the rural communities in Nebraska and it's hard to really segment districts that have a mixture of urban and rural and how is that different from Lincoln/Omaha, rural/urban and say, Grand Island rural/urban.

The interesting thing to note is that approximately 21 out of 33 Republicans would represent Rural areas and 48.23% of Nebraskans.(almost enough Senators to pass ANY BILL)🤔 The argument that rural Senators are going to lose their voice if cloture is dropped to 30 is a misnomer. The number of rural to urban shift in representation has not changed dramatically in DECADES and ...to be envisioning the 2030 census redistricting...more than likely... 5 out of 8 Rural Republican Senators will be on the Redistricting Committee and they would have to PURPOSELY draw lines to lose rural representation.

Rural - 21R's - 207,123 - 48.23%

Now is the time for BOLD leadership to see the need for modernization our Unicameral process and listen to the Will of the People. **"3/5 for Vetoes, 3/5 for Cloture: A Balanced Approach"**
**"30 for the Governor, 30 for the people. It's common sense."**
The truth shall set us free.
Blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood
---
| | This was the VISION and OBJECTIVE TRUTHS of 2024...nothing changes without YOU.
2025 NEGOP VISION
In 2025, the Republican Party of Nebraska is going ALL-IN on the VALUES of Education, ALL-IN on Election Accountability and Voter Verification, ALL-IN on Tax Reform, ALL-IN on Protecting Human Rights. This will come to fruition in our Legislative Plan and through the voices of the people who will expect the very most from their elected representatives. The groundwork has been completed and in 2025 it will all come down to a choice by EVERY Republican. The choice is to remove oneself from the party politics and personalities normally associated with power and money AND engage at the doorstep of Nebraskans sharing the truth of our values because our values bring the solutions to local struggles of taxes, community safety, election security, & educational excellence. The Values of the Republican Party resonate with Nebraskans. We are reaching out and connecting in 2025 and this will be a victory for Conservative Principles.

Nebraskans are thirsting for people of courage, people of honesty and truth...they are hungry for leaders to say what they are going to do...AND...then DO what they say! I am beyond measure proud of the Republican grassroots and coalitions. They HAVE created stability within this organization.

Every false narrative sowing chaos is an attempt by those who seek their power back. The Republicans who prioritize our principles are actively fulfilling the objectives of the party by doing maintenance of the government of, by, and for the people AND furthering their principles within the community. And this effort will continue to grow and grow as more principled Republicans join the efforts. I see this growth and stability EVERYWHERE in Nebraska now. Dixon County, Seward County, Gage County, York County, Sarpy County, Saline County, Madison, Keith, Hall, and on and on...and the growth and stability is coming FROM the people. From leaders of the party, who CHOOSE to grow and build their counties because the people matter and connecting people to our values matters. Common Nebraskans, who say enough is enough...who choose to sacrifice their time to become better every day and engage more volunteers to make more engagement opportunities. From County Chairs and Secretaries, committeemen and women, elected officials to candidates, they SEE the reality of what strong, healthy County Parties can do. These next 3-4 months there will be a purposeful and respectful focus of engagement to demographics and people who share conservative values. We are going ALL-IN on to be a resource for local campaigns and local elected positions such as school boards, city council, county seats, NRD's, power boards. We are going ALL-IN on people of Nebraska who make Nebraska the ‘Good Life’. –Chairman Underwood
---
