name: Bill Cassidy
subject: We Have No Choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Do you agree?

President Trump has a powerful message on the deportation of the millions of illegal immigrants who entered the U.S. under Joe Biden's reign:

**_["We have no choice."](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3ci0d12hl52jnobr5tncqoi72sbvcqcvdge17h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5geaor3c3h2bs)_**

And he's right.

_Under Joe Biden, millions of illegal immigrants poured into our country with no consequences. and American families have paid the price._

We simply have no choice but to send those illegal immigrants back -- _and I 'm ready to work with President Trump to carry out the largest deportation operation in history._

_**[We're ready to deport millions of illegal immigrants and secure our border -- and I want to know if you're with us.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8g5kdm5oaf9fep69ig62m4d9jd3hvqn687nmvlo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5geaor3c3h2bs)**_
**[Do you support President Trump's plan to deport millions of illegal immigrants?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcmaq8c6q90jteovnd2qh9ovfrqharue16ml65eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5geaor3c3h2bs)**

******************************************************[YES](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkdpof3ef048cdf5vb0hbcekb849n8kv7slh73so_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5geaor3c3h2bs)****************************************************** ******************************************************[NO](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2jeka5evur5vu43djk5i2e7l215mqkei20usrq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5geaor3c3h2bs)******************************************************

Thank you,
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1tu2nogtlkhffps6521gvv5snsqgveihepusjko_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5geaor3c3h2bs)
Senator Bill Cassidy

******************************************************[TAKE THE POLL>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8pg2vljhvi3l0akh12v2p3joh1p9ng9de1i6afg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5geaor3c3h2bs)******************************************************

name: Bill Cassidy
subject: We Have No Choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Do you agree?

President Trump has a powerful message on the deportation of the millions of illegal immigrants who entered the U.S. under Joe Biden's reign:

**_["We have no choice."](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuntcvhs8fajlu32oauh8vrvdiings7njt73ek9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6o32c1h2bs)_**

And he's right.

_Under Joe Biden, millions of illegal immigrants poured into our country with no consequences. and American families have paid the price._

We simply have no choice but to send those illegal immigrants back -- _and I 'm ready to work with President Trump to carry out the largest deportation operation in history._

_**[We're ready to deport millions of illegal immigrants and secure our border -- and I want to know if you're with us.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z78qn42phb8r4k3df3nhtdnrsutkprlma92o6qg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6o32c1h2bs)**_
**[Do you support President Trump's plan to deport millions of illegal immigrants?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zegsm5u7e4u22brlhlj2dcjf25aagq2vl9lgm3ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6o32c1h2bs)**

******************************************************[YES](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjoofdsfdrctetedis4q2a7co3k6nnrdhbqmoq0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6o32c1h2bs)****************************************************** ******************************************************[NO](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9tnlnjjtqm7vcjkp4hfa76s6fp0phl0heik951g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6o32c1h2bs)******************************************************

Thank you,
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztma8h1fdl02l9e2sdq9s2j0hl1um6ro371mfbeg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6o32c1h2bs)
Senator Bill Cassidy

******************************************************[TAKE THE POLL>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcdph4orbva2qkc6buaq23cotsi1nafncnbn6s30_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6o32c1h2bs)******************************************************

Country icon Carrie Underwood **[had to THINK FAST](https://substack.com/redirect/b7646d8d-b3df-48c9-a6da-22e34b7638cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when an audio glitch nearly ruined her performance of "America The Beautiful," causing an awkward moment at Trump's inauguration ceremony.
But what she does next is nothing short of genius! **[Watch it right here:](https://substack.com/redirect/b7646d8d-b3df-48c9-a6da-22e34b7638cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b7646d8d-b3df-48c9-a6da-22e34b7638cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b7646d8d-b3df-48c9-a6da-22e34b7638cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented by American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/e6bf251c-f9c3-4110-8053-0309f21e8aa4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Hello Friends Bill O 'Reilly Here,**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e6bf251c-f9c3-4110-8053-0309f21e8aa4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**
And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
• More than 2 million lost jobs
• Stocks plummeting over 20%
• IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling
**We can 't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it.**
That's why I've put together **[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](https://substack.com/redirect/e6bf251c-f9c3-4110-8053-0309f21e8aa4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during this downturn.
**[Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life](https://substack.com/redirect/e6bf251c-f9c3-4110-8053-0309f21e8aa4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings.
[Get my free guide](https://substack.com/redirect/e6bf251c-f9c3-4110-8053-0309f21e8aa4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Families of Hamas hostages SURPRISE Trump, This will give you CHILLS...**
Family members of the recently released Hamas hostages gathered on stage to thank President Donald Trump during his inauguration ceremony yesterday.
"We have some special people to introduce you to tonight," the announcer said. "The are the families of hostages from Israel that have been in Gaza for the last year and a half."
Trump appears to get emotional as he sees the families walk up to him one-by-one.
What happens next might bring you to tears, **[watch below:](https://substack.com/redirect/8ed9fef2-dc72-46da-9c0f-5eb44698b8f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8ed9fef2-dc72-46da-9c0f-5eb44698b8f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8ed9fef2-dc72-46da-9c0f-5eb44698b8f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Top inauguration moment: Donald Trump dances with a sword - And Melania joins him!
President Donald Trump added **[an unexpected twist](https://substack.com/redirect/eb9a08cc-f9ce-4eea-a091-3dcd7b8c6308?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to his inaugural festivities on Monday night by dancing with a sword at the Commander-in-Chief Ball.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eb9a08cc-f9ce-4eea-a091-3dcd7b8c6308?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
After a day filled with ceremonial speeches and executive actions, Trump, alongside first lady Melania Trump, cut a military-themed cake with a ceremonial saber, then spontaneously danced to Village People's "YMCA" while still holding the sword.
The event, one of three inaugural balls attended by the president, turned heads and sparked a mix of amusement and concern among attendees. Vice President JD Vance humorously noted the Secret Service's visible discomfort with the president's impromptu performance.
Clips of the dance quickly spread across social media, igniting discussions about the president's lively spirit versus concerns over security protocols.
The balls, a tradition since President James Madison's time, are meant to celebrate the new administration but this year's event was marked by Trump's unique flair.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/eb9a08cc-f9ce-4eea-a091-3dcd7b8c6308?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump's Cabinet picks stood like spartans against a bitter democrat onslaught
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d4005366-4a2f-4fe2-9223-342f1f097c87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
Support Mayor Giuliani and get access to his latest exclusive content by becoming a PolitiBrawl paid subscriber
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..wNSE9PYi7HnhXdzwYDTCXMHb2kKp0eAKeQTT5KzM-EY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155334107)
This week, we witnessed the kind of political theater that Washington loves; the democrats were utterly humiliated by Trump's new team of spartans. Trump has chosen some of the brightest stars for his Cabinet, and they've more than proven their mettle during the Senate confirmation hearings. I'm talking, of course, about Pete Hegseth, Pam Bondi, and Kristi Noem - three individuals who not only demonstrated their qualifications but also showed the Democrats a thing or two about toughness and resilience.
Let's start with Pete Hegseth, Trump's pick for Secretary of Defense. The Democrats tried to throw everything at him - from personal smears to questioning his credentials. But Hegseth, a decorated combat veteran and a voice of reason on Fox News, stood firm. He articulated a vision for a "warrior culture" at the Pentagon, promising to be a "change agent" in an institution that desperately needs one. His responses to Senators like Elizabeth Warren, who tried to pin him down with her usual sanctimonious blather, were nothing short of masterful. Hegseth didn't just defend himself; he turned the tables, leaving Warren looking like the petty politician she is. His commitment to the military and understanding of its needs were clear, and the Democrats' attempts to portray him as unfit only highlighted their own lack of understanding of what our military needs...

Dear Peter,

Yesterday, we heard right from the source what we can expect from the Trump administration: extremism, zealotry, disinformation. We know that abortion is right in their crosshairs.

If you're ready to fight to protect our rights, I have good news: the deadline for our Inauguration Day flash match has been EXTENDED to _midnight tonight_ [**Double your impact up to our $25,000 goal and send a message that we will not back down, ever.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100725779/523690111/1474386068?sourceid=1150312&utm_campaign=25emrge-0107aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzU0YzY1ZC0wMmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-z3gXIWEIoe5oKppesx_xr8f2nOiN-6cQVXVr3Bb5Y=&emci=b9b628e8-5fd4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=a754c65d-02d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237) | [**DOUBLE YOUR GIFT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100725780/523690112/1474386068?sourceid=1150312&utm_campaign=25emrge-0107aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzU0YzY1ZC0wMmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-z3gXIWEIoe5oKppesx_xr8f2nOiN-6cQVXVr3Bb5Y=&emci=b9b628e8-5fd4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=a754c65d-02d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237 "DOUBLE YOUR GIFT")

If this administration thinks they'll have an easy time rolling back our reproductive rights, _they have another thing coming._

We'll be there at every turn, fighting to stop harmful policies before they even start, defending the rights of women forced to cross state lines for vital care, protecting the progress we've made from emboldened, extremist politicians.

**The Center is more than prepared for this fight._Are you with us?_**

Your place in this movement is more critical than ever. [**Renew your support, double your impact, and fuel the fight to protect our rights.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100725781/523690113/1474386068?sourceid=1150312&utm_campaign=25emrge-0107aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzU0YzY1ZC0wMmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-z3gXIWEIoe5oKppesx_xr8f2nOiN-6cQVXVr3Bb5Y=&emci=b9b628e8-5fd4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=a754c65d-02d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237)

Molly Duane

clean_body: Send a message | | | ---|--- Dear Peter, Yesterday, we heard right from the source what we can expect from the Trump administration: extremism, zealotry, disinformation. We know that abortion is right in their crosshairs. If you're ready to fight to protect our rights, I have good news: the deadline for our Inauguration Day flash match has been EXTENDED to midnight tonight | "DOUBLE YOUR GIFT" If this administration thinks they'll have an easy time rolling back our reproductive rights, they have another thing coming. We'll be there at every turn, fighting to stop harmful policies before they even start, defending the rights of women forced to cross state lines for vital care, protecting the progress we've made from emboldened, extremist politicians. The Center is more than prepared for this fight.Are you with us? Your place in this movement is more critical than ever. Sincerely, Molly Duane Senior Attorney P.S. Our work has already begun, amassing the factual and legal record we'll need to counter attacks on our rights from every front. "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. name: RESPONSE REQUESTED =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=94?= From Team Scalise
subject: IT’S OFFICIAL: President Trump was just sworn in. Now take our First 100 Day Survey:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Take our First 100 Day Survey >>

| |
---
| | |
* * *
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdtv0mt29568a4v8kuvugrjgjr2s4nov545pfcqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6p76chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
A big welcome goes out to our new 47th President of the United States: _Donald J. Trump!_

This moment is HUGE for Republicans across the nation, hope has finally been restored to the American People.

**Now with President Trump BACK in control, we put together a brand-new[First 100 Days Agenda Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5v5r72udshd2011ftjku6v4nbunigkj7kf7qsqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6p76chh2bs "First 100 Days Agenda Survey") to help guide our Republican Trifecta and we're asking you to take it!**

It is critical to us that you complete this survey in a timely manner. The feedback we receive will help guide our decisions in the first 100 days. Here are some key questions that we are going to ask you:
_1) Do you believe we should close the border immediately?
2) Do you agree proof of citizenship should be mandated in all 50 states?
3) Are there any issues that you think we should pay close attention to first?_
| | [FULL LIST OF QUESTIONS](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt42rmc7rt8nokkgdod7aic5lhqioodu0v7nnrk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6p76chh2bs "FULL LIST OF QUESTIONS")
---

We know you understand the importance of this survey, but we want to reiterate that we can't do our best work for YOU until we know what YOU are thinking.

So thank you in advance for participating in our _**[First 100 Days Agenda Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmn9i27d6nkcciavlsgg3rjjvj28sl53mr9055h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6p76chh2bs "First 100 Days Agenda Survey")**_. We are looking forward to reviewing your responses.

- House Republicans
_ From Team Scalise_
* * *

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3ht2qm183t8l657rnpqsh68o1gbrfcj3iibardg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6p76chh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

As your Majority Leader - my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. _**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1059i27dvg5nc1657lohmev72fchgj6d9a2vrp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6p76chh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link. ")**_

**Your input will help me better understand what we're doing well and where we can improve.**
---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY ->](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2b8orest3p9183c4bsobb0sgvet448jqneqbf9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ge6p76chh2bs)
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_
---

---

subject: 651 days
body:
Hi Friend, Yesterday, we saw the beginning of the next Trump Administration. In word and action, it is not off to a good start.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100729403/523698323/-1283252511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQ2MTQ3OGItMDVkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oPmsttV7-wSD7MbiXI1ZsP-Dp_8qpaJvZ4FfNo52J-s=&emci=650b55d1-fbd7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6d61478b-05d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=12466492)
---
| | Hi Friend,
---
Yesterday, we saw the beginning of the next Trump Administration. In word and action, it is not off to a good start.
---
Donald Trump prioritized the front-row seats of the wealthiest billionaires in the world to witness him take the oath of office as President of the United States. Representing trillions of dollars in the Capitol Rotunda, it is clear who is driving the agenda of the new Administration.
---
In his inaugural address, President Trump chose to focus on himself, the past election, and the telling of falsehoods. Instead of making a real impact in the lives of Americans, he’s kicking off his term by committing to a destructive tax and tariff agenda and pledging to rename the Gulf of Mexico.
---
With Trump’s first executive actions, he sided with criminals who attacked our democracy, withdrew from our global fight against climate change, and unleashed some of the most extreme policies in modern history on our nation.
---
Our country – our people – deserve better. We should be doing everything possible to improve the lives of Rhode Islanders and lower costs for working people. I stand ready to work with anyone to build on the progress we have seen over the last four years and go even further.
---
Make no mistake: despite the headwinds we’re facing, I’ll work to expand economic opportunity and bring people together. I’ll fight to defend our values and combat extremism. And we have 651 days until the 2026 midterm elections to win back the House majority.
---
**[Will you help me make our country a place where everyone can thrive by contributing today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100729404/523698326/570291875?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQ2MTQ3OGItMDVkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oPmsttV7-wSD7MbiXI1ZsP-Dp_8qpaJvZ4FfNo52J-s=)**
---
[**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100729405/523698327/570291875?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQ2MTQ3OGItMDVkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oPmsttV7-wSD7MbiXI1ZsP-Dp_8qpaJvZ4FfNo52J-s=)
---
While there’s uncertainty ahead, I’m ready to get to work to ensure our government works for all of us.
---
Thank you for your support,Gabe
---

clean_body: Hi Friend, Yesterday, we saw the beginning of the next Trump Administration. In word and action, it is not off to a good start.| | | | | Hi Friend, Yesterday, we saw the beginning of the next Trump Administration. In word and action, it is not off to a good start. Donald Trump prioritized the front-row seats of the wealthiest billionaires in the world to witness him take the oath of office as President of the United States. Representing trillions of dollars in the Capitol Rotunda, it is clear who is driving the agenda of the new Administration. In his inaugural address, President Trump chose to focus on himself, the past election, and the telling of falsehoods. Instead of making a real impact in the lives of Americans, he’s kicking off his term by committing to a destructive tax and tariff agenda and pledging to rename the Gulf of Mexico. With Trump’s first executive actions, he sided with criminals who attacked our democracy, withdrew from our global fight against climate change, and unleashed some of the most extreme policies in modern history on our nation. Our country – our people – deserve better. We should be doing everything possible to improve the lives of Rhode Islanders and lower costs for working people. I stand ready to work with anyone to build on the progress we have seen over the last four years and go even further. Make no mistake: despite the headwinds we’re facing, I’ll work to expand economic opportunity and bring people together. I’ll fight to defend our values and combat extremism. And we have 651 days until the 2026 midterm elections to win back the House majority. = = While there’s uncertainty ahead, I’m ready to get to work to ensure our government works for all of us. Thank you for your support,Gabe | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Gabe Amo for Congress P.O. Box 40457 Providence, RI 02940 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: The Democrats
subject: Today.
body:
Not tomorrow, not next week.
---
We're writing to ask you to make a donation to the DNC today. Not tomorrow, not next week, but **today.** Here's why: Trump was sworn in yesterday. He already has a Republican Congress at his disposal, and he’ll have a Cabinet stacked with billionaires ready to do anything they can to enact his Project 2025 agenda — no matter the harm they cause everyone else. Democrats are going to need a _huge_ sum of resources to organize and mobilize against any dangerous legislation Trump and his allies have planned. **But we’ll need to do more than that. This isn’t just about resisting Trump’s immediate plans. It’s about building the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power at the local level, in statewide office, in Congress, and beyond.** That’s why we’re asking for your help today. The truth is that the more contributions we receive now, while Trump’s term is just beginning, the more effective we can be in investing in state parties all over the country, in organizing against Trump’s worst policies, and ultimately in winning back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. [**Use this link to make a contribution to the DNC’s new 100-Day Fight Fund and we’ll put your donation to work immediately:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?amount=3&refcode=em_20250121_2623_fr&refcode2=2623_22930333_WYPCuM&akid=2623%2E22930333%2EWYPCuM) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250121_2623_fr&refcode2=2623_22930333_WYPCuM&akid=2623%2E22930333%2EWYPCuM)**

| **_The Sneaky IRS Tax Law that's Sweeping the U.S._** **Big Banks Don't Want You to Know About the Opportunity this IRS "Cheat Code" Unlocks... That Isn't Stopping it From Sweeping the U.S...** [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0-z0yAURz8N2TUDFwJ0kYWaqTo6b5xxo6sOgZsGhfwhNPX56R1qX7eHM_zuMXEJfnhtiXpPAEbvNgJA-DsCsP68xXT9Fb98PKxxbQ6rfIlNeYUPD3WHpzxZ06zfvruvalzpp-nl7-cffUg7e_r5dcGn_VitMRofClVd5Vo-OCoqbJniSigmjqwaW4WaOi21GDgiOEHZgCB03yh6tD32lW-BQkMZMCYazWgttWFSMaSg-8EpRwS979QmYvLWsC3fTErzHGs7xyq0Y87Ldj_sROA0JMTfPte9T3a8zMEVi8BpQ5v9PB0E1UXkp2uO54jOXyPh3aNEFmhNXIy_TIR3yewPuM3XZJHwrmwTkHHzjvDuyLkQBOS2BJ8J78zbH_OUcSoE_5wF1eedHu25VEJDQC7BWIz_BUF1lVq33HwIfpOKCHq595a6vYV_AQAA__99apRJ)Big banks and the IRS want to fool you! They want you to believe the only way to save for retirement is to trust the corrupt financial services industry. But this system is a digital beast that often bites the hand that feeds it! Like in 2008 during the Great Financial Crisis, or in 2020, when the "Pandemic Panic” tanked the economy. However, _you have options_. [**Did you know that you can move your IRA or 401(k) out of their hands, and KEEP your tax-advantaged status?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0-z0yAURz8N2TUDFwJ0kYWaqTo6b5xxo6sOgZsGhfwhNPX56R1qX7eHM_zuMXEJfnhtiXpPAEbvNgJA-DsCsP68xXT9Fb98PKxxbQ6rfIlNeYUPD3WHpzxZ06zfvruvalzpp-nl7-cffUg7e_r5dcGn_VitMRofClVd5Vo-OCoqbJniSigmjqwaW4WaOi21GDgiOEHZgCB03yh6tD32lW-BQkMZMCYazWgttWFSMaSg-8EpRwS979QmYvLWsC3fTErzHGs7xyq0Y87Ldj_sROA0JMTfPte9T3a8zMEVi8BpQ5v9PB0E1UXkp2uO54jOXyPh3aNEFmhNXIy_TIR3yewPuM3XZJHwrmwTkHHzjvDuyLkQBOS2BJ8J78zbH_OUcSoE_5wF1eedHu25VEJDQC7BWIz_BUF1lVq33HwIfpOKCHq595a6vYV_AQAA__99apRJ) **Have you heard about Section 408(m)(3)?** It's a little-known cousin of Section 401(k) of IRS code. I like to call it the "cheat code" that **unlocks REAL assets** you simply can't find anywhere else.** Section 408(m)(3) lets you open a Precious Metals "Self Directed" IRA and put REAL gold and silver into a tax-advantaged account. Here are three good reasons to consider this IRS "cheat code"... **#1:** Gold is the time-honored safehaven where the smart money flees in times of economic crisis. **#2:** Unlike the dollar, gold maintains its purchasing power over time. **#3:** If something catastrophic happens to the dollar, gold can be used as currency around the world. **While you still can:** Get a FREE Info Kit on Gold, and the IRS "Cheat Code" to legally move your IRA or 401(k) to precious metals. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: The West's unlikely cure for nervous men
body:
Thom Nickels | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Thom Nickels:_ Owen Wister and the ‘Western Cure’_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b1a37d6eaa&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| "... Mitchell diagnosed Wister with a severe case of neurasthenia and suggested a trip to a Wyoming ranch.

Mitchell had developed a system for treating nervous men, and that was to send them to the west where they could rope cattle, hunt, ride horses, and engage in male bonding rituals. In his 1871 book, Wear and Tear: Or Hints for the Overworked, Mitchell encouraged nervous men to go west in order to reinforce their masculinity and to test their willpower.

.. Even “Rough Rider” Teddy Roosevelt returned from his western cure without what his detractors called his “former effeminate looks” and “high voice that often provided comparison to Oscar Wilde.”

These were different times, indeed..."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ed2342694a&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
|
---
|
## About Thom Nickels:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=934e765c48&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Thom Nickels is a Philadelphia-based journalist/columnist and the 2005 recipient of the AIA Lewis Mumford Award for Architectural Journalism. He writes for City Journal, New York, and Frontpage Magazine. Thom Nickels is the author of fifteen books, including “[Literary Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7a14aadde6&e=b7b3eddce2)” and ”[From Mother Divine to the Corner Swami: Religious Cults in Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=167c10128b&e=b7b3eddce2).” His latest is “[Death in Philadelphia: The Murder of Kimberly Ernest](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4d5f45b92b&e=b7b3eddce2).” He is currently at work on “The Last Romanian Princess and Her World Legacy,” about the life of Princess Ileana of Romania.

name: Gay Valimont
subject: We Can’t Pretend Trump is Qualified; Let’s do Better

body:
| | |
---
Half of Trump’s supporters will argue he will “boost the economy,” he’ll “put more money in your pocket,” and “ensure America comes first.”**What they won’t mention is how often he lies, cuts corners, and disregards the very state he lives in.** I’m Gay Valimont, a Floridian mom running for FL-1 because I'm sick of the lies. April 1st special elections are nearing, and we are behind on the resources we need to fight off the orange menace in office. **You can help.**
---
---
From claiming his tax cuts primarily helped working families to exaggerating job growth during his administration, the former president has a track record of spinning the truth to serve his narrative. Here are just a few of the economic myths Trump has peddled: **❌Inflated Job Creation Numbers:** Trump often took credit for job growth trends that began long before his presidency, ignoring the contributions of previous administrations and the hardworking Americans behind the numbers. **❌Tax Cuts for the Wealthy:** His 2017 tax plan was marketed as a benefit for the middle class, but in reality, the vast majority of the benefits went to corporations and the wealthy. **❌Misleading Wage Growth Claims:** Trump frequently touted wage increases, but those gains often failed to outpace inflation, leaving workers with little to no real improvement in their purchasing power. These economic distortions weren’t just misleading—they hurt working families in Florida’s 1st District and across the nation. **[While Trump pushed policies to benefit the wealthy and well-connected, hardworking Americans shouldered the burden. Pledging just $7 can show the true will of my district, and STOP Trump from spewing anymore nonsense.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100731664/523703765/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjhlMTI5NjQtMDhkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xC7hppZDnlucy8a8WfdUq_DdBOkrK3mxZ_X0j_DwfCs=)**

subject: we know you support expanding Social Security!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
you must have missed our original message
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22780%2E4449941%2EGdqPB_)
---
Hello,

Last week, we sent you an urgent poll asking if you support expanding Social Security benefits after President Biden signed a major Social Security bill into law!

But our records indicate that you still haven’t responded. **You’re one of the last [21] Democrats from your state that we need to complete our data!**

**[_Social Security provides support for millions of senior citizens, we can’t understate how important this is. Please complete now »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22780%2E4449941%2EGdqPB_)** | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22780%2E4449941%2EGdqPB_)
---
We’ve attached the original message below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

— FORWARDED MESSAGE —
Subject: re: Expanded Social Security benefits in your state
From: Review by 11:59PM [FFR]
**ACTION REQUIRED: YOU MUST SUBMIT RESPONSE BY 11:59 PM**
[]()
**[_Do you agree we need to expand Social Security and save it from Republican cuts and save our seniors?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22780%2E4449941%2EGdqPB_)** | **[Yes, I agree! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22780%2E4449941%2EGdqPB_)**
---
**[No, I don’t agree »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=22780%2E4449941%2EGdqPB_)**
**[I’m not sure »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=22780%2E4449941%2EGdqPB_)**
**_WE NEED 150 LOCAL RESPONSES BY 01/21/2025, 11:59 PM ET_ **
Look, President Biden and Democrats know this is a critical program for millions of Americans.

We’re SO glad to have a President who cares about our nation’s Seniors, unlike President Trump who tried to GUT millions from Social Security when he was in office!

To make matters worse, once Trump takes office, making CUTS to Social Security is one of his TOP priorities. _NO!!!_

**We have absolutely NO DATA on how top Democrats feel about this, so that’s why we’re reaching out to you.**
**[_Do you agree we need to expand Social Security and save it from Republican cuts and save our seniors?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=13&akid=22780%2E4449941%2EGdqPB_)** | **[Yes, I agree! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=14&akid=22780%2E4449941%2EGdqPB_)**
---
**[No, I don’t agree »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=15&akid=22780%2E4449941%2EGdqPB_)**
**[I’m not sure »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=16&akid=22780%2E4449941%2EGdqPB_)**
**_WE NEED 150 LOCAL RESPONSES BY 01/21/2025, 11:59 PM ET_ **
We can’t let MAGA Republicans demolish our earned benefits.

We really need you to speak up, team.

Fight For Reform

For Human Trafficking Awareness Month, Jaco Booyens joined the Moms for America Podcast. Through Jaco Booyens Ministries, he has
been on the frontlines of protecting children around the world from the threats of human sex trafficking and abuse. Today, abuse
often happens when children are online; this means they face serious dangers in their own homes, leaving parents blindsided. Jaco

President Trump's Dream Team: Who They Are and Why They Were Chosen, Part 2

America is roaring back. This week's celebrations welcoming the new Trump administration are unprecedented in their scale and
hopeful tenor. The work is about to begin as the confetti rains down on all whose diligence, sacrifice, and prayer brought victory
to this historic campaign season.

In the shadow of the inauguration, confirmation hearings continue as Trump's team prepares to take their places. We're looking at
16 more talented and capable people poised to take pivotal roles in our government.

clean_body: For Human Trafficking Awareness Month, we're talking to an expert with tips for keeping kids safe from emerging threats. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] January 21, 2025 • Newsletter Jaco Booyens: Protecting Children Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] For Human Trafficking Awareness Month, Jaco Booyens joined the Moms for America Podcast. Through Jaco Booyens Ministries, he has been on the frontlines of protecting children around the world from the threats of human sex trafficking and abuse. Today, abuse often happens when children are online; this means they face serious dangers in their own homes, leaving parents blindsided. Jaco offers moms tips for protecting kids before they become victims. Like, share and subscribe. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] [] President Trump's Dream Team: Who They Are and Why They Were Chosen, Part 2 America is roaring back. This week's celebrations welcoming the new Trump administration are unprecedented in their scale and hopeful tenor. The work is about to begin as the confetti rains down on all whose diligence, sacrifice, and prayer brought victory to this historic campaign season. In the shadow of the inauguration, confirmation hearings continue as Trump's team prepares to take their places. We're looking at 16 more talented and capable people poised to take pivotal roles in our government. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Are you one of the few who knows this about retirement?
body:
| Hi Peter, How long will your retirement last? While none of us can see the future, many of us tend to underestimate how long we'll be retired.1
---
| [ ](https://financeinsights.net/rw6rfB3JLiB885QUQkk6Jsp1bK2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
This is partly because we might not have a clear picture of today's longer life expectancy - life spans tend to increase by about three years with each generation.1 And as a result, it's easy to misjudge just how much we'll need for a comfortable retirement.1 Surprisingly, many people also overestimate the amount they've saved for retirement.1 Together, these financial blind spots can create real challenges when it comes to preparing for the future. And those aren't the only misconceptions that may be affecting your retirement plan. **[Want to discover the key lessons most retirees wish they knew sooner? Click here to check them out.](https://financeinsights.net/rw6rfB3JLiB885QUQkk6Jsp1bK2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)** Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223

clean_body: | Hi Peter, How long will your retirement last? While none of us can see the future, many of us tend to underestimate how long we'll be retired.1 | This is partly because we might not have a clear picture of today's longer life expectancy - life spans tend to increase by about three years with each generation.1 And as a result, it's easy to misjudge just how much we'll need for a comfortable retirement.1 Surprisingly, many people also overestimate the amount they've saved for retirement.1 Together, these financial blind spots can create real challenges when it comes to preparing for the future. And those aren't the only misconceptions that may be affecting your retirement plan. Sincerely, Reid Rasner - CEO Omnivest Financial (307) 337-1223 * P.S. What have you learned from any loved ones and/or coworkers who've already retired? Do you see them as a model or a cautionary tale? Why? Hit "reply" and share your story. I'd love to hear your insights on retirement and how your relationships and experiences have shaped those. Sources 1\. name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: You can send diapers to the fire victims
body:
As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

| [ ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvmv51focqmhggi9kjoc1vqo3dpvcm19dod37fkg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ie4pj4c5h2bs)
---
#
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq8hfg1shuprgfdc3ilnorp9samog9c5m2n9orug_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ie4pj4c5h2bs)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdsskcg7iett555rjv35l1utnmjsn401iouj9um8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ie4pj4c5h2bs)**

Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsqotv6ttv4o9ql3ph2l0vv54u79ipr064tdlmq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ie4pj4c5h2bs)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

Trump Train News

body:
As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

| [ ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgqk0rg94rr814l5ki42u0rbma80mq76ta6trvh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5iecoj6c1h2bs)

#
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z06e0bukkf0l1lvgidutrgihhstm254dgp9d12ho_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5iecoj6c1h2bs)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3d0g8q73sr031g2v4o3547rvo345jnaqto9tbd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5iecoj6c1h2bs)**

Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time.

For Life,

Lila Rose

| | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[Sen. Cruz Reintroduces No Tax on Tips Act:](http://trk.tedcruz._Y7T9iiBNGTxw)** "Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, on Thursday reintroduced a bill that would exempt tips from federal taxes. The bipartisan No Tax on Tips Act, backed by Democratic Sens. Jacky Rosen and Catherine Cortez Masto of Nevada and Republican Sens. Pete Ricketts of Nebraska and Steve Daines of Montana, would "amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to eliminate the application of the income tax on qualified tips through a deduction allowed to all individual taxpayers, and for other purposes." Cruz introduced similar legislation in the 118th Congress...." **[Cruz Secures Promise From Trump AG Pick Pam Bondi To Investigate Missing Children:](http://trk.tedcruz.-j1WOrXB8q66Z-D28g)** "President-elect Donald Trump's nominee for U.S. Attorney General has promised to make every effort to investigate and find the 300,000 missing children who entered the country illegally at the southern border. U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) posed the question to Pam Bondi at her confirmation hearing in the U.S. Senate on Wednesday. Cruz also asked Bondi if she is willing to get trafficked children out of abusive situations "that the federal government has put them into." The former Florida attorney general replied..." **[Ted Cruz Absolutely Wrecks Senate Democrats During Pam Bondi Hearing:](http://trk.tedcruz._ABR-WRtbxB0cvtVYOmbg)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) minced absolutely no words when it was his turn to question Attorney General nominee Pam Bondi during her confirmation hearing. Throughout the proceedings, Democratic senators tried desperately to make it appear as if Bondi would use her position to target enemies of President-elect Donald Trump. Several left-leaning lawmakers used this line of attack, questioning her about comments she previously made about going after "bad" prosecutors. Cruz turned this tactic back on Democrats, listing..." **[Sen. Cruz Rips Move To Lift Cuba Terror Designation:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, whose father was tortured and imprisoned in Cuba before fleeing to the U.S., condemned the Biden administration's announcement Tuesday that it will lift the U.S. designation of the Communist-led island nation as a state sponsor of terrorism. It is the latest in a number of environmental, immigration, and foreign-policy decisions the Biden administration has taken in its final days before President-elect Donald Trump returns to the White House on Monday. "Today's decision is unacceptable on its merits," Cruz said in a news release..." **[Senator Ted Cruz To Present Justice For Jocelyn Act Before Congress:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Senator Ted Cruz is pushing for Congress to support a bill called the Justice for Jocelyn Act. The bill is named after a 12-year-old Houston girl who prosecutors say was murdered by two undocumented immigrants from Venezuela on June 16, 2024. To learn more, KPRC 2 anchor Andy Cerota spoke with Senator Cruz about his plans to introduce it for a second time before congress. Andy Cerota: Thank you so much for joining us. I want to jump right in here. What compelled you to get involved and work with the Nungaray family to create this..." **[](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9HcmFzc3Jvb3RzLU5ld3NsZXR0ZXItNzhfMjAyNDA4MTYmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1HcmFzc3Jvb3RzLU5ld3NsZXR0ZXItNzgmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9MjQmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/iAf-ur756SL-SPmLV4MmyQ)[](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9HcmFzc3Jvb3RzLU5ld3NsZXR0ZXItNzlfMjAyNDA4MjEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1HcmFzc3Jvb3RzLU5ld3NsZXR0ZXItNzkmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9MjQmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/zxtDXoLGzGNKkcbgur6Aeg)[](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9HcmFzc3Jvb3RzLU5ld3NsZXR0ZXItODdfMjAyNTAxMTAmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1HcmFzc3Jvb3RzLU5ld3NsZXR0ZXItODcmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9MjUmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/3Hvg_0GphxveD0f_cUiHiQ)[Send Ted Cruz Support Right Now>>](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9HcmFzc3Jvb3RzLU5ld3NsZXR0ZXItODhfMjAyNTAxMTcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1HcmFzc3Jvb3RzLU5ld3NsZXR0ZXItODgmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9MjUmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/J-TLjW4BrsjhX9OQ6g58Rw)**

body:
Yet, there is cause for hope - a historic twist of fate has given us a unique opportunity to stop the rising black tide (for now). If he was a shoo-in, MAGA wouldn’t need to pump millions into the district.
---
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquU-upYfKbMaiFacMQ1owrS1t9qJQKW_NpihtdP09BWcPh0eNEFoXGwCWVZyNGnCvlGC7r5eeMDstzauKEoX6n9grkc-i4r2bpdsg69A4GCKFG8LBTWSaNaRY0kOyiTrj4j6yBAVnpM1vtdFtB8-wmHvtFz1bvPGCgmr17tF6kyEonxIVfQjlzvenqGUjG9Wa2bhlAlRgVJVoAxqx8q6DfZ2myXd1GL3y3eWMY4u1gd8QSp-3oc1ztq4EV9nAWQOrIKvKCeWDwTURvneLYIruUCkaw5D5Tqm_SZH7SLm8rpBP1DQtgEvZMJAPORL9IwwEMJjpauXFRuJ4f_4bLiTVmjd2PjYDrCyVyrVkjHMh-5_w/4dc/eJoPOJjyTSCmi_sSAtyWdw/h0/h001.FKZSi04OX6w7gkRLYSW_JRSkmZE0agcAXKy9uW7Q1KQ)
---
Friend, Welcome to the first day of our new reality of MAGA control of the House, Senate, and Presidency. In typical fashion, Trump’s entourage couldn’t even make it one day without signalling the fact that they want to be the successors of the Nazi movement. In his appearance before the inauguration crowd gathered in DC’s Capitol One Arena, Elon Musk, the son of the owners of an Apartheid-era South African diamond mine, couldn’t help himself but throw a Nazi _sieg heil_ salute into his remarks:
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquU-upYfKbMaiFacMQ1owrS1t9qJQKW_NpihtdP09BWcHmGV9Iuj4mYFeIAQ-jZB1cq51DtsQhtlkRXqRValWoxSr4nUEVo2Ts0E4OdAwRMJpYSm81q1Ner1JPcLrip2pdWO5utnI4zJX-WQFQdFUT7pkvR8a8VlX9JnxTrDjeyV5GtTNGOSu6GXi1B09iuaMojQIKLL_t3abOpSQMDOXC9yqzQeS6EQcBignMxbS-jGjnEkh3pPkfO4Kpvz0qM_YekJIWcW0xljkdcLDDS9fgwWQ8bK7TRjT_FM9QnQcv_cpsxqTWnqR4_roC6K2KBSEUUFiUD7bFJ7XzhILoumsP7rBkMveCNM97YOHNkFfmEPw/4dc/eJoPOJjyTSCmi_sSAtyWdw/h1/h001.a2dsIQ7mUe-p1WoJZX4KExiXZ-pwywEimlPV03v5Sko)
---
_We should have known from his obsession with rockets._
---
Sadly, the powers that brought Hitler and the Nazis to power - the dark alliance between capital, industry, military, and a resurgent right-wing populist movement, have _**once again coalesced**_ around an individual who can bring their most depraved fantasies and lauded 4th Reich from nightmare to reality.
Yet, there is cause for hope - a **historic twist of fate** has given us a unique opportunity to stop the rising black tide (for now). Because of Trump’s cabinet appointments from the House of Representatives, _Republicans have the smallest majority they’ve had since 1932_ and are at _extreme risk_ of losing it. My name is Josh Weil and I am the Dad, Teacher, and Democrat running in the special election for Florida’s 6th Congressional District. If we win here we paralyze their movement and with it any hope to implement their legislative agenda without needing Democratic support.
**A blue victory here is _not assured_ \- in fact the odds are stacked against us. _We will need support from every Democrat in the Nation to win here_. **[**Can you chip in $5 to help us beat the odds and accomplish a win here that will go down in history as the moment we turned the tide against MAGA?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquU-upYfKbMaiFacMQ1owrS1t9qJQKW_NpihtdP09BWcMvUcpwMmZlkceQKlIGn8gHCD7aTe-3L7ki79EGfbYMryGuJ7ieng4V6N5nuJg0H_rT16hAxoGIamCFrdn7Dq3pkfPanOGiZubO6EU8c1Qa7Sdg5VLoM-1ySXNnyA6vymCAlRl7mRuczv3UY0NmPaNoHlsFJQz64qwkR94IV8fAgHQ_miASybHqlUwTzQtJjUWwYcEJvIbh9HLleJAdk9unyyceHqv7o-4E__ATzvvLZfGKkBh5GKbXp0ux4kDmxxzYr2bqfQyrEZtSB68vFA7-0DXJHmWhcbODBGNK-UR5jl8_4XRVjcbmJsAiI2Lom7Q/4dc/eJoPOJjyTSCmi_sSAtyWdw/h2/h001.sUVCtf1bqbGq1t4Wpo-8-6MzaMNIOdwZ0WeIP8z-ZbM)

clean_body: Yet, there is cause for hope - a historic twist of fate has given us a unique opportunity to stop the rising black tide (for now). If he was a shoo-in, MAGA wouldn’t need to pump millions into the district. | | Friend, Welcome to the first day of our new reality of MAGA control of the House, Senate, and Presidency. In typical fashion, Trump’s entourage couldn’t even make it one day without signalling the fact that they want to be the successors of the Nazi movement. In his appearance before the inauguration crowd gathered in DC’s Capitol One Arena, Elon Musk, the son of the owners of an Apartheid-era South African diamond mine, couldn’t help himself but throw a Nazi sieg heil salute into his remarks: | We should have known from his obsession with rockets. Sadly, the powers that brought Hitler and the Nazis to power - the dark alliance between capital, industry, military, and a resurgent right-wing populist movement, have once again coalesced around an individual who can bring their most depraved fantasies and lauded 4th Reich from nightmare to reality. Yet, there is cause for hope - a historic twist of fate has given us a unique opportunity to stop the rising black tide (for now). Because of Trump’s cabinet appointments from the House of Representatives, Republicans have the smallest majority they’ve had since 1932 and are at extreme risk of losing it. My name is Josh Weil and I am the Dad, Teacher, and Democrat running in the special election for Florida’s 6th Congressional District. If we win here we paralyze their movement and with it any hope to implement their legislative agenda without needing Democratic support. A blue victory here is not assured \- in fact the odds are stacked against us. We will need support from every Democrat in the Nation to win here. The greatest generation fought to defeat fascism and won - it’s time to accept the torch from them and rise to the occasion. Yours in the fight, Josh Weil Democrat for Florida’s 6th | Mail checks to : Josh Weil for Congress 8381 Citrus Chase Drive Orlando, FL 32836 | PAID FOR BY JOSH WEIL FOR CONGRESS | | Sent via . name: Troy Downing
subject: FINALLY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I’m ready to help turn our government around

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter, with President Trump back in the White House, change is FINALLY coming to Washington, and the one I’m looking forward to the most is some **FISCAL RESPONSIBILITY.**

For decades, politicians in both parties have run up our debt with no accountability. _**THAT CHANGES NOW**_. With the new Department of Government Efficiency, we’re ready to make fundamental changes to make a difference in our government. I’m ready to work with President Trump and the DOGE, but I also want to hear from you. **[**Will you take a moment to answer my fiscal responsibility survey to let us know what YOU want to see cut?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ TAKE THE SURVEY](https://trk.emails.troydowning._Iv2hsw)
---
Thank you,Congressman Troy Downing
---
---
|

name: CADEM HQ
subject: 3 ways we are fighting back:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Dear friends,
Yesterday, Donald Trump was sworn in as our President. Again.
We know this is a challenging time. Many of you worked tirelessly to prevent this very outcome – so did we.
But, once again, we must band together to withstand attacks on American values and spirit.
We cannot give up or lose hope. Here’s what we are doing in California to fight back:
1️⃣ We are laying the initial infrastructure RIGHT NOW to launch our 2026 campaign to retake the U.S. House . Last cycle, we opened regional offices and hired organizers sooner than ever. We’re aiming to do the same — and even more — this time around. Will you pitch in a donation to make that possible? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-jan25?refcode=20250121_FR_45DO_Inauguration&amount=20.25]
2️⃣ Our state elected officials are working to ensure that President Trump cannot infringe on California’s values or people.
3️⃣ California’s expanded Democratic Congressional Delegation ( we are sending three more Democrats to DC than in 2023! ) will work in Congress to stand up to any dangerous laws or policies proposed by Donald Trump.
We are in this fight. We hope you are too.
That’s why we would be honored if you became one of our 2025 Founding Donors. It’s a new year, and we are working to finalize our budget and activities for this critical period of candidate recruitment, rapid response communications, and fighting back against the Trump Administration. Will you become a 2025 Founding Door now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-jan25?refcode=20250121_FR_45DO_Inauguration&amount=20.25]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-jan25?&refcode=&amount=]We will get through these next four years if we keep fighting together.
Thank you,
- CADEM

Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.

**Disgusting promise made, horrifying promise kept, team:** Donald Trump has pardoned more than a THOUSAND insurrectionists on his first day in office,_just like he said he would._

Now we have proof that Trump is going to be even more unhinged in his second term than he was in his first -- and we can't let him off the hook even for a moment. We MUST rise up to oppose his corrupt actions at _every opportunity._**That work starts today.**

We have to send an _unmistakable_ message for the entire country to hear: People who try to overthrow our elections should NOT be given a pass. **We've launched a Live Petition to fight back, but right now, your signature is still MISSING!**

Friends, _We don’t have much time left._ On April 1, Democrat Josh Weil—a respected teacher, educator, and Florida activist—will be facing off against Trump’s handpicked MAGA lunatic, Randy Fine. Fine is notorious in Florida for his “crude antics,” including his support for Florida’s strict abortion ban, and his sponsorship of the infamous "Don't Say Gay" bill that stigmatizes LGBTQ+ children and punishes teachers for doing their jobs. **But Randy Fine is deeply unpopular and vulnerable—and Josh is building a grassroots war chest that will take on MAGA and win:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100741026/523730654/-423390815?refcode=250121_Serve_Weil_SpecialElectionUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ3OGY1OC0xNmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-krhGK7ry_Ligotp4zrfyA9Pduyfg5AsBR49hemavE=) **This team is closing in on over half a million dollars raised since this special election was announced last month.** But to win, we need supporters from across the country coming together and chipping in what they can. [**Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can do right now -- split with Serve America -- to make sure we have Josh’s back in this critical fight? name: Amy Carnevale
subject: It’s a new day in MAGAchusetts
body:
Better days are ahead..
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016edKX0J8n3C0mS2YL4bpq7hJJzgBxGWC2QWUG0qhq8QdSfan6gQ3S2VS4l5Ln9GEZZltzArfxeUeFW0dNbemQLht444qcZB716enhFWkhjMQVqFLMr1FICvQrOGS783FbnCs-NzgYsRqGHxYTHACTg==&c=usOnbl7SLbDZ7zp-6mEboIAEgij4Mm782Z2BW2931YIzR96DmGiQDw==&ch=f1lb9_NaF3MJUCfnBScHlKQkytoBhbbGXQqZWjoSExUn4hb2FFTPlw==)
---
| Dear Peter,
👏 Congratulations to President Donald J. Trump on his inauguration as the 47th President of the United States. This moment marks a pivotal step toward restoring America's strength, security, and prosperity under the banner of America First policies. 🇺🇸
This past election, Americans in Massachusetts and across the country made it resoundingly clear: it's time for a new direction for our nation.
---
| | [SUPPORT REPUBLICANS ACROSS MASS & THE USA](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016edKX0J8n3C0mS2YL4bpq7hJJzgBxGWC2QWUG0qhq8QdSfan6gQ3S3pSIbGZnbcVRUtVkpNWTJF2RqGaMsHRyT5GWSCOdUIQQBg0evZx_RoOyVdyE-oW1JsZjfILK7uFQbAYBOr61XL0jW5upzs3vROv2YpdP_zCdq0DHonLzNa_T_JZQqnbGA==&c=usOnbl7SLbDZ7zp-6mEboIAEgij4Mm782Z2BW2931YIzR96DmGiQDw==&ch=f1lb9_NaF3MJUCfnBScHlKQkytoBhbbGXQqZWjoSExUn4hb2FFTPlw==)
---
Under President Trump's leadership, the MassGOP is optimistic about the future -> ⭐ A secure border, ⭐ Economic opportunity, ⭐ Energy independence, ⭐ A renewed commitment to fairness in hiring practices and governance; and ⭐ America being respected on the world stage, and our citizens coming FIRST.
The MassGOP is ready to support the Trump administration in bringing about the positive changes our country needs.
You have my word - the MassGOP will remain steadfast in our mission to amplify the voices of Massachusetts Republicans and hold government leaders accountable to YOU.
With President Trump at the helm, we look forward to the days ahead with hope, determination, and a shared commitment to building a stronger, more prosperous America.
---
| [JOIN OUR MAGACHUSETTS TEAM - DONATE NOW](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016edKX0J8n3C0mS2YL4bpq7hJJzgBxGWC2QWUG0qhq8QdSfan6gQ3S3pSIbGZnbcVRUtVkpNWTJF2RqGaMsHRyT5GWSCOdUIQQBg0evZx_RoOyVdyE-oW1JsZjfILK7uFQbAYBOr61XL0jW5upzs3vROv2YpdP_zCdq0DHonLzNa_T_JZQqnbGA==&c=usOnbl7SLbDZ7zp-6mEboIAEgij4Mm782Z2BW2931YIzR96DmGiQDw==&ch=f1lb9_NaF3MJUCfnBScHlKQkytoBhbbGXQqZWjoSExUn4hb2FFTPlw==)
---
Thank you!
---
| |
---

Amy Carnevale
Chair, MassGOP
| |
---
| | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US
---

Like many of you, I watched President Trump's inauguration with tears in my eyes, gratefulness in my heart, and a tingle down my spine that our fight is just now beginning.
President Trump's historic comeback is proof that we, as a unit, can move the needle. The grassroots kept the notion alive that he would return to office again, not the elites, not mainstream media, and not many even within the Republican Party. Mark Zuckerberg, Jeff Bezos and others are jumping aboard now in the 11th hour, but it was the people who held out hope when it was darkest, and at a time when circumstances gave us no reason to hope.
That's proof that _[WE CAN MAKE A DIFFERENCE](https://substack.com/redirect/5dcf6321-4c82-468a-ba09-083a63b940bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ if we stay engaged.
President Trump will be bombarded with the agendas of these Johnny-come-Latelys. I feel confident, Trump will uphold his promise to the people who elected him. But in the meantime, lets send him our names along with the mandate we sent him to Washington to accomplish. Your name and our mandate will be hand-delivered to President Trump.
✅ Secure Our Borders - Strong borders mean a secure future for all Americans. Together, we can stop the flow of drugs and crime into our great nation.
✅ Fight Inflation and make us energy independent again - Excessive government spending drives inflation and hurts hardworking Americans. Let's cut waste, stabilize costs, and rebuild our workforce.
✅ Rein in Spending and Debt - It's time to prioritize fiscal discipline, transparency, holding foreign nations accountable...and so much more.
We invite you to understand the mandate and sign the _[Contract From The American People](https://substack.com/redirect/5dcf6321-4c82-468a-ba09-083a63b940bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ that will be hand delivered to President Trump. We must never go back to sleep again. We must never grow complacent again. Together, we can create a future built on strength, accountability, and prosperity.
Click _[here](https://substack.com/redirect/5dcf6321-4c82-468a-ba09-083a63b940bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to sign and visit _[www.JoeFromTexas.com](https://substack.com/redirect/4ec47978-8211-4476-8d82-b92d6984479b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to learn more about the _[Contract](https://substack.com/redirect/5dcf6321-4c82-468a-ba09-083a63b940bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ and stand with us in this critical mission.
Every signature strengthens our movement, and every voice brings us closer to achieving these vital goals.
Let's secure America. Let's secure our future.
Join the fight today!
Blessings, Kathy Barnette
P.S. Don't forget to share this message with friends and family. Together, we have shown we can make a difference.

Peter, President Trump asked me to check in on you.
With three special elections in the House and two toss-up gubernatorial races on the horizon, Republicans need the most accurate data and insights from our top Patriots.
So when President Trump authorized us to conduct the Official Patriot Census — the largest one ever conducted by the leader of the free world — I knew I needed to get in contact with you.
**[Our records show that if we’re going to win these toss-up races, it will all come down to the critical data we collect from Patriots like YOU.>>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c9884e7a9c444e6eb88c1db6f0104fcf&_e=Eqacm3tjCyzlp0fq8i7R6GE7Rpe3gp-fnWbLd9gZehnMg6L5_V0QrWgPl5TXnUqo431dn_V84tchBab6WZosGZKYyOzfi9QL5BDAEK8On4ZXfwt7ur1ltJVkXoXrC4LloNQBFEgvx7d2A7qayOmGSTAzQmDke72-Tj_Io45xTKvvRUlCupvAzFpHpU2GyxArYNN2znTo27L09S4PIAq6OaF0ozxJSzREQfrdUYj3Xdb7woaJYGnPA10LuCsQ8VYeooZPD5KtB43mAxAWAKEd6Sv02G8YC7c5Nal7EDQ3TG0-ZLbSi--3zJSS4ERK9Nl_FGZg7KKugZSWzEQ7uEpnewG80EG3f9AUv5OJtPWh0qQvKTgo6uJb2re5DgKJR9v-sPkTCzdrMZo7kRIz9ePIfA%3D%3D)**

**_Here’s a breakdown of why these races are so mission-critical to President Trump:_**

* In Virginia, Pelosi-Puppet Abigail Spanberger is poised to win the Democrat gubernatorial nomination. If we lose this race, radical Democrats will add NON-CITIZENS to the Virginia voter rolls and engage in election interference.
* In New Jersey – a state where President Trump made HUGE gains in November – Democrats are fighting among themselves to select the most rabid ANTI-TRUMP candidate they can find. If we win here, we can flip New Jersey RED for good.
* And in the special elections being held in Florida and New York, we’ll need to win ALL THREE to ensure President Trump holds onto his MAGA majority in the House.

**_[But none of these wins will be possible to pull off without you, Peter. So please make sure we’re prepared for ANYTHING by taking our Patriot Census ASAP.>>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c9884e7a9c444e6eb88c1db6f0104fcf&_e=Eqacm3tjCyzlp0fq8i7R6GE7Rpe3gp-fnWbLd9gZehnMg6L5_V0QrWgPl5TXnUqo431dn_V84tchBab6WZosGZKYyOzfi9QL5BDAEK8On4ZXfwt7ur1ltJVkXoXrC4LloNQBFEgvx7d2A7qayOmGSTAzQmDke72-Tj_Io45xTKvvRUlCupvAzFpHpU2GyxArYNN2znTo27L09S4PIAq6OaF0ozxJSzREQfrdUYj3XdZwxd8P4qKs6ikabYfCm9Zs9E6kxW5ASjuxf8wW34mJefnoPj2C2tfyGRWZHO7l1KY0FX1_cvODWI8-NEGVqkQg_DF4HXt8iyiQNKlC0Ucln-_d-zTfboFS_5FlKB7uKwYmEOMvzFtmDaordbgxy0o9NhUtcxRVazo_Ow5Yw1_dwg%3D%3D)_**
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c9884e7a9c444e6eb88c1db6f0104fcf&_e=Eqacm3tjCyzlp0fq8i7R6GE7Rpe3gp-fnWbLd9gZehnMg6L5_V0QrWgPl5TXnUqo431dn_V84tchBab6WZosGZKYyOzfi9QL5BDAEK8On4ZXfwt7ur1ltJVkXoXrC4LloNQBFEgvx7d2A7qayOmGSTAzQmDke72-Tj_Io45xTKvvRUlCupvAzFpHpU2GyxArYNN2znTo27L09S4PIAq6OaF0ozxJSzREQfrdUYj3XdbzWlXR4dgVZ8qdMRjXGeSFLbjGmq2VZLnDBpCbNdnnugk7sbs9_U7qAdsr7gNKdzZMma1HjimtvUDuIx9hBa2purPq-5wv4hKRJetQq9NdVYzPzHVX04BQddP9OvTkEFujtqiWJsHxbkxjHF-4TL1l_cAga_UhVvgwzWh5vZ6izQ%3D%3D)

# [Trump's Agenda, Complicit Media, & the Fight for Truth](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=155212014&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1MjEyMDE0LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc0NzkyOTksImV4cCI6MTc0MDA3MTI5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.d3BdxKaTAR0JgiswgjSzWZSW8Yw4Uskrmg9Tv1cgxds)
### How do we combat media bias in Trump's post-fact world? Here's one solution that actually works
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jan 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=155212014&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1MjEyMDE0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNzQ3OTI5OSwiZXhwIjoxNzQwMDcxMjk5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.xKsKNOkC4dhhhT-eB_93QK8O5M9_1Zk9Wng0r85aLNA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=155212014&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1MjEyMDE0LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc0NzkyOTksImV4cCI6MTc0MDA3MTI5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.d3BdxKaTAR0JgiswgjSzWZSW8Yw4Uskrmg9Tv1cgxds&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC90cnVtcHMtYWdlbmRhLWNvbXBsaWNpdC1tZWRpYS1hbmQ_.4R8EhrJoYZjhSgL2YuvFJma-O1omaLcMk9fe6GBK2Hs?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/trumps-agenda-complicit-media-and?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

If you watched the inauguration, you witnessed a president who has made it clear that civil rights, facts, and even the truth itself don't matter. This isn't hyperbole; it's a calculated strategy. Trump lied more than 30,000 times during his first term,1 and there's no doubt he'll continue that practice in his second term. His administration's first days have already been marked by over 100 executive orders targeting mass deportation, immigrant round-ups, abortion bans, billionaire tax cuts, pardoning 1500 violent insurrectionists, pulling out of the WHO, the Paris Climate Accords, and numerous other harmful policies--all while he sits in office as a convicted felon.
Yet, if you relied on mainstream media coverage, you'd hardly know the extent of these actions. Instead, we've seen outlets like ABC following up their $15 million capitulation to Trump with puff pieces praising his "popularity." Meanwhile, major platforms like Facebook have announced they will no longer fact-check content, paving the way for even more disinformation.
This is the state of our media today, where truth takes a backseat to profit and power. Just how bad is it, and more importantly, how do we respond? **Let 's Address This.**
Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qtB1w1uGlqUTWWFJOPyeuotFPMGP84TWfX6LXng0tdQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=155212014)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/66a53f92-8cfa-4af4-a854-41815f04d377?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Credit: Columbia University School of Professional Studies
### **The Death of Accountability in Legacy Media**
The erosion of accountability isn't limited to the actions of the Trump administration. It extends to the very institutions that are supposed to keep power in check.
Consider the _Washington Post_. Once heralded for its "Democracy Dies in Darkness" tagline, the outlet is now losing relevance at a staggering rate. According to _Semafor_ , its daily traffic has plummeted from 24 million visits in 2021 to just 3 million in 2024.
What's their solution? Not a renewed commitment to hard-hitting journalism, but a rebrand. The new tagline? "_Riveting Storytelling for all of America_." It's a clear pivot away from holding power accountable and toward a sanitized, non-confrontational approach--one that protects its billionaire owner Jeff Bezos and shields Trump from meaningful scrutiny.
This same _Washington Post_ recently killed a political cartoon critical of both Trump and Bezos, further proving that they're more interested in protecting power than challenging it. And now, as billionaire Elon Musk throws up a Nazi salute (twice)...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/092396b7-60e8-4747-a84f-4a13856311d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
...this is how the Washington Post covers his speech.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c77e4fdd-3144-4006-a649-ac00e77edee7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What "exuberant" storytelling indeed! And to be explicitly clear--it is not my opinion that what Musk committed (twice) was a Nazi salute. Holocaust scholars, senior Jewish members of Congress like Jerry Nadler, and frighteningly even neo-Nazis online recognized it as a Nazi salute. For the Washington Post to ignore it altogether is deeply problematic. But such failures make one thing absolutely clear--we cannot rely on institutions that bow to billionaires, censor criticism, and whitewash fascism.
* * *
### **The Problem of Media Bias and Disinformation**
Because it isn't just the Washington Post. With Facebook's refusal to fact-check content, the floodgates for misinformation are wide open. Media bias isn't just a nuisance; it's a cancer that will further corrode our democracy. When the platforms that hundreds of millions rely on for information refuse to prioritize facts, the result is a public drowning in "alternative facts" and propaganda. Again, this isn't hyperbole. Facebook has previously admitted its refusal to factcheck and remove false information resulted in ethnic cleansing and genocide of the Rohingya in Myanmar.2 Despite this history, Facebook is exposing the American people to the same potential danger. That is horrifying.
But as I've long said, I don't propose problems without also offering solutions to those problems. We are not helpless to media capitulation--we can act to uphold facts and accountability.
* * *
### **A Solution: Independent Media and Ground News**
When I write, I make a conscious effort to ensure every fact is backed by verifiable data. One of the most invaluable tools I rely on for this is [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/739715f7-e316-4401-aba6-5b5a95db0a11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Ground News isn't just a media aggregator; it's a tool for understanding the bias and reliability of the information we consume. Here's what makes it so essential:
1. **Transparency** : Ground News gathers related articles from around the world in one place, revealing how different outlets cover the same story.
2. **Funding Clarity** : It identifies who funds a news source, exposing hidden agendas.
3. **Bias Analysis** : It shows whether an outlet leans left, right, or center--and how reliable its reporting is.
4. **Blindspot Feed** : Highlights stories that are disproportionately covered by either the left-leaning or right-leaning media. This helps you see what one side may be ignoring and gives you a more balanced view of current events, reducing echo chambers.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4c9237a2-e687-4f58-89a6-9bf6ca0834f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Unlike billionaire-owned media, Ground News is subscriber-supported, meaning it answers to its readers, not corporate interests. And right now, if you subscribe to Ground News through the below link, you'll receive 40% off their Vantage Plan, the same one I use to help research, write, and fact check my articles before publishing.
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/739715f7-e316-4401-aba6-5b5a95db0a11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
### **Why This Matters**
Media bias shouldn't exist--because journalism should focus on facts and truth. Unfortunately, that isn't the world we live in. But we are not powerless.
By investing in independent media and in tools like Ground News, we empower ourselves and our communities to better understand the world around us. We create a culture where truth matters again, where misinformation is exposed, and where the powerful are held accountable.
ABC can praise Trump. The _Washington Post_ can rebrand. Facebook can abandon fact-checking. But we don't have to accept this reality.
Subscribe to [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/739715f7-e316-4401-aba6-5b5a95db0a11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Support this newsletter. Together, we can ensure that democracy doesn't die in darkness--it thrives in the light.

Patriot,

I am honored to be appointed to the House Armed Services Committee. As a Green Beret who has seen the cost of freedom firsthand, I know what it takes to keep America safe and secure.

Serving on this critical committee, I will work to:

**✅ Rebuild our military strength and restore our Peace Through Strength approach.**

**✅ Ensure our troops have the resources, training, and authorities they need to WIN.**

**✅ Bolster defense manufacturing and protect our supply chains right here at home.**

**✅ Counter China 's military ambitions and maintain America's dominance on the global stage.**

This committee is not just about defense--it's about ensuring American leadership, security, and prosperity for future generations.

**[Click here to join my team and help me Make America Secure Again!](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d8de4ad774c34e45ba7de0ae9943a4ae&_e=GUdhdfMXm80aDgnMnz17EBhn4_gojZ7zs7yeVTPfjdlaYuIDq_yh13Uy39D0ZTp4tG3psjT7c2uN_Snuh5eydkLqDvKCb2WYnFq5XDlF_WtluKU3lYKsEqaXC21tpzXpIg5C-ZQZUjzczmukeufp_dihEBM8m4sQkILj4_eFCJmAUB2ORFWXGDfmStArHapDOSYE1v-vQCAkRt81SKH2V27SY40yNIxWNiaH4xoVQs-2yKwZsjekfreThWFWONoww351L0r0RJDH6vUaSF8F7rPhWtmwZOV2UFOpMjzKdiav9HkLeCSnFec17O-vZO9K6z9ERNXsQeY5esxMHWEFwg%3D%3D)** Let's get to work!

clean_body: I know what it takes to keep America safe and secure. | Patriot, I am honored to be appointed to the House Armed Services Committee. As a Green Beret who has seen the cost of freedom firsthand, I know what it takes to keep America safe and secure. Serving on this critical committee, I will work to: ✅ Rebuild our military strength and restore our Peace Through Strength approach. ✅ Ensure our troops have the resources, training, and authorities they need to WIN. ✅ Bolster defense manufacturing and protect our supply chains right here at home. ✅ Counter China 's military ambitions and maintain America's dominance on the global stage. This committee is not just about defense--it's about ensuring American leadership, security, and prosperity for future generations. Let's get to work! Pat Harrigan | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.
