Forget reducing the cost of goods for working families -- Donald Trump spoke more about the "Gulf of America", stealing the Panama Canal, about how much he had personally suffered, and his _Manifest Destiny_. In fact, he didn’t address the working class at all. He didn’t mention the struggles that so many Americans, Republican and Democrats alike, are facing, like the rising costs of housing and healthcare. His executive orders won’t make things easier for families. They won’t build more housing, make prescription drugs cheaper or retirement more secure. No. His first actions in office will be to attack immigrant families, defund schools, and gut climate policies and consumer protections. **Friend, I was not elected to represent California’s 30th Congressional District to allow our values and goals to be eroded. Although I will attempt to seek out common ground with my colleagues across the aisle, I will also stand up against injustice, and for ordinary people.** I am ready to fight with the renewed energy our communities deserve. name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: You can send diapers to the fire victims
body:
As you’ve most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8bv20og54rpsdhrl2mdf20pb9fv7ag4rcgapt4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ie1or6c1h2bs)
---
#
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv4hl3lbo6dqnqq4q6bah3079uhi0umsadi66noo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ie1or6c1h2bs)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7i6bg72hmlbic5hke5a5upmo9in50ci6cckvp4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ie1or6c1h2bs)**

Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztpphtr20cnda36l15d7oqbj16m3h6pfnjoq0hd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5ie1or6c1h2bs)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

1600 Daily

name: Team Hawley
subject: Last Night On Fox: The Golden Age Of America!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=5b216ebc52a94ab6854e9544a03d7766&_e=4jWA2K7MvdHdoeN6Wu4TD0cmvMZ_6ckB8KYJ4z6STIz5pUVY2NqMCd9d6LaUh7zPXnx-M_0OpW950WrA8Xeay2UJoqF-8F8NaQ_pqzPwHvn3R7wnbrJXyXhRrejjzmyb49mxFY736ISAmB2haFOiiko7LgxzaQYY4mLtrkn5DKNDj5zzvoq4CzgR_q9KsCqB9bsxaW6q8o4hQ6AaCfOphwv1WIQNBcn2u2XykgvnMRHxGmAmUam8c3697yDTsEE_cOdI2hrEHu1R7p6xOKIG57yEc10h9YKi1-2zRqkArBuLN_NUw3Useoyp8RSYahcDIkti7Sq9B2BJjNZk3tN5acndAMhm0B-LmkGbThyZeAYh-kzpiCyrNMxnbam5hhsu)
---
Peter,
---
The Golden Age of America—it has a nice ring to it, and today we have a President who can make it happen! Listening to President Trump deliver that message to those responsible for America’s marked decline—Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Barack Obama, and others—was fitting and inspiring to witness.

President Trump presented an incredibly positive vision for America because the American people still believe in, and voted for, a hopeful future. Americans are naturally hopeful, and they believe in the greatness of this country. They know what we were, and they look forward to what we can become!
_**Watch the whole interview below:**_
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=5b216ebc52a94ab6854e9544a03d7766&_e=4jWA2K7MvdHdoeN6Wu4TD0cmvMZ_6ckB8KYJ4z6STIz5pUVY2NqMCd9d6LaUh7zPXnx-M_0OpW950WrA8Xeay2UJoqF-8F8NaQ_pqzPwHvn3R7wnbrJXyXhRrejjzmyb49mxFY736ISAmB2haFOiiko7LgxzaQYY4mLtrkn5DKNDj5zzvoq4CzgR_q9KsCqB9bsxaW6q8o4hQ6AaCfOphwv1WIQNBcn2u2XykgvnMRHxvxz-shpvkNAmRUL_jE4owNQrfu-wuubgS1N45GEPSd7NwGLPKJpjtzjc58lZJcsGB6VH4XjqNrrbjbjmTk3pUhqtcp4PeNT-2J6p69bW7duAVZ5MKdL9uahsGkvD8i42FWdKw8Uf1scf0npUvbVd)
---
**Here is a great exchange from the interview:**

**Laura Ingraham:** Everyone’s been fighting for so long, and you’re still going to have to fight, but this moment—being in that Rotunda today, watching that swearing-in with the old guard watching—Donald Trump has laid waste to their whole agenda. How significant is this?

**Senator Hawley:** Oh, it’s huge. It’s hugely significant, and I thought, Laura, you’re exactly right. Being there in the Rotunda, listening to President Trump tell them to their faces that they had failed—which is true—and laying out that new vision for what he’s calling a golden age was truly inspiring.
---

name: Adam Kopel, Campaign Director
subject: We need your help, team
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
Hello Friend,

Last week, we were supposed to have a new legislative session in Minnesota. But let me fill you in on what’s actually happening:

THE BAD: House Republicans are planning on stealing the seat of a duly elected Member and trying to turn a couple of weeks, one-seat advantage into stolen control of the House for the next two years!!! (NOT GOOD!)

THE GOOD: House Democrats are fighting back and refusing to show up to their sham session in order to stop this Republican power grab in its tracks.

---

_**Please respond now. This poll closes soon.**_
|
---
Friend:

Yesterday I voted in committee against Pete Hegseth to become our next Secretary of Defense, and I am disappointed that my Republican colleagues on the committee pushed through his nomination.

**I’d like to know whether you agree with my decision, but first let me explain why I voted the way I did:**

Someone who has a history of credible sexual assault allegations should not even be considered for a position like running the Pentagon. My fellow Senate Democrats and I called on Republicans to provide the committee with more information about these allegations and allow us to have more time to question Pete Hegseth.

**_This is not to mention Pete Hegseth’s complete lack of experience and qualifications to be in charge of an organization as massive as the Department of Defense._**

In particular, Hegseth has a history of financial mismanagement and making demeaning statements against women in combat. He is not qualified to be the leader of a department where hundreds of billions of dollars are managed every year for our national security and that represents hundreds of thousands of women who serve in our military.

When I questioned Hegseth at his Senate confirmation hearing, it became even clearer to me that his stance on America’s role in the world and support for our allies would put us down a path where America can’t win against its adversaries.

That’s why I voted in committee against Hegseth to be our next Secretary of Defense, and I stand by that decision.

**But right now, I want to know whether Democrats like you agree. I’m looking to receive 12 more responses from 37087, and I’m hoping yours will be one of them, friend. Please, tell me now:**
**Do you approve of Pete Hegseth as our next Secretary of Defense?**

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: I've Been Asked To RUN For Office Again...
body:
Since running for the US Senate in 2022, I have been asked numerous times by firms, groups, influencers and individuals to run for all kinds of differ
| | |
---
Since running for the **US Senate** in 2022, I have been asked numerous times by _firms_ , _groups_ , _influencers_ and _individuals_ to run for all kinds of different offices from statewide to local. Up to this point, I have turned them all down with the mentality that if I run again it will have to be **the right race at the right time**. Recently, I have been approached and asked by many to run in the **special election for Oklahoma House District 74** which is essentially **Owasso**. This race has intrigued me for 2 reasons. 1\. It is **Owasso** where I live and performed the best in my 2022 run.
2\. The election is April 1 which is a short race.
| 1. | It is **Owasso** where I live and performed the best in my 2022 run.
---|---
2. | The election is April 1 which is a short race.
---|---
Because this race has sparked my interest, we decided to run a poll to see how I am received in **Owasso** and what matters to **Owasso** voters.
|
---
When I was matched up with the 2 declared candidates in the race, I performed very well with **70% of Owasso Republican voters supporting me**.
I also learned from this poll what issues matter most to Owasso _**_ voters and the preferred background that the people of Owasso are looking for from their next State Representative.
Kendra and I have NOT made a decision yet whether to run for this open seat yet.
Therefore, would you **pray for us** that we would have the wisdom to discern whether or not this is **the right race at the right time**.
We will make a decision here soon because filling for the race is at the end of January.
Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

With your help previously, we have taken a **former night-club** and _transformed_ it into a **beautiful church** on the inside. Now it's time to tackle the outside. **Phase 1** of this project (outside facelift + basketball/pickle-ball court) will cost the church around $250,000. We do things on a cash basis at [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19013607.10412.1.af27f878d1a573bda704ba08f02fe113) and _I need your help_. Please consider partnering with us in 2025 with a gift of **$25** , **$250** , **$2500** _or more_. We’re standing strong against MAGA extremism

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100746279/523747225/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWEzNmE0MS0yMWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UL7Ujw1EegtZB1IG8_uCM6gO-hW0V8hKyV-cnOGUjJ8=&emci=1fcdec2e-94d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=61a36a41-21d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=15759664)

Derek, Yesterday, Donald Trump was inaugurated, ushering in a federal government dominated by MAGA extremism. But here in Virginia, _we’re in a unique position to push back_ – and we’re ready to fight. **This year, flipping the Governor’s Mansion blue isn’t just an opportunity. It’s a necessity.** With reproductive rights under attack, voting access at risk, and far-right policies threatening our communities, Virginia must remain a beacon of progress. If you missed yesterday’s email, here’s the bottom line: **we need your help to elect a Democratic governor who will stand strong against the far-right agenda.[_Will you donate today to ensure we can deliver a huge blow to the GOP in November?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100746280/523747226/-1953633157?&recurring=auto&refcode=E11964-20250121-InaugurationBump-SL-Trump&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWEzNmE0MS0yMWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UL7Ujw1EegtZB1IG8_uCM6gO-hW0V8hKyV-cnOGUjJ8=)** | **************[DEMS ON TOP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100746281/523747227/-1953633157?&recurring=auto&refcode=E11964-20250121-InaugurationBump-SB-Trump&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWEzNmE0MS0yMWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UL7Ujw1EegtZB1IG8_uCM6gO-hW0V8hKyV-cnOGUjJ8=)**************
---
Your support helps us:
* Build a voter outreach program that reaches every corner of Virginia.
* Counter GOP misinformation with fact-driven, bold messaging.
* Elect a Democratic governor who will fight for progress.

We’re putting the pedal to the metal this year. We can turn our strong feelings about the Inauguration into action that will protect our Commonwealth and show the country that **progress will always overcome extremism.[_If you chip in today, we’ll be able to get boots on the ground to get out the vote in November. Can we count on you?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100746282/523747228/-1953633157?&recurring=auto&refcode=E11964-20250121-InaugurationBump-SL-Trump&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWEzNmE0MS0yMWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UL7Ujw1EegtZB1IG8_uCM6gO-hW0V8hKyV-cnOGUjJ8=)**
**************[ALL IN FOR DEMS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100746283/523747229/-1953633157?&recurring=auto&refcode=E11964-20250121-InaugurationBump-SB-Trump&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWEzNmE0MS0yMWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UL7Ujw1EegtZB1IG8_uCM6gO-hW0V8hKyV-cnOGUjJ8=)**************

name: YDA DNC Representatives
subject: Reminder: Don’t Miss the Vice Chair At-Large Candidate Forum!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Young Democrats of America, _www
body:
| |
---
Dear Derek The **Young Democrats of America** , **Voters of Tomorrow** , and the **DNC Youth Council** want to remind you about an incredible opportunity to hear directly from candidates running for DNC Vice Chair At-Large!

Young voters are a driving force in shaping our democracy, but our voices remain underrepresented in the Democratic Party’s leadership. With no at-large DNC appointments currently held by individuals under 40, it’s clear that we have more work to do to elevate youth leadership.

That’s why this**Vice Chair At-Large Candidate Forum** is so important. It’s your chance to hear from candidates who’ve secured at least 40 signatures as they share their vision for the future of our party. This forum ensures young voters have a seat at the table, amplifying the voices that will shape our shared future.
---
|
---
**You can watch our multi-night forum at[yda.org/forum](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8muuNkLitJ6OdptZHejSkZzbOSph2Us8NLjWv3kxeRJI19os1NuM2kZSkZvDsGulXTsmBhQdyCPc9yYaFY-BMa-C6FkAwScLK68LTP4GWEqpbIYkXrjTOeOupz3odtmSHIfP4Klhi1TN8K8OlhnGjkTHfnVmbDWUaKVkyyM3SK9i6ThNKAEypnGKD5HJRQ48k4MWycaDA0tn_4pz-Ct76h1Jvz_oJ_rJkqbbEnTKrewR1mF0UHlWAahrV8h_ZnZL4HZDL8etKy3rtNcktTCInkaSSREoqC0vdICsHl0j-Qngn/4dc/XRLon1iLTAm8jUdM1-Q-jw/h0/h001.ll1PAxBafLSJIorB4YMuSh6VebgY6iDT63QrL9ptuAg)**

---
**Event Details**

---
**Night 1** **When:** Tuesday, January 21, at 7:00 PM EST/4:00 PM PST
**Moderator:** Eve Levenson, former DNC Youth Coalitions Director and Harris-Walz National Youth Vote Director
**Who:** Candidates from the Eastern & Southern Regions **Night 2** **When:** Wednesday, January 22, at 8:30 PM ET/5:30 PM PST
**Moderator:** Joshua Rush, Senior Communications Advisor for the Young Democrats of America
**Who:** Candidates from the Midwest & Western Regions
---
_*While candidates will be split up by region, both forums are intended to serve a national audience._
---
This forum isn’t just about the candidates—it’s about you. Together, we’ll amplify young people’s priorities and elevate our leadership. We can’t wait to see you there!
In solidarity,

**Your YDA DNC Representatives
****
** Quentin Wathum-Ocama, YDA President & DNC Executive Committee Member
Stephanie Campanha Wheaton, YDA Democratic National Committee Representative

Katherine Jeanes, YDA Democratic National Committee Representative
---

* * *

clean_body: | | Dear Derek The Young Democrats of America , Voters of Tomorrow , and the DNC Youth Council want to remind you about an incredible opportunity to hear directly from candidates running for DNC Vice Chair At-Large! Young voters are a driving force in shaping our democracy, but our voices remain underrepresented in the Democratic Party’s leadership. With no at-large DNC appointments currently held by individuals under 40, it’s clear that we have more work to do to elevate youth leadership. That’s why thisVice Chair At-Large Candidate Forum is so important. It’s your chance to hear from candidates who’ve secured at least 40 signatures as they share their vision for the future of our party. This forum ensures young voters have a seat at the table, amplifying the voices that will shape our shared future. | You can watch our multi-night forum at Event Details Night 1 When: Tuesday, January 21, at 7:00 PM EST/4:00 PM PST Moderator: Eve Levenson, former DNC Youth Coalitions Director and Harris-Walz National Youth Vote Director Who: Candidates from the Eastern & Southern Regions Night 2 When: Wednesday, January 22, at 8:30 PM ET/5:30 PM PST Moderator: Joshua Rush, Senior Communications Advisor for the Young Democrats of America Who: Candidates from the Midwest & Western Regions While candidates will be split up by region, both forums are intended to serve a national audience. This forum isn’t just about the candidates—it’s about you. Together, we’ll amplify young people’s priorities and elevate our leadership. We can’t wait to see you there! In solidarity, Your YDA DNC Representatives ** Quentin Wathum-Ocama, YDA President & DNC Executive Committee Member Stephanie Campanha Wheaton, YDA Democratic National Committee Representative Katherine Jeanes, YDA Democratic National Committee Representative * | The Young Democrats of America is the largest partisan youth organization in the United States. We organize young people to elect Democrats from school board to the White House. Monthly donations truly help sustain our work. name: Trump Knife Set
subject: Exclusive Offer To Celebrate! Trump Knife Collection with LED Display Case – Act Fast!
body:
Dear True American,
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19945/6374453/2c7ad3cd705aa2eb770758f6c28fd6a45c00892e/594ab4a0e88f4b0cca15e056023ef0f1a4790d21)
---
|
---
| | | | | Dear Patriot,
Introducing a unique opportunity to own a distinguished piece of American history.
The **[Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19945/6374453/9b628a0447414d78309b2427941b5ed545911a7e/594ab4a0e88f4b0cca15e056023ef0f1a4790d21)** is not just a collectible—it’s a legacy of patriotism, precision, and exquisite craftsmanship.
Reserved for those who appreciate the finer things in life, this set is the ultimate tribute to the 45th President of the United States.

---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19945/6374453/9b628a0447414d78309b2427941b5ed545911a7e/594ab4a0e88f4b0cca15e056023ef0f1a4790d21)
---
| | |
**Why the Trump Knife Collection Stands Apart:****8 Distinctive Knives, Each Telling a Story**
This collection is thoughtfully[ designed to commemorate pivotal moments from Trump’s presidency](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19945/6374453/9b628a0447414d78309b2427941b5ed545911a7e/594ab4a0e88f4b0cca15e056023ef0f1a4790d21).
Each month, a new knife arrives at your door, featuring a full-color image of President Trump paired with one of his defining messages—from “Keep America Great” to “Save America Again.”
Each piece is more than a knife; it’s a statement of American pride.
* **Premium Pakkawood Handles** : Hand-polished with a rich cherry stain, each knife handle is crafted to reflect both strength and elegance, offering a balanced, luxurious feel in your hand.
* **Razor-Sharp Stainless Steel Blades** : Each blade is forged with precision, ensuring durability and a sharp edge, reflecting the steadfast spirit of American craftsmanship.
* **American Craftsmanship** : Designed and forged in the USA, each knife is a testament to American quality, pride, and tradition.

---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19945/6374453/9b628a0447414d78309b2427941b5ed545911a7e/594ab4a0e88f4b0cca15e056023ef0f1a4790d21)
---
| | |
**A Showcase of Elegance: The LED Display Case** The collection comes complete with a **[custom-designed wooden display case](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19945/6374453/9b628a0447414d78309b2427941b5ed545911a7e/594ab4a0e88f4b0cca15e056023ef0f1a4790d21)** , made from premium cherry wood and featuring a shining gold strip with a hinged glass cover.
The addition of **eight built-in LED lights** enhances the beauty of each knife, casting a soft glow that captures the essence of this elegant tribute.
* **Protective and Elegant** : The hinged cover provides easy access to your knives while ensuring they remain protected from dust and wear.
* **Showcase Presidential Pride** : The display case is adorned with a raised golden medallion, inspired by the American presidential seal, making it a stunning centerpiece for any home or office.

---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19945/6374453/9b628a0447414d78309b2427941b5ed545911a7e/594ab4a0e88f4b0cca15e056023ef0f1a4790d21)
---
| | | ****
**An Heirloom for Generations**
****
****This collection is more than a tribute to Trump’s presidency—it’s an heirloom piece that captures a moment in history with elegance and pride. Each knife's patriotic theme is carefully chosen to resonate with the values that define America: freedom, strength, and resilience.

Displayed together, they create a narrative that will be admired for generations.
****
**What Our Collectors Are Saying:**
* **“The detail and craftsmanship are unparalleled. Each knife is a conversation starter, and the display case elevates them to a true work of art.” – Lisa M., Verified Buyer**
* **“I’ve never seen anything like it. Each delivery brings a new piece of history to my collection, and the quality is outstanding.” – Tom L., Verified Buyer**

**Secure Your Place Among History’s Collectors**
****
****The**Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection** is available for a short time.

With each knife delivered monthly, anticipation builds until your set is complete.

This isn’t just about owning knives; it’s about curating a piece of history.
****
**[CLICK HERE TO CHECK AVAILABILITY AND ORDER YOUR SET](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19945/6374453/9b628a0447414d78309b2427941b5ed545911a7e/594ab4a0e88f4b0cca15e056023ef0f1a4790d21)**

Sincerely,
TrumpKnifeSet.com

P.S. Each knife is delivered in a custom box, making it an exquisite gift for those who hold America's values close to their hearts.
---
|
---
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by **newsletter@gunowner-news.com**

subject: Join Senator Markey and special guests for The Massachusetts Response to the Trump Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party
body:
| | |
---
| | Peter- Today is the first full day of the Trump Administration, and Massachusetts is ready for the challenge of taking on his harmful ideologies and policies. Massachusetts Democrats are wasting no time in organizing, and we want you to be a part of our efforts. Please join Senator Ed Markey **tonight at 6pm** for a conversation with special guests, including Senator Elizabeth Warren, Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley, Attorney General Andrea Campbell, and other important organizers and activists. You can **[RSVP at this link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100747779/523752622/-2894021?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTQ2Y2RmOC0yM2Q4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HICqh9hIT_gJPhr8aG0ihiFwK2gHoJFs0ICQBoWdR98=&emci=8589228f-20d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=a546cdf8-23d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=17281370)**.

Trump admin hits back as ACLU launches lawsuit on birthright citizenship: ‘Ready to face them’

The Trump administration says it is ready to push back against "the Left’s resistance" in court, after a top civil rights group filed a lawsuit challenging President Trump’s order ending birthright citizenship for illegal immigrants.

"Radical Leftists can either choose to swim against the tide and reject the overwhelming will of the people, or they can get on board and work with President Trump to advance his wildly popular agenda," Harrison Fields, White House principal deputy press secretary, told Fox News Digital.

Donald Trump Keeps 46 Promises and Counting on Day One, Thrilling Republicans

Many of the promises President Donald Trump vowed to deliver upon were fulfilled on his first day in office, enthralling Republicans who celebrated the presidential actions.

On Monday afternoon Trump began signing executive orders, rescinding 78 of former President Joe Biden’s executive actions with the stroke of a pen, and taking action on many other issues.

name: the EMILYs List Campaigns team
subject: Wisconsin's state Supreme Court race >>
body:
We can't risk reversing all the progress we made. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100747828/523752679/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE145_20250121_WISCOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055618&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjJiNzRiOS0yM2Q4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtxPM-nuAjwj_ksrNATfgkvvzJU-_XHk2j4ptU05EUw=) Peter,

In 2023, with the support of the EMILYs List community, **Justice Janet Protasiewicz** flipped a seat on the Wisconsin state Supreme Court — creating a pro-choice majority and helping to protect fundamental rights in the state.

This year, a new seat on the court is vacant, and _the majority is up for grabs again._

**That's why we've endorsed Judge Susan Crawford to hold the pro-choice majority and safeguard abortion access in this critical swing state.**

We can't risk reversing all the progress we've made since electing Justice Protasiewicz.

[**So please, donate now to help elect pro-choice champions like Judge Susan Crawford who will defend our fundamental rights:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100747830/523752681/-1037096532?refcode=WUEFE145_20250121_WISCOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055618&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjJiNzRiOS0yM2Q4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtxPM-nuAjwj_ksrNATfgkvvzJU-_XHk2j4ptU05EUw=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100747832/523752683/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE145_20250121_WISCOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055618&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjJiNzRiOS0yM2Q4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtxPM-nuAjwj_ksrNATfgkvvzJU-_XHk2j4ptU05EUw=)
---
Susan Crawford's race _will_ determine whether the court has a liberal or conservative majority — and consequently, whether the rights of Wisconsinites remain protected for years to come.

Her opponent is anti-choice extremist Brad Schimel, who, as Wisconsin's attorney general, attacked reproductive freedom, let thousands of rape kits go untested, and fought to protect the GOP's gerrymandered maps.
[**It's never been more important to have fair, impartial justices like Susan Crawford on our highest courts. So, please, donate now to support candidates who will fight to defend our rights:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100747834/523752712/-1037096532?refcode=WUEFE145_20250121_WISCOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055618&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjJiNzRiOS0yM2Q4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtxPM-nuAjwj_ksrNATfgkvvzJU-_XHk2j4ptU05EUw=)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Settlement Reached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Thanks to your support, I’ve saved my home.
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0ed2bde4e3aa4de8a3eee961a63985b2&_e=cJ-ZivfdMsePW2CLEl0K0dCHGlz1DcuHSV5FMXwU8ETRlGKkoTWK4vibW7EZM7KQuQVc2E7oR2_sPfhRrCY5riOVucDN8eS79FPUaUk4fmXVk4M629PVKSsGuryMWlxOO_-oWXPYAgfFaBOenX8qxxZR7hq4GZS9YFcONC93Gc6XZ5bwcaMxsVeWtv7--zh-gKs9iCw63v6Jy__axqNIsFVu92oPReOH3aXEe3KvRv-PH4-wqvkNHxLUAoHpYWqbd2xEMxLXnGQH1yKTMko5tFoDph2kpYRcMdtT6Pp8MVWEr6FNwrGokDd4EvTHYROeWawzz0WmzHgF3Z8GnqVideGtagDVirW7LlKvJNWJtr8RjgF8y9xu_aFknzyG3QeE)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
From the bottom of my heart... _THANK YOU_.
---
Thanks to the generosity of Americans like you who contributed to my Legal Defense Trust, I have great news to share with you.
---
I have reached a resolution of the litigation with the Plaintiffs that will result in a satisfaction of the Plaintiffs’ judgment.
---
__This resolution does not involve an admission of liability or wrongdoing by any of the Parties. I am satisfied with and have no grievances relating to the result we have reached.__
---
**I have been able to retain my New York co-op and Florida Condominium and all of my personal belongings. No one deserves to be subjected to threats, harassment, or intimidation.**
---
This litigation has taken its toll on all parties. This whole episode was unfortunate.
---
I and the Plaintiffs have agreed not to ever talk about each other in any defamatory manner, and I urge others to do the same.
---
Make no mistake: I could not have done this without the contributions you made to my Legal Defense Trust. Your support served as a reminder that America is home to the most generous souls on the planet.
---
_While this case has been settled, I still have outstanding legal expenses and one remaining case in Arizona set to go to trial in 2026._
---
But with you by my side, I am confident we will win.
---
[**Please consider making a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – to win the one remaining case against me.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0ed2bde4e3aa4de8a3eee961a63985b2&_e=cJ-ZivfdMsePW2CLEl0K0dCHGlz1DcuHSV5FMXwU8ETRlGKkoTWK4vibW7EZM7KQuQVc2E7oR2_sPfhRrCY5riOVucDN8eS79FPUaUk4fmXVk4M629PVKSsGuryMWlxOO_-oWXPYAgfFaBOenX8qxxZR7hq4GZS9YFcONC93Gc6XZ5bwcaMxsVeWtv7--zh-gKs9iCw63v6Jy__axqNIsA1upbwdfY2Gn0qxDki1xnd0gD4V05hZaYNDvmcI9RqLFzzPWwFmdKzVdEvnYxILEhQHtFqJyZA713CEF25ezffiNNOTwoi9rmQD6CqyB-8UOlac8ekS4Tgi76xrqGFJw3jpSgB039ADcXNKZaW22cTauXGw9-DzDp9cR1E_mocs)
---

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0ed2bde4e3aa4de8a3eee961a63985b2&_e=cJ-ZivfdMsePW2CLEl0K0dCHGlz1DcuHSV5FMXwU8ETRlGKkoTWK4vibW7EZM7KQuQVc2E7oR2_sPfhRrCY5riOVucDN8eS79FPUaUk4fmXVk4M629PVKSsGuryMWlxOO_-oWXPYAgfFaBOenX8qxxZR7hq4GZS9YFcONC93Gc6XZ5bwcaMxsVeWtv7--zh-gKs9iCw63v6Jy__axqNIsG99gO55CjVMs3YG5p13ibI2w3M_s0joajasvpPtiYffkQe3-a_i52qgo0icFd1Q2U1IB7rg7ocfuxWKAyJOzbeb75_OL-sQALmN_s0_JtWJEIUNTlvuErldZmKvuzQcLCDkUnnGcLchrv9ixZ7l3bRdg_HBU6c9Cqsb5Uphjs26)

clean_body: Thanks to your support, I’ve saved my home. | Fellow Patriot, From the bottom of my heart... THANK YOU. Thanks to the generosity of Americans like you who contributed to my Legal Defense Trust, I have great news to share with you. I have reached a resolution of the litigation with the Plaintiffs that will result in a satisfaction of the Plaintiffs’ judgment. This resolution does not involve an admission of liability or wrongdoing by any of the Parties. I am satisfied with and have no grievances relating to the result we have reached. I have been able to retain my New York co-op and Florida Condominium and all of my personal belongings. No one deserves to be subjected to threats, harassment, or intimidation. This litigation has taken its toll on all parties. This whole episode was unfortunate. I and the Plaintiffs have agreed not to ever talk about each other in any defamatory manner, and I urge others to do the same. Make no mistake: I could not have done this without the contributions you made to my Legal Defense Trust. Your support served as a reminder that America is home to the most generous souls on the planet. While this case has been settled, I still have outstanding legal expenses and one remaining case in Arizona set to go to trial in 2026. But with you by my side, I am confident we will win. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Ashley H.
subject: I won't forget this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ashley Hinson Victory Committee
body:
I know how valuable your time is, so it’d mean more than you know if you took the time to read this.

| |

---

_It means the world to me that you even opened this email._

Really, Peter.

I know your inbox is probably flooded with messages that look just like this, but trust me, _this isn 't a typical message._

I'm not a career politician, so asking for money or support doesn't come easy to me. Eight years ago, I left my job as a reporter to serve Iowa. I never saw myself getting into politics, but with two young boys, I couldn't sit on the sidelines any longer. **I knew I had to get involved to save the future of our country for my children and future generations.**
---
| | [SUPPORT ASHLEY](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a7aa4bb0c60243e89492b632783122e1&_e=23Q_qHIsytS0uOAftQDFeJdKi4H1BiD49CGpaH4vzcmoIyYLe-TlsAjK0Sk4qqW5Hx1yFT9_vMdediu9SZn1UHeQQu0G7bdBhFnNf_e9TshW5KgQxLl4nbS8p98qjfdcSPG8C9tFXwzkFtgGi2zK5xnSYyl5CVDzkEkhL1arxkFHZtMaxyTyD4YCuZBhzRDsKwbbYaLN7-yPegnRAdh3CEwS49Sn4mgYymYA-_2aJ4F9RYbfvPrOzK7NaedB8aEptijert_WtKMfGraW2jSDHV2ypiWCmcawcBaHAQlAKD2AEr1ElrOpz2-ocxOoVwvXn-hXU7SQnetVyDfczsfjignnAwtD_lV-1XpXyx8bjaVxTWmGDsByfOqdCBBRYv_VxU58nbAGbSktZzwb83mOt6eIu3NKsAGP0i5deHuJ_7us4Uk_VN8QlG71yaKnA3v5eO510yPEc9UoyrrZmFhftQgqlsLxDut21P86lNSda5_QOb3Me6nV1Mx9MBkI5KOrlKlTlBN6uMYkMhxEvwmH2gLNwiYPpcQuvvEuV0_5CWQ%3D "SUPPORT ASHLEY")
---
Soon after, I took my fight to Washington, DC. I served for two years under total Democratic rule. I know what the radical Left wants to do to our country, Peter - I fight back against it every single day.

I was born and raised in Iowa, so I know firsthand that D.C. Democrats couldn't care less about us... **They will do whatever it takes to appease their dark-money donors who want to turn our state into the next California or New York.**

I'm no stranger to the Left's attacks, Peter. The past three elections, I've been attacked with MILLIONS, and after Republicans won this year, the Democrats won't stop with their attacks and lies against conservatives.
---
| | [SUPPORT ASHLEY](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a7aa4bb0c60243e89492b632783122e1&_e=23Q_qHIsytS0uOAftQDFeJdKi4H1BiD49CGpaH4vzcmoIyYLe-TlsAjK0Sk4qqW5Hx1yFT9_vMdediu9SZn1UHeQQu0G7bdBhFnNf_e9TshW5KgQxLl4nbS8p98qjfdcSPG8C9tFXwzkFtgGi2zK5xnSYyl5CVDzkEkhL1arxkFHZtMaxyTyD4YCuZBhzRDsKwbbYaLN7-yPegnRAdh3CEwS49Sn4mgYymYA-_2aJ4F9RYbfvPrOzK7NaedB8aEptijert_WtKMfGraW2jSDHV2ypiWCmcawcBaHAQlAKD2AEr1ElrOpz2-ocxOoVwvXn-hXU7SQnetVyDfczsfjignnAwtD_lV-1XpXyx8bjaVxTWmGDsByfOqdCBBRYv_VxU58nbAGbSktZzwb83mOt5ZkPG0jbMdxG1DFy2Jh6DN5iqxMD3DDFpl4NfV40XqSNOVreXmTve1iWE-Gzygv_dhQUBzjpKcZcoCnwJE8uDHLj-s8ehF2YtxPojOYDAzxGwQuZ7W6n3Ofd8JxyAbirdayunrR-2_tcZNiIMJEVW8%3D "SUPPORT ASHLEY")

I'm Ashley Hinson, a Congresswoman from Iowa. You may not know me, but I'm hoping you'll at least do me the favor of meeting me by reading this in its entirety please.

**I 'm a mom, conservative, and Trump supporter.** I ran for office because I'm terrified of the world my boys will grow up in if the Democrats continue to take us down the path we're headed in.

The Radical Left that preaches __America is evil__ , supports terrorist groups like __Hamas__ , and wants to let __illegal immigrants vote__.

**I believe America can do better, and when I fight in Washington, I fight like a Mama Bear for my boys - and all of America's children.**

clean_body: I know how valuable your time is, so it’d mean more than you know if you took the time to read this. | | | | | | "Ashley Hinson" It means the world to me that you even opened this email. Really, Peter. I know your inbox is probably flooded with messages that look just like this, but trust me, this isn 't a typical message. I'm not a career politician, so asking for money or support doesn't come easy to me. Eight years ago, I left my job as a reporter to serve Iowa. I never saw myself getting into politics, but with two young boys, I couldn't sit on the sidelines any longer. I knew I had to get involved to save the future of our country for my children and future generations. | | "SUPPORT ASHLEY" Soon after, I took my fight to Washington, DC. I served for two years under total Democratic rule. I know what the radical Left wants to do to our country, Peter - I fight back against it every single day. I was born and raised in Iowa, so I know firsthand that D.C. Democrats couldn't care less about us... They will do whatever it takes to appease their dark-money donors who want to turn our state into the next California or New York. I'm no stranger to the Left's attacks, Peter. The past three elections, I've been attacked with MILLIONS, and after Republicans won this year, the Democrats won't stop with their attacks and lies against conservatives. | | "SUPPORT ASHLEY" I know this message was long, and I really appreciate you reading this all the way through. "If you can, it’d mean a lot if you could pitch in just $3, $5, $10, or more if you can to help this mom from Iowa defend our country’s future so the next generation inherits a stronger America." | | "SUPPORT ASHLEY" | Thank you for your time and support, Ashley Hinson | | | ⚠️⚠️⚠️ Don 't close out of this email! "Ashley Hinson with President Trump" I'm Ashley Hinson, a Congresswoman from Iowa. You may not know me, but I'm hoping you'll at least do me the favor of meeting me by reading this in its entirety please. I 'm a mom, conservative, and Trump supporter. I ran for office because I'm terrified of the world my boys will grow up in if the Democrats continue to take us down the path we're headed in. The Radical Left that preaches America is evil , supports terrorist groups like Hamas , and wants to let illegal immigrants vote. I believe America can do better, and when I fight in Washington, I fight like a Mama Bear for my boys - and all of America's children. | | "STAND WITH ASHLEY" I 'm not some cookie-cutter lifelong politician who can call up corporate fat cats or rich liberals to hit my goals. I HATE sending you messages out of the blue like this. I never thought I'd have to be one of "those" types of people. "However, I rely on your $6 here and there to hit my goals because I want our conservative movement fueled by the conservatives who believe in our mission the most." | "STAND WITH ASHLEY" Democrats have tunnel vision when it comes to President Trump. They're blind with hatred because he defeated their all-but-coronated candidate, Kamala Harris. They hate everything we can accomplish under his leadership. I'm fighting to stop the Democrats, and I really hope you're going to stand alongside me in this fight! Thank you, Ashley Hinson | "STAND WITH ASHLEY" | Paid for by Ashley Hinson Victory Committee PO BOX 811 MARION, IA 52302 | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add "info@mail.ashleyhinsonforia.com" to your address book. Hey Peter, If four years of President Donald Trump feels like an eternity to you, here’s how to pass the time: [**outwork him and his enablers so we can stop his attacks on our democracy, end partisan gerrymandering, and achieve fair representation in future elections.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100748186/523754285/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PostInauguration_email_20250121-NDRC-Tier1-PostInauguration_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250121-NDRC-Tier1-PostInauguration_&utm_campaign=PostInauguration&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdjMGIwMjBlLTI1ZDgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5vJvDuL7LTPBfmoRFrUjf01fFPiutGDZcSVDx-Cik4U=) We’ve said it before: **There is no offseason in redistricting.** There are key state-level elections this year that will have major impacts on future electoral maps. There are new congressional maps to be drawn in Ohio, crucial 2025 state legislative campaigns being launched, and statewide ballot initiatives being planned. We can’t miss a beat, Peter — together, we can make a meaningful difference if we put in the work. [**If you still care about fair maps and fair representation, then the first day of Trump’s presidency is the perfect moment to make a contribution to power our efforts defending democracy in the months ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100748187/523754286/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PostInauguration_email_20250121-NDRC-Tier1-PostInauguration_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250121-NDRC-Tier1-PostInauguration_&utm_campaign=PostInauguration&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdjMGIwMjBlLTI1ZDgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5vJvDuL7LTPBfmoRFrUjf01fFPiutGDZcSVDx-Cik4U=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: The fight for fair maps under the Trump administration starts now | Hey Peter, If four years of President Donald Trump feels like an eternity to you, here’s how to pass the time: = We’ve said it before: There is no offseason in redistricting. There are key state-level elections this year that will have major impacts on future electoral maps. There are new congressional maps to be drawn in Ohio, crucial 2025 state legislative campaigns being launched, and statewide ballot initiatives being planned. We can’t miss a beat, Peter — together, we can make a meaningful difference if we put in the work. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We will all experience the consequences of our broken electoral system over the coming months and years. Together, let us find resilience in the actions we take to make fair maps a reality in states across the country. Thanks for everything you do. We’ll keep you posted on our progress — including state supreme court election updates from North Carolina and Wisconsin. MESSAGE FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP
I LOVE YOU!
Being back in the White House is incredible, and I’m only here for one reason: YOU AND THE INCREDIBLE SUPPORTERS WHO NEVER LEFT MY SIDE!
When Biden had my home raided, YOU HAD MY BACK!
When I was arrested and convicted by a crooked court, YOUR SUPPORT GREW EVEN STRONGER!
And when assassins tried to take my life, it was YOU who gave me the strength to FIGHT FIGHT FIGHT!
I’ll never forget what you did for me. I owe you more than you can ever imagine.
**[At this great moment in our nation’s history, I want to tell you what we will accomplish in our first week:](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kdFu2yAUhp8G3xGZA8HJhS-aupnUTpu2da12ZWE4rkkBMxvb6p5-spXm9uc7h_8D5aOz7UdJihMB6KwZCQDhdwTg7ge8_nrGByyo-96cqHrAx2_rKdxf0RlucNCq__lXX57489dRRXH__rqXM7vh6SPiDb5eukOvrFvTospMCfoAWmdYsoIX4iAFl1lX7o8qb7jgjVSy1S0iB8ylzhnbH3NoisyWkMM-Z8DYYS_FcSe4LHQjtTkq0bQNEJEvNuxMH5QzlzRMPu507zNXdinFcat0JnAeUU8D7hYbBjQrQeC80TSoZNdpqnvvbUqI9NJqAmcXadfSTYMuiO-U0XGKsR8SDoSfp-Rrj8ZOnvDqKivXcOynQSPhlYu1i3XXXnOtfFT2LRBefUrVKeh63c1um-nM6q6tzVaudvFzuA8JQyK8WlUTEpB1cNYQXjWn7sW_iMfLvy3cvplXp6XC31-e5j_ZUJq4WOfsKAsi8re16vZGcwn_AwAA__8HC65v)**
|
---
|
* We will rein in the bloated regulatory regime that has smothered our economy. AMERICA IS OPEN FOR BUSINESS AGAIN!
* We will END the open borders and STOP THE INVASION!
* We will ELIMINATE the politicization of our military. Our military will have one job: WINNING WARS AND KEEPING AMERICA SAFE!
* But most importantly, we will no longer be a nation in decline. EVERY DAY WE WILL WIN!

---
|
---

name: Gay Valimont
subject: A Day in My Life; MLK Day Edition.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
**While career politicians are pushing our propaganda, I am aiding and listening to my community.** Hello from Gay Valimont, running for FL-1, updating you on my efforts to educate myself and others on the needs and priorities of my district.**Will you join me in echoing the voices of my district in the face of growing partisanship?** This MLK Day, I had the honor and pleasure of attending Dr. Karen Brown’s presentation. She is Crestview Housing Authority Director, Veteran, and an incredible voice for the needs of Floridians.
---
---
Attending the Cantonment Parade for the MLK celebration afterwards was a blast as well! The feeling of connecting with the very people you aim to represent is a rush like no other, and witnessing the smiles of those around me inspired me to push harder. I also had the honor and opportunity to give out over 20 blankets and 50 hot meals to those within the Washburn Center, an endeavor I hope to continue to ensure those who need support are receiving it. No one should be left behind in today’s society, and part of my mission is to make sure that promise is kept. I believe in earning the trust and respect of those around me, and that is a non-negotiable goal. Nurturing the towns, cities, and homes of everyone within FL-1 is what sets me apart from carpetbagging politicians sitting in comfy offices in D.C. right now. **But it is harder than ever to move forward with oppressive executive actions already plaguing our nation.** **[With your help, I can achieve what I set out to accomplish: accurately represent and educate my district to become better, and reinforce the beautiful beliefs of equality and freedom we all have fought so hard to maintain. Just $8 today puts us on track to achieve greatness tomorrow.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100749427/523759224/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M1NDIxZWItMjlkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tMceeBCkw6xq2bWfgigqyKjOa6cOnk1Hgg-U7OQ69BM=)**

clean_body: | | | While career politicians are pushing our propaganda, I am aiding and listening to my community. Hello from Gay Valimont, running for FL-1, updating you on my efforts to educate myself and others on the needs and priorities of my district.Will you join me in echoing the voices of my district in the face of growing partisanship? This MLK Day, I had the honor and pleasure of attending Dr. Karen Brown’s presentation. She is Crestview Housing Authority Director, Veteran, and an incredible voice for the needs of Floridians. Attending the Cantonment Parade for the MLK celebration afterwards was a blast as well! The feeling of connecting with the very people you aim to represent is a rush like no other, and witnessing the smiles of those around me inspired me to push harder. I also had the honor and opportunity to give out over 20 blankets and 50 hot meals to those within the Washburn Center, an endeavor I hope to continue to ensure those who need support are receiving it. No one should be left behind in today’s society, and part of my mission is to make sure that promise is kept. I believe in earning the trust and respect of those around me, and that is a non-negotiable goal. Nurturing the towns, cities, and homes of everyone within FL-1 is what sets me apart from carpetbagging politicians sitting in comfy offices in D.C. right now. But it is harder than ever to move forward with oppressive executive actions already plaguing our nation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Without you, I can’t continue my efforts much longer. Here to Serve, Gay Valimont | | | | | Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress PO Box 1258 Gulf Breeze, FL 32562 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

NYT: Trump Grants Sweeping Clemency to All Jan. 6 Rioters The extraordinary pardons and commutations extended to those who committed both violent and nonviolent crimes on Jan. 6, including assaulting police officers and seditious conspiracy. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NYT_Jan6_Pardons.png]
As part of a sweeping set of executive orders after being inaugurated for his second term, Donald Trump gave pardons and clemency to over a thousand people convicted of crimes they committed while assaulting the Capitol on January 6, 2021.
We want to hear from supporters in your area about this news. Will you take our one-click poll right away?

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012125_1&amount=25]

We’re stunned...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22782%2E4449941%2EstYG7F)
---
**BAD NEWS:** _MSNBC’s_ sharp drop in recent ratings has led to Comcast deciding to sell the network. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22782%2E4449941%2EstYG7F) **WORSE NEWS:** Far-right billionaire Elon Musk is considering purchasing it!

We’re **stunned** to see that MSNBC is struggling after years of being one of the top options for progressive news.

**So we’re conducting an _URGENT_ poll to see our top supporters viewing habits:** | **[_[1-CLICK POLL] Do you watch _MSNBC?__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22782%2E4449941%2EstYG7F)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=22782%2E4449941%2EstYG7F) | **[YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=22782%2E4449941%2EstYG7F)**
---
**[NO, I DON'T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=22782%2E4449941%2EstYG7F)**
**** 500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM TO MAKE THIS POLL VIABLE. ****
Donald Trump and his MAGA army have waged a war against any news channel that doesn’t bow down to him and promote his dangerous rhetoric.

_Now, Trump’s biggest supporter is trying to buy it and RUIN one of the most trusted news sources in America._

We need to know if our supporters are still watching MSNBC or if they’ve abandoned the once beloved network.
**[_So PLEASE: submit your poll response quickly! »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20250121_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=22782%2E4449941%2EstYG7F)**
**500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM**
Thank you for your commitment to upholding democracy,

-FFR Polling Team
_MSNBC_ is not associated or affiliated with Fight for Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication.

body:
The 2025 General Assembly Session
| | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
---
| 2025 SESSION What happened today?
---
| Three Constitutional Amendments pass out of the Virginia Senate Today:
* Repeal of a ban on same sex marriage
* Late term abortion
* Automatic restoration of felon voting rights, to include violent offenders

---
| Wednesday What can you expect?
---
|
* Lots of gun control bills being introduced by Senate Democrats coming up at 7:30am in the Subcommittee on Public Safety and Claims to include a bill. Oppose.
* SB747 Favola. Provides that a JDR court has the authority to order mental health and social assessments. If a juvenile is found to be delinquent, the court has the authority to order treatment.
* SB880 Ebbin. Prohibits the carrying of assault firearms in public areas.
* SB848 Salim. Increases age from 18 to 21 to purchase a firearm.

---
|

# OR
# CALL IN TO THE MEETING LIVE

# AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
|
Dear Hello It was a tense day in the Virginia Senate today as Senators had to debate and vote on three controversial Constitutional Amendments, dealing with late term abortion, felon voting rights and a ban on same sex marriage.
Republicans attempted to adopt a floor amendment that would ensure parental notification for girls under age 18, seeking a late term abortion. Democrats rejected the motion, responding that the code already requires parental notification.
Sparks flew between Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears and Senate Majority Leader Scott Surovell, who ruled the Leader out of order for citing tactics involving Supreme Court Justices and United States Senator Mitch McConnell in a derogatory manner.
As expected, the Democrat controlled full Senate passed three Constitutional Amendments out of the Virginia Senate:
1. Same sex marriage ban
2. Late term abortion
3. Voting rights restored to felons automatically

Now the three Constitutional Amendments will head to the Democrat controlled House where we know it will pass.
The Constitutional Amendments will not head to the Governor's Desk. Instead, they will be voted on again next year. We will need to win back the House next year in order to stop these Constitutional Amendments.
If all else fails, and the Democrats keep control of the House, the Constitutional Amendments will be put on November's ballot in the form of a referendum for the people to decide.

---
| |
---
|
---
Tomorrow is a big day for gun bills, beginning at 7:30am. These bills are now all heading to the Senate Finance Committee.
Please make phone calls to legislators sitting on the committees hearing these bills tomorrow, to include calling in during the subcommittee on Public Safety and the Finance and Appropriations committees meetings for real time comment to support or oppose a bill.
Your participation determines our quality of life here in the Commonwealth. So please reach out to respective legislators.
Our country has been saved. We must now save Virginia. Let's do this.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---

# SUPPORT AMANDA HERE
---
|
While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. As long as my costs are covered, I can continue to provide this service to you.
I do my own research and writing. So I promise there will be typos.
With the quick turn around time involved in reading bills on the docket for the next day and getting the info out in a timely manner, there's not much time for proofreading by others. Thanks for your grace and patience.
I'm currently publishing this on a voluntary basis and to help you hold your government accountable.
While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you.

clean_body: The 2025 General Assembly Session | | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT | | | | | | | 2025 SESSION What happened today? | Three Constitutional Amendments pass out of the Virginia Senate Today: Repeal of a ban on same sex marriage Late term abortion Automatic restoration of felon voting rights, to include violent offenders | Wednesday What can you expect? | Lots of gun control bills being introduced by Senate Democrats coming up at 7:30am in the Subcommittee on Public Safety and Claims to include a bill. Oppose. SB747 Favola. Provides that a JDR court has the authority to order mental health and social assessments. If a juvenile is found to be delinquent, the court has the authority to order treatment. SB880 Ebbin. Prohibits the carrying of assault firearms in public areas. * SB848 Salim. Increases age from 18 to 21 to purchase a firearm. | ATTEND IN PERSON OR CALL IN TO THE MEETING LIVE | Wednesday Senate Committee Meetings | FINANCE & APPROPRIATIONS == 7:30 AM, Wednesday Senate Finance & Appropriations Room, 13th floor, GAB == 9:00 AM, Wednesday Senate Room A (305), GAB == Noon, Wednesday Senate Chamber, Capitol == 30 min after session adjourns, Wednesday Senate Room B (306), GAB == 30 min after session adjourns, Wednesday Senate Room A , GAB BILLS COMING UP TODAY BY COMMITTEE | == | == | == | == | == | AMANDA CHASE | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | Dear Hello It was a tense day in the Virginia Senate today as Senators had to debate and vote on three controversial Constitutional Amendments, dealing with late term abortion, felon voting rights and a ban on same sex marriage. Republicans attempted to adopt a floor amendment that would ensure parental notification for girls under age 18, seeking a late term abortion. Democrats rejected the motion, responding that the code already requires parental notification. Sparks flew between Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears and Senate Majority Leader Scott Surovell, who ruled the Leader out of order for citing tactics involving Supreme Court Justices and United States Senator Mitch McConnell in a derogatory manner. As expected, the Democrat controlled full Senate passed three Constitutional Amendments out of the Virginia Senate: 1. Same sex marriage ban 2. Late term abortion 3. Voting rights restored to felons automatically Now the three Constitutional Amendments will head to the Democrat controlled House where we know it will pass. The Constitutional Amendments will not head to the Governor's Desk. Instead, they will be voted on again next year. We will need to win back the House next year in order to stop these Constitutional Amendments. If all else fails, and the Democrats keep control of the House, the Constitutional Amendments will be put on November's ballot in the form of a referendum for the people to decide. | | | Tomorrow is a big day for gun bills, beginning at 7:30am. These bills are now all heading to the Senate Finance Committee. Please make phone calls to legislators sitting on the committees hearing these bills tomorrow, to include calling in during the subcommittee on Public Safety and the Finance and Appropriations committees meetings for real time comment to support or oppose a bill. Your participation determines our quality of life here in the Commonwealth. So please reach out to respective legislators. Our country has been saved. We must now save Virginia. Let's do this. | | | | | | | | | IMPORTANT DATES | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES Begins: Wednesday, January 8 at noon Crossover: Tuesday, February 4 Ends: Saturday, February 22 Last Day for Governor's Actions: Monday, March 24 Reconvene: Wednesday, April 2 | IMPORTANT LINKS | | == | | == | | == | == | | == | SUPPORT AMANDA HERE | While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. As long as my costs are covered, I can continue to provide this service to you. I do my own research and writing. So I promise there will be typos. With the quick turn around time involved in reading bills on the docket for the next day and getting the info out in a timely manner, there's not much time for proofreading by others. Thanks for your grace and patience. I'm currently publishing this on a voluntary basis and to help you hold your government accountable. While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you. Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. Thank you in advance. | | == | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- mailto:?subject=What%20you%20can%20expect%3F%20%20Wednesday%2C%20Jan%2022&body= | mailto:?subject=What%20you%20can%20expect%3F%20%20Wednesday%2C%20Jan%2022&body= ---|--- | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US | | | | | | |

This cultural and corporate tug-of-war over DEI is becoming a defining battlefront in America’s [...]

Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100750474/523762713/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250121_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU4ZjRmZi0yYmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03UMviyI42dmjNqjVb4V0tLf69tf5v305y2ILd49rio=) Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain.

I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips.

**I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100750475/523762714/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250121_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU4ZjRmZi0yYmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03UMviyI42dmjNqjVb4V0tLf69tf5v305y2ILd49rio=) My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family.

Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.

You see, the New York City government shoveled over _$100 million in government aid_ to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. _They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street._

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: **Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families.**

When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it.

I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress.

Right now, the shadow of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families _– and they’re raising millions to pull it off._

But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. [**Can I count on you to join our coalition today by chipping in $3 toward our $10,000 Inauguration week goal? If thousands of people like you each chip in what they can afford, I know we can take on their dark money and handle whatever the GOP trifecta throws our way. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100750477/523762716/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250121_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU4ZjRmZi0yYmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03UMviyI42dmjNqjVb4V0tLf69tf5v305y2ILd49rio=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100750488/523762729/-864556716?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250121_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU4ZjRmZi0yYmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03UMviyI42dmjNqjVb4V0tLf69tf5v305y2ILd49rio=)

_Ritchie_

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Settlement Reached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Thanks to your support, I’ve saved my home.
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7c6093f87d2741679f4751a70b937d3f&_e=TRSKFuzcYMxYblES96-LIY1_W0H_0NPlb0uCdQwa99g7Yi-66sS_xj3i6ARj2Sh6s6TwJh6eL8m7l_ChZRFwbQYOTtT0eATKLw8N9Qfn9Xb7_MyS9ikle_oEPOZwPrLChx3FcJSPXWDl38APo3BkzSATl2bwfzzbaIQf6oySAYh3G6WCNkzQJ5wFCLIgNYRodBwG0MWFx5EQJUaTQ3jJKoNjDn2HePye3mYElVYfSagbfug_REKqbhB9bCYBPWjDDKtziPjMg3jgwykcP1QMGq4GWlxkE2HxWdb_IyReATEdYGuwktwU-fB-tthVZBTSaCIpHtZLGqu_zQ-F422Hm-kaME1fiwNkyuBrGDu8GRT7BelYuGLIKfICQd8oSxqs)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
From the bottom of my heart... _THANK YOU_.
---
Thanks to the generosity of Americans like you who contributed to my Legal Defense Trust, I have great news to share with you.
---
I have reached a resolution of the litigation with the Plaintiffs that will result in a satisfaction of the Plaintiffs’ judgment.
---
__This resolution does not involve an admission of liability or wrongdoing by any of the Parties. I am satisfied with and have no grievances relating to the result we have reached.__
---
**I have been able to retain my New York co-op and Florida Condominium and all of my personal belongings. No one deserves to be subjected to threats, harassment, or intimidation.**
---
This litigation has taken its toll on all parties. This whole episode was unfortunate.
---
I and the Plaintiffs have agreed not to ever talk about each other in any defamatory manner, and I urge others to do the same.
---
Make no mistake: I could not have done this without the contributions you made to my Legal Defense Trust. Your support served as a reminder that America is home to the most generous souls on the planet.
---
_While this case has been settled, I still have outstanding legal expenses and one remaining case in Arizona set to go to trial in 2026._
---
But with you by my side, I am confident we will win.
---

clean_body: Thanks to your support, I’ve saved my home. | Fellow Patriot, From the bottom of my heart... THANK YOU. Thanks to the generosity of Americans like you who contributed to my Legal Defense Trust, I have great news to share with you. I have reached a resolution of the litigation with the Plaintiffs that will result in a satisfaction of the Plaintiffs’ judgment. This resolution does not involve an admission of liability or wrongdoing by any of the Parties. I am satisfied with and have no grievances relating to the result we have reached. I have been able to retain my New York co-op and Florida Condominium and all of my personal belongings. No one deserves to be subjected to threats, harassment, or intimidation. This litigation has taken its toll on all parties. This whole episode was unfortunate. I and the Plaintiffs have agreed not to ever talk about each other in any defamatory manner, and I urge others to do the same. Make no mistake: I could not have done this without the contributions you made to my Legal Defense Trust. Your support served as a reminder that America is home to the most generous souls on the planet. While this case has been settled, I still have outstanding legal expenses and one remaining case in Arizona set to go to trial in 2026. But with you by my side, I am confident we will win. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: You can send diapers to the fire victims
body:
Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires.

| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c1963ed05634df09a2126b33516bbe5&_e=tDlcTKkVIEISFfN87ESNJJZd-w1ybUKDazixPrHmVI4kcGC8WoAqu-kb4A64FxhgTLnwWgJoHX1UlWwiLBMQonzPDc6JqUkpEp3BXAkb3A1msjg4vmrm65vEEngHYbNN1WLA-DG_thhpPkK0a9q1wWTjF2xaZ-7RnDtqzWJDn4Q9p8wZcAfeRJ-F78P5akUd770KVEv5e0HMSMKNwin64xRFlBfssxXG6lYz434qAoElpx_BEImzeR5CP7O8oe3gL6rntRPXzHjpcR4nVXw1-pFoRlYWlKH6CvqMW5oQ3pzHElGry4F3nk9NpRDY9r78MI_fEOW8GLSaRGTAvoYBPLQRdBVaaHQdp9n45_jld4RIOvUo0YoTzm_okx3DCzvV)
---
#
Friend of Life,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c1963ed05634df09a2126b33516bbe5&_e=tDlcTKkVIEISFfN87ESNJJZd-w1ybUKDazixPrHmVI4kcGC8WoAqu-kb4A64FxhgTLnwWgJoHX1UlWwiLBMQonzPDc6JqUkpEp3BXAkb3A1msjg4vmrm65vEEngHYbNN1WLA-DG_thhpPkK0a9q1wWTjF2xaZ-7RnDtqzWJDn4Q9p8wZcAfeRJ-F78P5akUd770KVEv5e0HMSMKNwin64-nomZaWC4xMRneiPU2nRuzq0CbmIDXNBGSdbK2zDdHX5q_zro4UgbgmKjU_qVWvVMBcHW4N9CKS8_hFQmi_84OkU-bIo-ivpmv8w6tNYN81wAdgHLJ52wWvRPUcx1vHfsxL8xO0NKULlclsGMO66RwS2vz3IWpFOC0US0YOqsyf)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c1963ed05634df09a2126b33516bbe5&_e=tDlcTKkVIEISFfN87ESNJJZd-w1ybUKDazixPrHmVI4kcGC8WoAqu-kb4A64FxhgTLnwWgJoHX1UlWwiLBMQonzPDc6JqUkpEp3BXAkb3A1msjg4vmrm65vEEngHYbNN1WLA-DG_thhpPkK0a9q1wWTjF2xaZ-7RnDtqzWJDn4Q9p8wZcAfeRJ-F78P5akUd770KVEv5e0HMSMKNwin648dJcuhn8m8qNAeIl0keGMC4VQezXjPuRiLVg1POQI2iQNDDa5UFH90iA_10eYQRu5ahNkysQtWUJEZBDHAYff_C3dAyNYtvhHgtdXdsgvQ8U59r4FPbW-tS1_MGfiIeZHnFNhuoS4BhSGI5DSl9z8a1OioygOsX7vaAkB5KtXFI)**

Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c1963ed05634df09a2126b33516bbe5&_e=tDlcTKkVIEISFfN87ESNJJZd-w1ybUKDazixPrHmVI4kcGC8WoAqu-kb4A64FxhgTLnwWgJoHX1UlWwiLBMQonzPDc6JqUkpEp3BXAkb3A1msjg4vmrm65vEEngHYbNN1WLA-DG_thhpPkK0a9q1wWTjF2xaZ-7RnDtqzWJDn4Q9p8wZcAfeRJ-F78P5akUd770KVEv5e0HMSMKNwin64xX6PDyhZf2gbyoTUyxE4Kn1ussLJQlfC599ESYRMWEiVfCouTAxL-DeVoBBiIHjUAmKDnAOx1_mGAsvK8uftLPEnMnBO-KoTR5XJuunZx2eSlFOVPP4DM9D-oudBCegsFw2TC8js2P-7dlBEbRcHrnxdEoVEE2c19WIILIo9A8i)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

body:

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100751094/523764736/279728398?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Day1_250121_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWU3YWUyMi0yZWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YupvlIfCNU2CPiSL0kvqcLo1hi7NsTADKJSXSOIkMmQ=) It’s Donald Trump’s first day being president again, Derek. Here’s the damage he’s done in a matter of hours:
1. He **stripped employment protections from tens of thousands of federal workers** , laying the foundation to reshape our federal agencies by stacking them with his politicized loyalists.

2. He **pardoned nearly 1,600 people charged in the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol** – sending the dangerous message that violence against law enforcement has no consequences.

3. He **withdrew from the Paris climate accords** _while climate-change induced fires continue to devastate Los Angeles._

That’s just the beginning, and we’re barely 24 hours into his presidency. He’s likely signing more disastrous executive orders as we speak.

[_**I hope you’ll remember, Derek, no matter what this administration has in store, I will stand up and fight to protect the livelihoods of you and every American. Will you chip in to keep me in the Senate so I can continue this crucial work?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100751095/523764737/279728398?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Day1_250121_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWU3YWUyMi0yZWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YupvlIfCNU2CPiSL0kvqcLo1hi7NsTADKJSXSOIkMmQ=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner

clean_body: | | | = It’s Donald Trump’s first day being president again, Derek. Here’s the damage he’s done in a matter of hours: 1. He stripped employment protections from tens of thousands of federal workers , laying the foundation to reshape our federal agencies by stacking them with his politicized loyalists. 2. He pardoned nearly 1,600 people charged in the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol – sending the dangerous message that violence against law enforcement has no consequences. 3. He withdrew from the Paris climate accords while climate-change induced fires continue to devastate Los Angeles. That’s just the beginning, and we’re barely 24 hours into his presidency. body:
Citizens United is a scourge on our democracy, and today is the 15th anniversary of the disastrous Supreme Court ruling.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100751097/523764772/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGY2MWU0Yi0yZWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SI64QFWun8ucUJ_NmZaf0EJfdpC90ZimIqLOYpLdgLk=&emci=b38fa940-2ed8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=50f61e4b-2ed8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=7731215)
---

| | _Citizens United_ is a scourge on our democracy, and today is the 15th anniversary of the Supreme Court's disastrous ruling that broke open the floodgates for dark money. It unleashed a deluge of anonymous campaign cash from big corporations, super PACs, and unaccountable billionaires, like Elon Musk and Harlan Crow, crashing into our political process and rigging it even more to serve the ultra-wealthy. Since then, millions upon millions of dollars in dark money have poisoned our elections, swamping the airwaves with disinformation and influencing outcomes by tilting the playing field toward the most powerful while working Americans struggle to be heard. Let's be clear: Every person has the right to speak out in our democracy – that's the promise of the First Amendment. **But corporations are not people and should not be able to anonymously corrupt our elections.** My colleagues and I are elected to work for "We the People," but with right-wing billionaires openly corrupting the Supreme Court, members of Congress trading stocks despite obvious conflicts of interest, and corporate polluters funneling dark money into Super PACs to manipulate electoral outcomes, the people's voice is being silenced. We need to end these practices right now, and that's why I'm championing key bills to stop these anti-democratic schemes, including my bill to ban members of Congress from trading stocks and my bill to end gambling on elections. And, I partnered with colleagues to champion the DISCLOSE Act, led by Senator Whitehouse, which would end the influence of dark money, shine a bright light of transparency on political spending by letting Americans know who is behind the massive flow of money and why, and make our government more accountable to voters. **A healthy democracy thrives when the people's voices are heard.** It's long past time for Congress to pass this bill, put voters back in charge, and stop billionaires with right-wing agendas from secretly buying our elections with dark money smear campaigns. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:
