clean_body: Match your gift to defend abortion | | | ---|--- Peter— Now that President Trump has taken office, the reality is clear: this administration is intent on stripping away our most fundamental rights, including bodily autonomy. But are we backing down?No way. Take action and fuel our fight against this administration's anti-rights agenda. | "$50 = $100" "$50 = $100" "$50 = $100" "$50 = $100" We were on the frontlines during the first Trump administration. Now, we’re bringing the fight right to them. It is NOT acceptable to have the government meddle in your private medical decisions. It is NOT acceptable for a president to embolden extremists who want nothing less than complete control over our bodies. None of this is acceptable. Pledge your support by midnight tonight and every dollar up to our $25,000 goal will be matched 2X! Onward, Center for Reproductive Rights P.S. The consequences of the White House's anti-rights agenda could be devastating—even deadly. "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. name: Katie Porter
subject: See you on Sunday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
A Whiteboard on Trump’s White House
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39397%2E3422442%2EXlja5a)
Derek,
Between executive orders, cabinet appointments, and Republicans’ legislative agenda, there’s a lot of news coming at us this week.
This Sunday, I’m hosting a zoom discussion about Trump’s first week back in the White House. I’ll be talking about what went down, what’s to come, and how we can fight back.
**[If you make a donation of any amount to Truth to Power (my PAC dedicated to electing Democrats) using this link, you’ll receive the Zoom link to join.*](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-202501-zoom?refcode=em20250121-39397&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39397_3422442_Xlja5a&akid=39397%2E3422442%2EXlja5a)**
**[A Whiteboard on Trump’s White House](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-202501-zoom?refcode=em20250121-39397&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39397_3422442_Xlja5a&akid=39397%2E3422442%2EXlja5a)**
Sunday, January 26, 4pm PT/7pm ET
Zoom link provided upon donation of any amount
I hope to see you on Sunday! If you have questions you’d like to make sure I address, please share them on the ActBlue form when you make your donation.
—Katie Porter
_*After you donate, the zoom link will be sent in your ActBlue receipt. Look for an email from Actblue with the subject line: “Thank you for your contribution!”_

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people.

subject: Worship at the Pentagon? God is at work!!!
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=ab5a0cdb9a27439191f1b006eba09307&_e=Xg1IEnAApEaufVdPKkJKZzkjFVm9sLEm7a0dztyYrO_Jx-vDEfTorrB0JXZ0afsKs6kOZntzn_GXbIFjizJJAlJCabkthd7z7KFUj4KG6IUOxilBN1P5RfF3_hr753_qbY7xlXRyZDfGfI2-YRLcZZiVuXDmZ5Dunhf5eqc6Cq_Xwy3ekVzQeCRdYcGZUO9JfQg3RJ8RNoC_qr27NZkVdrYuhMARWvldhH6JuhTr2x0YYKXCQ-UoRYwdLrVv8tECMdx3DKvVq6D1BHFtWZGvU400KaKqt5AOtHSkOO9gpjzhV0_dqVPa8o6el_kpHNDgmnbNq6k8sfwtMjRecvFGyw%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
It’s amazing to see how God works behind the scenes. Introductions turn into friendships, and friendships open doors that once seemed impossible. Today in Washington, D.C., I ran into my friend Pete Hegseth. Pete talked about how amazing our Washington, D.C. revival was, then he posed this question to me: “What if we did something like that at the Pentagon?” WHAT??

God is at work in a POWERFUL way, showing that He isn’t done working in our government and in our nation! Pray for Pete as he faces untold hostility from the Swamp in D.C., and pray that we will have the opportunity to bring praise, worship, and the GOSPEL to the places it is needed most!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=ab5a0cdb9a27439191f1b006eba09307&_e=Xg1IEnAApEaufVdPKkJKZzkjFVm9sLEm7a0dztyYrO_Jx-vDEfTorrB0JXZ0afsKs6kOZntzn_GXbIFjizJJAlJCabkthd7z7KFUj4KG6IUOxilBN1P5RfF3_hr753_qbY7xlXRyZDfGfI2-YRLcZZiVuXDmZ5Dunhf5eqc6Cq_DQn-nB5IM4uozJaTWBuH9sdQ-xAiEIv-GJAbk4Ub0_aE7qUcZ2lv9K9ExbztXfFcjGSHqPLgrpEAlJ_kEMizCpiC80Z_bnYd3SWNQGBGAabogG-mQBGWuVBXb3lGZzF8mX7lhy-GzfWqrRgyNiVaN33grINLQ0h-X2to3s_JHaQ%3D%3D)

Till all hear,

Sean

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9fc30f894e44269a10a195327fdde4d&_e=h3bbs4KgkK77EunjmhKYk3SxwvarV8f4e1a2--eOHeESCFBn27VYLUbFc9BRmvYuxFD9rfHO2ZEGIvVkCifM8106m46AbgLYSsllXCgpSDFD4ZRbChPhstHeImUznOFVzblvZy_liN-0bJeC-t4-L7tfGmp_jovqBCKyq-ccCHAkvx6YbrIFnwxE9mPEuaTEp_M6KfNMbOW-v8agvX0Z9LPeNhcXrcSrpD1NtmnbbAlZ_PVhPgd7nI3pwNuhOr3ksaoPGnCAz43rG1XUPXdbv7Do9XLsZfyjdMj0oJAzZPe_jxY1SfrOuMZZCxoz2pEkaOHLBhRKK7FSJo5rPRbFCknq7g0eOf_uCuY6RWQIOahrkh9rj9F8qcjGm8tfz3NR_RpaQghp37JCvZq1Vq2IEQ%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9fc30f894e44269a10a195327fdde4d&_e=h3bbs4KgkK77EunjmhKYk3SxwvarV8f4e1a2--eOHeESCFBn27VYLUbFc9BRmvYuxFD9rfHO2ZEGIvVkCifM8106m46AbgLYSsllXCgpSDFD4ZRbChPhstHeImUznOFVzblvZy_liN-0bJeC-t4-L7tfGmp_jovqBCKyq-ccCHAkvx6YbrIFnwxE9mPEuaTEp_M6KfNMbOW-v8agvX0Z9LPeNhcXrcSrpD1NtmnbbAkTArL00MhbpnkkvJ_R43jcOgVJIyQFqDuwYPX507f4PCky8aXm34qbMP-TZ9PQlq6Kx6TcpThWzIL3keZeB7H2TSKY61Q_hGzpX3-QimmLnyl-SgBZzSPF-2slkcxmJju2RUT2ko7im0gKUts3sCgxw2ovHUlT1lnmga341LtSlA%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9fc30f894e44269a10a195327fdde4d&_e=h3bbs4KgkK77EunjmhKYk3SxwvarV8f4e1a2--eOHeESCFBn27VYLUbFc9BRmvYuxFD9rfHO2ZEGIvVkCifM8106m46AbgLYSsllXCgpSDFD4ZRbChPhstHeImUznOFVzblvZy_liN-0bJeC-t4-L7tfGmp_jovqBCKyq-ccCHAkvx6YbrIFnwxE9mPEuaTEp_M6KfNMbOW-v8agvX0Z9LPeNhcXrcSrpD1NtmnbbAnTG5ykw-1CDWW7Mk83JN234AIzPMGO4V7B6A9uwEofYLSPkVhFwGqsxSwyA1-njlIMF1iSiYmqZMda4ronAf-N4NBHth_jdAFitr45gfveplHn5-mLH2QZWTC_q_3Do_JMyxR95eTFmm6yPkPbLg38e6dNq-XTCpPvFmfejZV2Cw%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9fc30f894e44269a10a195327fdde4d&_e=h3bbs4KgkK77EunjmhKYk3SxwvarV8f4e1a2--eOHeESCFBn27VYLUbFc9BRmvYuxFD9rfHO2ZEGIvVkCifM8106m46AbgLYSsllXCgpSDFD4ZRbChPhstHeImUznOFVzblvZy_liN-0bJeC-t4-L7tfGmp_jovqBCKyq-ccCHAkvx6YbrIFnwxE9mPEuaTEp_M6KfNMbOW-v8agvX0Z9LPeNhcXrcSrpD1NtmnbbAne-zazujVAB6VfgH5aHRSDr-To_zwHL3QSPGZrbJtOlQKy8ayhM5UxEGADOs0C4kvCuB0WD_06i8XMZivHsF0_XPSKNIUqfusH2J_4DYLkZn8W-DC53l3RqTXJMBpdBrm5V894pTqir8QTItJEiXLwb-L5hwFa1CPYXFLPcJvg6w%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9fc30f894e44269a10a195327fdde4d&_e=h3bbs4KgkK77EunjmhKYk3SxwvarV8f4e1a2--eOHeESCFBn27VYLUbFc9BRmvYuxFD9rfHO2ZEGIvVkCifM8106m46AbgLYSsllXCgpSDFD4ZRbChPhstHeImUznOFVzblvZy_liN-0bJeC-t4-L7tfGmp_jovqBCKyq-ccCHAkvx6YbrIFnwxE9mPEuaTEp_M6KfNMbOW-v8agvX0Z9LPeNhcXrcSrpD1NtmnbbAmpaN7-4RzCdeud8dpeeHzoF5uONY-vOEpADOIny-cAWiW6acu9oxsD8aHTWHfKRGJu_o8Q7lQ5zSMqRlbILc6K2gkfW1-kp70IW8ea9P6icjEX3cNK_3BrESJkIunZfUF7vPAuFraeQbxuFBJgoZregJ6vLWKrh3ir_JjVXIEPyg%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9fc30f894e44269a10a195327fdde4d&_e=h3bbs4KgkK77EunjmhKYk3SxwvarV8f4e1a2--eOHeESCFBn27VYLUbFc9BRmvYuxFD9rfHO2ZEGIvVkCifM8106m46AbgLYSsllXCgpSDFD4ZRbChPhstHeImUznOFVzblvZy_liN-0bJeC-t4-L7tfGmp_jovqBCKyq-ccCHAkvx6YbrIFnwxE9mPEuaTEp_M6KfNMbOW-v8agvX0Z9LPeNhcXrcSrpD1NtmnbbAnUa-AsT8_eJarIWV3q2zQmzdV9pao8z1Oteo0h5dSPt4vCdyWnFsjDBe-85VswdB2KfRp20Nz_cb0M4ot4q_rKpq__2WI0WJxmSMEHN-Yk62OVlYB-wTMcLdgi3sdIwt9llTeyVaxz5WGaT8KlehRv4uL6yNA2henQqJ4nm_HYTg%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=e9fc30f894e44269a10a195327fdde4d&_t=UZOeaOdAPtOI7ubZO6pp_-5MapoyjoFWXRtwb9kNMPI1E0K0suFpJonh6D7ZoqGWxa37CZt5ADP5qDlGTy0g8IuZzWMSnUkuBlsyVSEPwiGyP5YEe08L3ipbCHYBYwGf)
clean_body: Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. Dear Fellow American, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him. Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. – but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! body:
| | | **In the first elections of Donald Trump’s second term, I’m fighting back in our statehouses - I’m running to return to the Virginia House of Delegates.**
******[Split a donation between Able Dems and our red-to-blue campaign for Virginia House of Delegates District 22.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOoTLEqv-ZjgqcT62kaq0T2dODvkdMGBd2DxT6v-RV6zXsWhxzNow7aMTlwesFKPQnnD_AUToEhRYoQjNG1kUfK7NmZisJIdoQEjHK_k_MBS9gjC17jNtcma8iYYCOKf2FUcvKNAqDMSa-l3BNZt7YsNYu10zLIuBv5DvQHIuOJ-3RFpZVotuEanKESm8wFLKhrMIupdyYafYBcsLKdwQ5xWBDqrZz7V_ZVakeHOgnSWZUTO2_ZeCPF8CtM4ZgLgOf_4RAxSIioPyJwokN__hBgBo5sGT-C_tUeZxvFZn6XKc2WDtyYkPGpHeQpBh3mrXyD84maD-IxoXgWIm8H1vam_Xah7Y6eS1v7ts2gtnQ2No/4dc/zb5QsPDjSAKIfzlv57b5Wg/h0/h001.KtruVGsJ8WKv_iTLPLMXArxSsZ6knGGmJ8idPRzC7Wc)**
* * *
I’m Elizabeth Guzman, and I’m launching my campaign today for a red to blue race in Virginia’s 22nd House of Delegates district.
**2025’s Virginia elections will be the first test of whether Democrats can win under Trump’s second term -_and hundreds of grassroots donors like you will help prove our strength._**
**I’ll tell you a little more about me shortly,[but if you’re ready to donate now, split a donation between Able Dems and my campaign here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOoTLEqv-ZjgqcT62kaq0T2dODvkdMGBd2DxT6v-RV6zX9vXLPxYRZ350HyKk4ykeUC7M41gL9SF0JYuf8hskYR28A4ZxoTzzfv_v53uDMxWm9c3n3TIm7XEGk3Uw13FNtrpMHYU137-QjojSy15OlO8x2p3i-WmmsjwOaXTXYYzYZw0aJYLZ75RvL3GLNgmeqG9WcfbOscq9euHiadSHli9_wXfM-McGOh671MAYV29Jabx3UteaIPC7efGHdMTr5vNiIk82neF-XhnPHZKyVU7_1yC-vDggKbADpAR13LYa3ynVc4HVihgb6c6gSsgqgLNrOoTubkVXBFTjm4cxAPxZg-ul55BjbfLCL-HwmlbE/4dc/zb5QsPDjSAKIfzlv57b5Wg/h1/h001.a9fXSlktv7tjqeuHbP65jl0cGhgy5-WivoZasMYiRJU)**
I came to the United States as a single mother, working three minimum wage jobs at the same time to pay for my education, becoming a social worker and union leader.
In 2017, after Donald Trump’s first inauguration, I fought back and became the first immigrant Latina in the Virginia House of Delegates, defeating an entrenched Republican incumbent.
In 2018, I delivered the Spanish-language response to Trump’s State of the Union, denouncing hate and extremism. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOoTLEqv-ZjgqcT62kaq0T2dODvkdMGBd2DxT6v-RV6zVSyGG3-M7ytSa-ZIajHll2zOndpj9ttCCNIY8MZqTCtGNgrZNlkX5iNMBi9zY6RC4o6cB3_OL9QxM65BsleHN9wdp142fwyoLklnVJo0b-7iVKDHt7I3FLQleeEAAmvXLh4Oyf-N_Qr1n-Hog4rBcUFyyog6W5Z874uUMu-hfAwnNoy6zNhTIU_VDjc5P-ImUO-TGid1-mwO1HG3Jzu-NdvZMqp5ftboggbOEG3Yah-ZIx3JMOp1gSJxWNiF8RXYsjUzpikg8Krfz8YmKTF_Wr-IhTcxlZoTPs26SXb2_MMqqMUxFTrT-9LU6aMFP3hpo/4dc/zb5QsPDjSAKIfzlv57b5Wg/h2/h001.mluRec65cCXDChCqaTaFcmGwT3oYU5NKCSsz5eu5wEg)
I served for 6 years, passing laws to raise the minimum wage, end a Jim Crow-era ban on public sector collective bargaining, and expand reproductive freedom.
**Now, as Donald Trump returns, I’m stepping back up.**
Virginia Democrats are defending a 51-49 majority in the House of Delegates, and my red-to-blue race i _s in a district Trump lost_ \- one of the best opportunities nationwide to win.
**To fight back against Trump’s attacks on our immigrant families, public schools, healthcare, reproductive rights, and civil service, we need Democratic state legislatures.**
******[Friend, split a donation between Able Dems and our red-to-blue campaign for Virginia House of Delegates District 22.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOoTLEqv-ZjgqcT62kaq0T2dODvkdMGBd2DxT6v-RV6zV8ds3wAqHuN6BPMNIN0S55OaFDfjRLsB181jazkTc20WWGiMJB5TrY3BANJt9jCS5B7Aud4wETDZWltrEk20weqkgOj5EInhY6kxjPtYNuOEqP1ZxXAzz8ORPJ6wUxTewqzcBJSmK2CzV9bMFBLCoxcyH_X6RmWS16cGorvqSKjLaKZcedUSyEvApjsR5kpayhYRooo4AY7A7t4FE2ELJcjYYt51QH_ElyE7TQB9YZEFomyAkufV5ozKxrYO1l0ZiZNDpmWAKHVUhRZEGOnVX6msqUT44IqRQyY-e96HdL0zPT7YWC6zNA_xuOG3nb5hg/4dc/zb5QsPDjSAKIfzlv57b5Wg/h3/h001._F6YW5mVTBwyz9rTcYEux4MFsX2En2KWzWXLKo01tpc)** | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOoTLEqv-ZjgqcT62kaq0T2dODvkdMGBd2DxT6v-RV6zXfjhzxaEi-T5oUvQ3b4Sc-1avRW4XJwrPF9wUb4oVgim0anC52lH92K2GZAew3tgZBfB1XxB4n0LXTOx1VohB_jrV8pzV9TM6fWOueHW-wAP6AvB2zORcKft-Zsk7QQjZ6xc5pRFoilEAWRjP_MYs11uw8aY59PqdYgIES89TJ9jNe26kf1eW1w-qp1HzgqWw-PJ3OxTgpte0qbJZPnh7BTQZZ3U5-FqL2RsviGhBKRlMBIdQVTGkDkyGo2gv6bO4dLo84VMjJyvqeERUJpwUnnooOyq3w6ioRkYjjBhZbhj4v0LD_SuD0N1nJhb9edTc/4dc/zb5QsPDjSAKIfzlv57b5Wg/h4/h001.uHe0x5mkFuu6B9ASRuRq456nujsr_GkfAk0Xz0_S0tM)

clean_body: | | | In the first elections of Donald Trump’s second term, I’m fighting back in our statehouses - I’m running to return to the Virginia House of Delegates. **** I’m Elizabeth Guzman, and I’m launching my campaign today for a red to blue race in Virginia’s 22nd House of Delegates district. 2025’s Virginia elections will be the first test of whether Democrats can win under Trump’s second term -and hundreds of grassroots donors like you will help prove our strength. I’ll tell you a little more about me shortly, I came to the United States as a single mother, working three minimum wage jobs at the same time to pay for my education, becoming a social worker and union leader. In 2017, after Donald Trump’s first inauguration, I fought back and became the first immigrant Latina in the Virginia House of Delegates, defeating an entrenched Republican incumbent. In 2018, I delivered the Spanish-language response to Trump’s State of the Union, denouncing hate and extremism. I served for 6 years, passing laws to raise the minimum wage, end a Jim Crow-era ban on public sector collective bargaining, and expand reproductive freedom. Now, as Donald Trump returns, I’m stepping back up. Virginia Democrats are defending a 51-49 majority in the House of Delegates, and my red-to-blue race i s in a district Trump lost \- one of the best opportunities nationwide to win. To fight back against Trump’s attacks on our immigrant families, public schools, healthcare, reproductive rights, and civil service, we need Democratic state legislatures. ** | Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Left Ledger 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Able Dems, please .

Just as we expected, these bills are not lowering the price of eggs or gas or helping people to find more affordable housing. They are not tackling the most pressing issues we heard from so many on the campaign trail. **Instead, what Republicans are forcing Congress to vote on are “Gotcha” bills. These are political bills that serve no other purpose than to stir up the base, start partisan fights, and lay the groundwork for attack ads.** These are bills talking about inflated and hyperbolic issues with no plan to actually solve the problem. And we know the NRCC will be poised and ready to use these votes to run constant attack ads in the district. Now, this is their agenda for the next two years. They will try to distract with these bills rather than focusing on the serious work to deliver for families who need it most. **No matter what game Republicans try to play over these next two years, I am ready to stand strong to fight back against every attack. clean_body: | | Friends, During the campaign, Republicans pledged that they would use their majority to solve the issues the American people were facing. We are now two weeks into the Congress, and it is abundantly clear the GOP has no intention of working to address the concerns of the American people. Republicans have started putting their bills up for a vote. Just as we expected, these bills are not lowering the price of eggs or gas or helping people to find more affordable housing. They are not tackling the most pressing issues we heard from so many on the campaign trail. Instead, what Republicans are forcing Congress to vote on are “Gotcha” bills. These are political bills that serve no other purpose than to stir up the base, start partisan fights, and lay the groundwork for attack ads. These are bills talking about inflated and hyperbolic issues with no plan to actually solve the problem. And we know the NRCC will be poised and ready to use these votes to run constant attack ads in the district. Now, this is their agenda for the next two years. They will try to distract with these bills rather than focusing on the serious work to deliver for families who need it most. No matter what game Republicans try to play over these next two years, I am ready to stand strong to fight back against every attack. name: Fight Trump via Our Revolution
subject: Bernie refused to stand for Trump's extremism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1011?refcode=email-20250121_v&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, the
spectacle of Trump’s inauguration was obscene. While Republicans and even
some Democrats stood to applaud Trump’s dangerous agenda, Bernie wasn’t
having it — and neither are we.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21207?t=1061&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ][IMG]

Trump surrounded himself with his new Oligarchy, putting billionaires like
Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos center stage, and proceeded to sign executive
orders pardoning J6 traitors, reversing drug price cuts, unleashing more
oil drilling, and more.

We know folks are feeling overwhelmed, angry, and, honestly, scared. But
we aren’t powerless in this moment, and we want you to know that Our
Revolution and our movement are not giving up. In fact, we are putting our
energy into action — and fighting back.

We are building a massive Citizen Action Team — already 30,000 activists
strong — to organize on Capitol Hill and in every Congressional District
in the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250121nd&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]As we prepare for the worst of the incoming Trump Administration, will you
pitch in a donation of any amount to support our nationwide network of
activists who have shown they’re ready and willing to fight?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250121nd&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250121nd&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250121nd&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250121nd&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250121nd&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20250121nd&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21207?t=1060&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ][IMG]

From our Post-Inauguration Survey yesterday, we know 76% of our supporters
are angry and worried and only 14% are very confident that the Democratic
Party and its politicians are able or willing to take on Trump.

That’s why it’s up to Our Revolution and leaders like Bernie to carry the
fight forward. And we hope you’ll support our Citizen Action Team as we
gear up on Capitol Hill and in every congressional district around the
country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250121nd&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]Our Citizen Action Team is ready, but how much they’re able to do depends
on you. Will you stand with us by sending a donation today? Every dollar
will be used to build out our Grassroots Army so we have the strength to
fight back effectively on every front.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7565%2E5885482%2EMS6VTU ]Website |

establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Donald Trump wants to make every immigrant deportable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Donald Trump has issued a flurry of executive orders that do nothing to lower costs, address the housing crisis or tamp down inflation.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250121-4690-footer&t=1&akid=4690%2E420207%2EwW7IHx)
Peter, in his first 24 hours back in the White House, Donald Trump has issued a flurry of executive orders that do nothing to lower costs, address the housing crisis or tamp down inflation.
**Here’s what Pramila had to say about them yesterday:**
1. The Executive Orders that nominally ‘secure the border’ will only **create more chaos and disorder** at the Southern border and eliminate programs that were proven successful.

2. Plans for sweeping bans on immigration will have **major negative impacts on our economy** , make it **impossible to prioritize serious threats** for enforcement, undermine safety and security, and **stoke xenophobia** to divide us.

3. The appalling Executive Order to end birthright citizenship is plain and simple **unconstitutional**.

---
With these Day 1 orders, Donald Trump is showing that he wants to make every immigrant deportable, inviting the racial profiling of entire communities, and subjecting an untold number of American families to being torn apart.
_We must fight back_ , and our people-powered movement is counting on your grassroots support to help.
[**Peter, will you pitch in $3 today to help Pramila fight _against_ Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda and fight _for_ just immigration reform instead?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250121?refcode=em20250121-4690&amount=3&refcode2=4690_420207_wW7IHx&akid=4690%2E420207%2EwW7IHx)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250121?amount=3&refcode=em20250121-4690&refcode2=4690_420207_wW7IHx&akid=4690%2E420207%2EwW7IHx)**
Together,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250121-4690-footer&t=2&refcode2=4690_420207_wW7IHx&akid=4690%2E420207%2EwW7IHx)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

| **Leader Hakeem Jeffries: “House Democrats Will Take a Blowtorch to Project 2025”** Rep. Hakeem Jeffries has been an INCREDIBLE leader for Democrats — and with major special elections coming up, _he could be our SPEAKER!_

**So we’re giving 500 top Democrats the opportunity to show Rep. Jeffries our appreciation for all his hard work!** [**We’re hand-delivering this card to his office at 8 AM tomorrow. We need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86356?t=6&akid=18632%2E878179%2EkvSJOT) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86356?t=7&akid=18632%2E878179%2EkvSJOT) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86356?t=8&akid=18632%2E878179%2EkvSJOT)

TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

Republicans’ already slim majority is SHRINKING as Trump picks more MAGA members to serve in his cabinet — meaning we can flip the House THIS YEAR!

As the GOP tries to take a blowtorch to Social Security, Medicare, reproductive rights, and more, I know we can stop them with you leading the way.

**Your strength gives me hope that Democrats can win critical special elections, put a MASSIVE check on Donald Trump’s power, and make you our next SPEAKER!**

[**So today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation for all your hard work and to help Democrats flip the seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86356?t=9&akid=18632%2E878179%2EkvSJOT) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86356?t=10&akid=18632%2E878179%2EkvSJOT) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86356?t=11&akid=18632%2E878179%2EkvSJOT)

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18632%2E878179%2EkvSJOT). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18632%2E878179%2EkvSJOT).**

name: Trump Alerts (Team Elise)
subject: You’re in power now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
After Donald J. Trump was sworn in as the 47th President of the United States...

After Donald J. Trump was sworn in as the 47th President of the United States...
| We did it, friend...
---
**Donald J. Trump has officially been sworn in as the 47th President of the United States!**
---
_After FOUR YEARS of slanderous lies, BILLIONS of dollars spent to stop us, an illegal plot to remove President Trump from the ballot, a vicious attempt to BANKRUPT him by the New York Attorney General, and four sham criminal cases designed to JAIL him for LIFE as an innocent man,_We The People_ defeated the Deep State and took back our country! _
---
The long national nightmare that was the Biden-Harris Administration is finally over, and a new golden era of freedom and prosperity is about to be unleashed!
---
But of course, President Trump wasn’t the only one who took power...
---
**_Americans like _YOU_ finally have control of _YOUR_ government once again._**
---
Which is why, on this historic day for our country, we want to know what your top priorities are so we can more effectively fight for you as we get to work Making America Great Again!
---
[**Please complete our “Voice of the People” survey to help set our agenda now that Donald J. Trump has officially been sworn in as the 47th President of the United States.**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjE/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

**_“2025 Voice of the People Survey”_**

**Survey ID #:** 95884-078 **Status:** PENDING
| [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjE/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

Thank you,
---
Team Elise
---

name: Team Shontel Brown
subject: On Day One…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Trump has already taken action to implement the draconian playbook and roll back our progress.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100758699/523792321/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_250121first_N_TSB_90DO_8_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmQxNDg4Ny00ZGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEQEU_V-KB0DYl-FzO1ItqdmaxfPTt4GUPdWmwhuXRg=) Peter, despite trying to “distance” himself from Project 2025, on Day One in office, Trump has already taken action to implement the draconian playbook and roll back our progress.

**Here is a look at the actions Trump took in the first few hours in office:**

❌ Issued a “full, complete, and unconditional” pardon of around 1,500 January 6 insurrectionists and commuted six sentences, including those convicted of being far-right extremists who brutally attacked police officers. His pardon included the “QAnon Shaman,” who stated that he was **going to buy guns** following the news.

❌ Reclassified thousands of civil servants in order to replace them with MAGA loyalists.

❌ Signed an executive order to dismantle the U.S. Constitution’s 14th amendment by ending birthright citizenship – which is already being fought in court.

❌ Withdrew the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement and the World Health Organization.

❌ Renamed the Gulf of Mexico to the Gulf of America, _**and much more.**_

[**We have a lot of work to do to protect our democracy, and it will take all of us. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Pardons for Violent Criminals
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Yesterday, Trump pardoned all of the criminals charged and convicted with crimes related to their actions on January 6th.
#

Friends —
Hundreds of police officers were injured on January 6th — beaten by a mob attempting to stop the peaceful transfer of power. They suffered traumatic brain injuries, broken ribs, and more. People died that day, and more in the weeks and months that followed.
Yesterday, Trump pardoned all of the criminals charged and convicted with crimes related to their actions on January 6th. 1500 convicted criminals will go free. No consequences for beating up cops, the damage to the Capitol, not to mention the harm done to our institutions and our democracy.
Look, my mom was the first female police officer in our town. She was attacked by a criminal and her injuries ended her career. This is personal for me. Trump’s done a lot of awful things in just the first 24 hours of his presidency, but this is just outrageous.
[**It’s going to take a huge team to stand against Trump and his administration, so I’m asking you to add your name here and say you're with our team. We need you, now more than ever.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_jan25/?source=em250121-1-180&t=1&akid=5946%2E6688874%2EALcTcs)
**[SIGN ON](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_jan25/?source=em250121-1-180&t=2&akid=5946%2E6688874%2EALcTcs)**
Everything I’ve accomplished in life — from the Navy, to NASA, to the U.S. Senate — happened because I’ve had a strong team behind me. Our victories come because of supporters like you.
That’s how we’ll fight back, and that’s how we’ll get through this. Together.
Thanks so much,
Mark
**[DONATE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan25.ChccGr&refcode=em250121-1-180&t=3&akid=5946%2E6688874%2EALcTcs)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=5946%2E6688874%2EALcTcs).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Here were his priorities on Day 1:

❌ Declaring a national emergency to halt entrance to our country while ordering the deportation of millions
❌ Ending birthright citizenship (aka the 14th Amendment)
❌ Pardoning 1500 January 6 traitors
❌ Ordering the federal government to only recognize two genders
❌ Ending any DEI initiatives in the federal government
❌ Renaming Gulf of Mexico and Mount Denali

Every single one of the executive orders he signed yesterday puts the American people in danger — specifically Black and Brown communities, immigrant communities, transgender communities, _children_ ....get the picture?

And he did it all while handing over the keys to our government to his racist, billionaire cronies. So what do we do?

**[We get to work: We must focus on local and state elections and do everything we can starting right now to take back the House in 2026 to defend those most vulnerable in this country. Help us protect and defend our neighbors from ongoing threats from this administration here:](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs-99CoksmbxgeVZko3i52dSiFYYwjTrfaBPnsPNW4OGKxbg3aS-bEIAiR184ASUx72v8hcgwunFsifPl3bqKNrSI3v5uszsszsBAh5cJFIO5qxgN_I30eQ_-oA2Cx0XRMusCMVTK-Bv7oWGwBvkK51C9eSoXnudA61UNGqfwXSBkGdpSqorag-IOL8Zyq30LJtKJFkUuFmN2NniG2AfZUbvSXnGNlultPYe4Iyd0jP33FwGy9cXIJNfX0mKPx0ZH56FDqyv8VA3cMs-wIBhl8Blv6d1T2D1S46bLbMJX0dqLisjr4y5vDoD5vQlhPLwnEiEU-dn7PBMxsXokS0TBqxtx7NiXLghBMgY9ZhLQpYeg/4dc/LxpKr6ccSz-Uo8xfn5crDQ/h4/h001.KEYOUl8urhG5haAKZsiPG-lyNHSkd1Mecg28hNIwOxA)**

body:
We need to be prepared for whatever comes our way, and building momentum as early as we can is key.

body:
Take a moment to read what the A.G.’s thinking about today.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100759196/523794330/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzNjZlNDQ5LTRmZDgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EBjBbYhgCzvDNNnx0KMkshJEiOVnTJOZok0C8_69sTQ=&emci=ee363aba-4dd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3366e449-4fd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8431045)

Peter, we couldn’t let yesterday pass without making sure you saw what Attorney General Eric Holder had to say on a day like that. [**Will you take a moment to read his message and then make a donation to power the NDRC’s work ahead?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100759197/523794331/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HolderInauguration_email_20250121-NDRC-Tier1-HolderInaugurationLiftnote_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250121-NDRC-Tier1-HolderInaugurationLiftnote_&utm_campaign=HolderInauguration&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzNjZlNDQ5LTRmZDgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EBjBbYhgCzvDNNnx0KMkshJEiOVnTJOZok0C8_69sTQ=) — Team NDRC | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100759198/523794332/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HolderInauguration_email_20250121-NDRC-Tier1-HolderInaugurationLiftnote_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250121-NDRC-Tier1-HolderInaugurationLiftnote_&utm_campaign=HolderInauguration&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzNjZlNDQ5LTRmZDgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EBjBbYhgCzvDNNnx0KMkshJEiOVnTJOZok0C8_69sTQ=)

---

Team,
Today, Donald Trump will take the oath of office once again. Let me make this very clear: he and those who surround him are a real danger to our democracy.

But now is not the time for acceptance and resignation. This is — yet again — a time for commitment and action. It's fitting, then, that today we also honor Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., whose life shows us the power of principled resistance.

Dr. King is often quoted as saying that “the arc of the moral universe is long but it bends towards justice.” That is true — but it only happens when caring, committed people put their hands on that arc and pull it toward justice. **We must be those people. Now it is our time. **

With Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in power in many parts of the country, I have no expectation that our goals will be simple to achieve or that needlessly complex challenges will be easily overcome. I know that our road will be long, and that many obstacles will stand in our way.

But I have no doubt that — if we stand together; if we walk together; if we believe as we always have in the power of our ideals and the potential of our shared community; if we recognize and use our citizen power — not only will our cause overcome, but our country shall be made better.

**So do not despair over where we are today, as hard as that may be. Instead, set your sights on where we need to go and on determining how we are going to get there. **

It's the same destination Dr. King was marching towards in Selma, the same destination that Thomas Wilson Dorr was marching towards in Rhode Island, the same destination Ida B. Wells was marching towards in Washington — a destination where the promises in the documents that shaped this nation aren't empty words on paper but a lived reality for every single American.

**The journey may be arduous, but we have no choice but to embark upon it. Ours cannot be the first generation that fails to defend and enhance our democracy.**

If America's history is any indication, this progress won't come in a straight line — and there will be days when we grow weary, when pessimism seems justified, when we are tempted to let up.

But when those moments come, when the road ahead of us seems too steep and the weight starts to feel like too much to bear, I hope you will remember the giants who came before us, like Dr. King — who carried more on their shoulders than we could ever imagine but kept on marching, one foot after the other, no matter what stood in their way.

[**And I hope you will choose to fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100759200/523794334/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HolderInauguration_email_20250121-NDRC-Tier1-HolderInaugurationLiftnote_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250121-NDRC-Tier1-HolderInaugurationLiftnote_&utm_campaign=HolderInauguration&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzNjZlNDQ5LTRmZDgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EBjBbYhgCzvDNNnx0KMkshJEiOVnTJOZok0C8_69sTQ=)

Thank you,

Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

clean_body: Take a moment to read what the A.G.’s thinking about today. | Peter, we couldn’t let yesterday pass without making sure you saw what Attorney General Eric Holder had to say on a day like that. = — Team NDRC | = = Team, Today, Donald Trump will take the oath of office once again. Let me make this very clear: he and those who surround him are a real danger to our democracy. But now is not the time for acceptance and resignation. This is — yet again — a time for commitment and action. It's fitting, then, that today we also honor Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., whose life shows us the power of principled resistance. Dr. King is often quoted as saying that “the arc of the moral universe is long but it bends towards justice.” That is true — but it only happens when caring, committed people put their hands on that arc and pull it toward justice. We must be those people. Now it is our time. With Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in power in many parts of the country, I have no expectation that our goals will be simple to achieve or that needlessly complex challenges will be easily overcome. I know that our road will be long, and that many obstacles will stand in our way. But I have no doubt that — if we stand together; if we walk together; if we believe as we always have in the power of our ideals and the potential of our shared community; if we recognize and use our citizen power — not only will our cause overcome, but our country shall be made better. So do not despair over where we are today, as hard as that may be. Instead, set your sights on where we need to go and on determining how we are going to get there. It's the same destination Dr. King was marching towards in Selma, the same destination that Thomas Wilson Dorr was marching towards in Rhode Island, the same destination Ida B. Wells was marching towards in Washington — a destination where the promises in the documents that shaped this nation aren't empty words on paper but a lived reality for every single American. The journey may be arduous, but we have no choice but to embark upon it. Ours cannot be the first generation that fails to defend and enhance our democracy. If America's history is any indication, this progress won't come in a straight line — and there will be days when we grow weary, when pessimism seems justified, when we are tempted to let up. But when those moments come, when the road ahead of us seems too steep and the weight starts to feel like too much to bear, I hope you will remember the giants who came before us, like Dr. King — who carried more on their shoulders than we could ever imagine but kept on marching, one foot after the other, no matter what stood in their way. = Thank you, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: “Without a token of defense”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
The bravery and heroism of firefighters from across California, the United States, and even North America -- firefighters saved a tragic natural disaster from becoming something absolutely unimaginable for many more families.

_"Los Angeles, where we are watching fires still tragically burn from weeks ago without even a token of defense." - Donald Trump._
**Without...**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-la-fire-2025?refcode=em250121-1&refcode2=2300_4767699_cpJ8hs&akid=2300%2E4767699%2EcpJ8hs)
**A...**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-la-fire-2025?refcode=em250121-1&refcode2=2300_4767699_cpJ8hs&akid=2300%2E4767699%2EcpJ8hs)
**Token...**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-la-fire-2025?refcode=em250121-1&refcode2=2300_4767699_cpJ8hs&akid=2300%2E4767699%2EcpJ8hs)
**Of Defense...**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-la-fire-2025?refcode=em250121-1&refcode2=2300_4767699_cpJ8hs&akid=2300%2E4767699%2EcpJ8hs)
It’s nonsense. But it’s also insulting.
The bravery and heroism of firefighters from across California, the United States, and even across North America — saved a tragic wildfire from becoming something absolutely unimaginable for many more families.
In the face of one of the worst natural disasters in America’s history, this moment underscores the critical need for partnership and a shared commitment to facts.
I look forward to President Trump’s visit to Los Angeles and his mobilization of the full weight of the federal government to help our fellow Americans recover and rebuild.
Gavin Newsom
* * *

Please make a contribution to the California Fire Foundation today. They are an organization that provides support to firefighters and the communities they serve, including direct financial aid to impacted residents.

name: Congresswoman Laura Gillen
subject: Upholding our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
While we witnessed a peaceful transfer of power, unlike the aftermath of the 2020 presidential election, there is so much at stake with Donald Trump and the GOP majority in the House.

| Peter,

Yesterday, Donald Trump was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States and took office for his second presidential term.

While we witnessed a peaceful transfer of power, unlike the aftermath of the 2020 presidential election, there is so much at stake with Donald Trump and the GOP majority in the House. But upholding our democracy is one of the most sacred Congressional duties and one I take seriously.

Roll Call named our district one of the most competitive battleground races for 2026. My mission hasn’t changed: I will continue to put New York’s Fourth Congressional District first and work across the aisle with the new administration to deliver results. But I need your support to ensure we have the resources to fend off Republican attacks and keep NY-04 blue. name: No Dem Left Behind Executive Director, Hassan Martini
subject: The Numbers: Comparing the 2020 and 2024 elections.
body:
Our team is doing the research to get us on the right track for 2026.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w5s2c-u83jii-kyd76rh1/)
---
**The Numbers: Comparing the 2020 and 2024 Elections.**
---
Hello friend, We believe in keeping you informed with the most accurate information, even when the news is tough to hear. While the results of the 2024 election are disheartening, this is a moment to stay vigilant, analyze what went wrong, adapt, and prepare for the next opportunity to make a difference. Your commitment and engagement mean everything to us, and together, we can keep pushing forward. **With that said, let's dive into it:** The 2024 election results delivered a clear but narrow victory for Donald Trump. While his win may not have been a landslide by historical standards, his performance compared to the 2020 election marks a concerning trend for Democrats, particularly in battleground states and key demographic groups. Analyzing these shifts is essential to understanding where we must regroup and how we can build a stronger foundation for future victories.
---
| | | | |
---
### **Trump’s Gains from 2020 to 2024**
**_Stronger Popular Vote Performance:_** In 2024, Trump achieved a level of success that Republicans have rarely seen in recent decades. He became only the second Republican since 1988 to win the popular vote. While his nearly 50% share of the vote is not unprecedented, it reflects a significant improvement from 2020, when Joe Biden d efeated him by over 7 million votes (4.45% margin).
**_The Shift:_** Trump narrowed the national gap dramatically, securing a margin of 1.62% over Vice President Kamala Harris. This improvement underscores a recalibration of his campaign to better target disillusioned Democrats, independents, and previously low-turnout Republican voters.
**_Flipping Battleground States:_** In 2020, Trump lost six of seven critical battleground states (Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin), all of which Joe Biden carried by slim margins. In 2024, Trump not only regained these states but did so decisively, flipping them by wider margins than in his 2016 victory.
**_Collective Margin Comparison:_** Trump’s combined margin of 760,000 votes in these states dwarfs the margins seen in other tight elections, such as the 2020 Biden-Trump contest, where the collective difference in battleground states was fewer than 45,000 votes.
**_Regional and Demographic Gains:_** Trump gained ground in suburban areas where Biden previously made inroads, while also expanding his support among working-class voters, particularly in rural and industrial regions. Trump improved his margins among Hispanic and Black voters compared to 2020, continuing a trend of Republican gains in these demographics that began in his previous campaigns.
---
|
---
### **Areas Where Trump Fell Short**
_Despite these gains, it’s important to recognize where Trump’s victory was less convincing:_ **_Narrow National Margin_** : Trump’s 2024 victory margin of 1.62% is smaller than many past winners and pales in comparison to Biden’s 4.45% popular vote margin in 2020. His raw vote margin of about 2.5 million votes is modest compared to Biden’s 7 million in the previous election.
**_Limited Coattail Effect:_** While Trump’s personal brand secured him the presidency, it provided little support for other Republicans down-ballot. Democrats held crucial Senate seats, including Tammy Baldwin’s in the pivotal state of Wisconsin. This trend extended to other key battleground states, where Democrats retained Senate seats in Arizona, Michigan, and Nevada—and even won the gubernatorial race in North Carolina. **_Modest Congressional Gains:_** Republicans failed to expand their narrow majority in the House significantly, and Democrats even gained ground in state legislatures and other down-ballot contests.
---
|
---
### **What Changed Between 2020 and 2024?**
_Several factors contributed to Trump’s improved performance:_ **_Targeted Messaging on Key Issues:_** Trump’s campaign effectively capitalized on concerns about inflation, immigration, and crime. These issues resonated with voters in battleground states, where dissatisfaction with the Democratic Party’s handling of these topics was more pronounced.
**_Democratic Turnout Challenges:_** Voter enthusiasm among key Democratic constituencies—particularly younger voters and urban populations—did not match 2020 levels. This decline in turnout proved costly in close states like Georgia and Pennsylvania.
**_Strategic Outreach to Swing Demographics:_** Trump’s campaign made noticeable inroads among Hispanic and Black voters, particularly in states like Nevada, Arizona, and Georgia. By focusing on economic messaging and cultural concerns, the GOP chipped away at traditional Democratic strongholds within these communities.
---
|
---
### **Moving Forward**
**Rebuild the Coalition:****** The Democratic coalition that powered Biden’s 2020 victory—suburban voters, young people, minorities, and urban residents—must be re-energized. Ensuring that our messaging addresses economic concerns, public safety, and education will be critical to winning back these voters.
**Invest in Battleground States:****** The shift in the seven key battleground states from 2020 to 2024 highlights the need for sustained investment in voter outreach and mobilization. Grassroots organizing, combined with data-driven strategies, must be a top priority to regain lost ground.
**Counter GOP Gains in Key Demographics:****** Addressing the GOP’s growing appeal among Hispanic and Black voters requires authentic engagement and policy solutions that resonate with these communities. We must also work to build trust and counter disinformation that disproportionately affects these groups.
**Focus on Local Elections:****** While Trump won at the top of the ticket, Democrats’ success down-ballot demonstrates the importance of investing in state and local races. These victories provide a foundation to rebuild momentum heading into the 2026 midterms.
---
|
---
There’s no other way to say it: Trump’s gains compared to 2020 are a wake-up call, but his narrow victory and limited coattail effect reveal cracks in the GOP’s broader appeal. By addressing these challenges head-on, we can position ourselves for success in 2026 and beyond, and we want you to be a part of this push. [**_Our path forward begins now. Let’s rally together, refine our strategies, and ensure that the progress we’ve fought for continues to shape the future of our nation. Contribute what you can, engage with us via email and social media, and let's work towards the change we need in the country together._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w5s2c-u83jij-kyd76rh2/) In solidarity, Hassan Martini

clean_body: Our team is doing the research to get us on the right track for 2026. | | | | | | The Numbers: Comparing the 2020 and 2024 Elections. Hello friend, We believe in keeping you informed with the most accurate information, even when the news is tough to hear. While the results of the 2024 election are disheartening, this is a moment to stay vigilant, analyze what went wrong, adapt, and prepare for the next opportunity to make a difference. Your commitment and engagement mean everything to us, and together, we can keep pushing forward. With that said, let's dive into it: The 2024 election results delivered a clear but narrow victory for Donald Trump. While his win may not have been a landslide by historical standards, his performance compared to the 2020 election marks a concerning trend for Democrats, particularly in battleground states and key demographic groups. Analyzing these shifts is essential to understanding where we must regroup and how we can build a stronger foundation for future victories. | | | | | Trump’s Gains from 2020 to 2024 Stronger Popular Vote Performance: In 2024, Trump achieved a level of success that Republicans have rarely seen in recent decades. He became only the second Republican since 1988 to win the popular vote. While his nearly 50% share of the vote is not unprecedented, it reflects a significant improvement from 2020, when Joe Biden d efeated him by over 7 million votes (4.45% margin). The Shift: Trump narrowed the national gap dramatically, securing a margin of 1.62% over Vice President Kamala Harris. This improvement underscores a recalibration of his campaign to better target disillusioned Democrats, independents, and previously low-turnout Republican voters. Flipping Battleground States: In 2020, Trump lost six of seven critical battleground states (Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin), all of which Joe Biden carried by slim margins. In 2024, Trump not only regained these states but did so decisively, flipping them by wider margins than in his 2016 victory. Collective Margin Comparison: Trump’s combined margin of 760,000 votes in these states dwarfs the margins seen in other tight elections, such as the 2020 Biden-Trump contest, where the collective difference in battleground states was fewer than 45,000 votes. Regional and Demographic Gains: Trump gained ground in suburban areas where Biden previously made inroads, while also expanding his support among working-class voters, particularly in rural and industrial regions. Trump improved his margins among Hispanic and Black voters compared to 2020, continuing a trend of Republican gains in these demographics that began in his previous campaigns. | Areas Where Trump Fell Short Despite these gains, it’s important to recognize where Trump’s victory was less convincing: Narrow National Margin : Trump’s 2024 victory margin of 1.62% is smaller than many past winners and pales in comparison to Biden’s 4.45% popular vote margin in 2020. His raw vote margin of about 2.5 million votes is modest compared to Biden’s 7 million in the previous election. Limited Coattail Effect: While Trump’s personal brand secured him the presidency, it provided little support for other Republicans down-ballot. Democrats held crucial Senate seats, including Tammy Baldwin’s in the pivotal state of Wisconsin. This trend extended to other key battleground states, where Democrats retained Senate seats in Arizona, Michigan, and Nevada—and even won the gubernatorial race in North Carolina. Modest Congressional Gains: Republicans failed to expand their narrow majority in the House significantly, and Democrats even gained ground in state legislatures and other down-ballot contests. | What Changed Between 2020 and 2024? Several factors contributed to Trump’s improved performance: Targeted Messaging on Key Issues: Trump’s campaign effectively capitalized on concerns about inflation, immigration, and crime. These issues resonated with voters in battleground states, where dissatisfaction with the Democratic Party’s handling of these topics was more pronounced. Democratic Turnout Challenges: Voter enthusiasm among key Democratic constituencies—particularly younger voters and urban populations—did not match 2020 levels. This decline in turnout proved costly in close states like Georgia and Pennsylvania. Strategic Outreach to Swing Demographics: Trump’s campaign made noticeable inroads among Hispanic and Black voters, particularly in states like Nevada, Arizona, and Georgia. By focusing on economic messaging and cultural concerns, the GOP chipped away at traditional Democratic strongholds within these communities. | Moving Forward Rebuild the Coalition:** The Democratic coalition that powered Biden’s 2020 victory—suburban voters, young people, minorities, and urban residents—must be re-energized. Ensuring that our messaging addresses economic concerns, public safety, and education will be critical to winning back these voters. Invest in Battleground States:**** The shift in the seven key battleground states from 2020 to 2024 highlights the need for sustained investment in voter outreach and mobilization. Grassroots organizing, combined with data-driven strategies, must be a top priority to regain lost ground. Counter GOP Gains in Key Demographics:**** Addressing the GOP’s growing appeal among Hispanic and Black voters requires authentic engagement and policy solutions that resonate with these communities. We must also work to build trust and counter disinformation that disproportionately affects these groups. Focus on Local Elections:**** While Trump won at the top of the ticket, Democrats’ success down-ballot demonstrates the importance of investing in state and local races. These victories provide a foundation to rebuild momentum heading into the 2026 midterms. | There’s no other way to say it: Trump’s gains compared to 2020 are a wake-up call, but his narrow victory and limited coattail effect reveal cracks in the GOP’s broader appeal. By addressing these challenges head-on, we can position ourselves for success in 2026 and beyond, and we want you to be a part of this push.
